Friend,

During my last debate, I reminded voters across America why I'm in this race and why I am the BEST candidate for the job.

_Will you take a look at the message I had to share?_

**[After you finish reading this, please consider giving a donation of $20.24 to help me WIN the fight for our future.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=33f688f5a05f4ebd9f8cd77504c1fef4&_e=OdzC_--_lTK8x1YJtnWAtayHcibAlumVlRsFfUxRLpfEA93NbGkHdP-meUhszcaWSmZJ7hjQXSb44atlnuGsomlRsDuv43NJVTJtYvrjJusCXd-W3JkAKpaA4TbysbJ9e5OPLPSJkj4dJfsx8l8e4P5gYrZCtqex8Z-_A45soxTdfzmAeI0uaqBDElGW9Io8ilXkJhR2l_GJHLmnM3ssT3ObIpQE3GtkF614mAYjXNLiFUGau0mBaCF_vLhVud9j86WrLQTf7t3TGE_018vo_FgXHQXc8hhxChcZdNC217AkoSBaAR51P9ZKy6PGgqgIQRV2-zmPSGPFxb78Z1fje5NkXjY4HUdhGSi17QBngMo1hGHK2yto8RdQEe42iJLfzJ_kFG04Ks1Ev8HxylsFAeYlyU7R0TsbdMLfPAEAS3C1TSfnvGTczHJjfoKK15RaVhOVvQjgigG-hWrgjbD7XnsBQWzs5inXOGy_YXdXlAO_5UYknOcXLwpv7Yzm_fn6pqJN9QFIsWMoqaNiyoM7g7VXKVPde2Y3JAbILD5FFS0%3D "After you finish reading this, please consider giving a donation of $20.24 to help me WIN the fight for our future.")**

**If you look at the facts ...**

_We are almost $34 trillion dollars in debt.

60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. 50% of American families can't afford diapers, and 1 in 6 American families can't pay their utility bills.

Parents are worrying about what their children are being taught in the classrooms.

We have antisemitism all over college campuses and students feel unsafe.

We've got an open border where terrorists can come through, and there are dangers all around us._

**That 's not us. That's not America. **

We've got to stop focusing on the past and start focusing on what's going to make America **STRONG** and **PROUD** , which is exactly what I'm doing.

**[It's time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. Will you join me?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=33f688f5a05f4ebd9f8cd77504c1fef4&_e=OdzC_--_lTK8x1YJtnWAtayHcibAlumVlRsFfUxRLpfEA93NbGkHdP-meUhszcaWSmZJ7hjQXSb44atlnuGsomlRsDuv43NJVTJtYvrjJusCXd-W3JkAKpaA4TbysbJ9e5OPLPSJkj4dJfsx8l8e4P5gYrZCtqex8Z-_A45soxTdfzmAeI0uaqBDElGW9Io8ilXkJhR2l_GJHLmnM3ssT3ObIpQE3GtkF614mAYjXNLiFUGau0mBaCF_vLhVud9j86WrLQTf7t3TGE_018vo_FgXHQXc8hhxChcZdNC217AkoSBaAR51P9ZKy6PGgqgIQRV2-zmPSGPFxb78Z1fje5NkXjY4HUdhGSi17QBngMo1hGHK2yto8RdQEe42iJLfzJ_kFG04Ks1Ev8HxylsFASj8tSa80lgy_oXkAzMNwuIlSvmbKuHaI-XWjqxvCgS-3zwH-yO_S5W2djyYwCxoDiyXg07Xi4lTjlsa3_rxyxUMQeolGcwNCCFwmMYvKMsbzg6mE8zZ8vw8PCVlx4CK60RWtgAisN1vHSa1AwTwQdw%3D "It’s time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. Will you join me?")**

_**As president, we will restore our economy.** If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards!_

Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist.

We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels.

**We will put transparency back in our classrooms.** As a mom, I know what that means. Parents should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening!

_**We will secure our border,**_ and _**we will get crime down**_ because families should feel safe wherever they go.

It's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals.

And as the wife of a combat veteran, **we will make sure the military knows we have their back.**

We have the solutions. But I need your help to win and make America strong and proud again!

**[If you'd like to join me in the fight to save our country, please consider chipping in a contribution to my campaign today.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=33f688f5a05f4ebd9f8cd77504c1fef4&_e=OdzC_--_lTK8x1YJtnWAtayHcibAlumVlRsFfUxRLpfEA93NbGkHdP-meUhszcaWSmZJ7hjQXSb44atlnuGsomlRsDuv43NJVTJtYvrjJusCXd-W3JkAKpaA4TbysbJ9e5OPLPSJkj4dJfsx8l8e4P5gYrZCtqex8Z-_A45soxTdfzmAeI0uaqBDElGW9Io8ilXkJhR2l_GJHLmnM3ssT3ObIpQE3GtkF614mAYjXNLiFUGau0mBaCF_vLhVud9j86WrLQTf7t3TGE_018vo_FgXHQXc8hhxChcZdNC217AkoSBaAR51P9ZKy6PGgqgIQRV2-zmPSGPFxb78Z1fje5NkXjY4HUdhGSi17QBngMo1hGHK2yto8RdQEe42iJLfzJ_kFG04Ks1Ev8HxylsFARbXibuX0Lh65cko9GBxyQJ63RzYIIi4LfuZmFd-GJHckaxIvFJjVx7rRyQnQMEJVD6wSzcXGWKCCWRPrCJu54sXLDBQ6QuObepsM_ZV6sbUIC60-z_oBmsKF_A51d9pG-Bosv_eYpPbE7uyNKLgrok%3D "If you’d like to join me in the fight to save our country, please consider chipping in a contribution to my campaign today. My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=33f688f5a05f4ebd9f8cd77504c1fef4&_e=OdzC_--_lTK8x1YJtnWAtayHcibAlumVlRsFfUxRLpfEA93NbGkHdP-meUhszcaWCNwhuEGO_fzsszvMwGp1H6QAnCXEVKFRwbzutMtN5Wr4XmGU4_Xrm8LCnWAvUDk2-H_rjUvfpFDfJ-3V1g1enn36h_VMawJi1aQ5mzXPWKmVMDJneiknCruU9EiHkxp4CtE_FdzjeB36gGO9hj3W7lgwdLSszltekru-HoO-mzc_UHJLHJOf6lWVLc7bZ1NDYlr4nduwvM93jrQ37KrFNiNOW1F8nkw25oiiH078zvPx1QIZDCMDCfZINMPWka5P8VB8wosCK55wXnnxO40QnWMs-vNheX_f_x3M_n6cc17jOV7WQHiycy-SzTB3T5Hxwg_auRHZFa0YDm3Iq5iAe-NQYS966bN8oPB-vPdMmHm--U8Y8NuZ2yMewN3Jw9ir-UIK0logjg7xxNe0HvKynIE4kts6DrayCIl0BhiBkpnWIEdslpwE_uCgQYICZkODqXacH4hyBaNo3KkrA7T9eigiayMMuL_C2Tm6uDHlZncT_ZfXdVziV4wJpt0H0Lpf "Will you join me today and help me save our country?")**

clean_body: | | | | | | Friend, During my last debate, I reminded voters across America why I'm in this race and why I am the BEST candidate for the job. Will you take a look at the message I had to share? "After you finish reading this, please consider giving a donation of $20.24 to help me WIN the fight for our future." | If you look at the facts ... We are almost $34 trillion dollars in debt. 60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck. 50% of American families can't afford diapers, and 1 in 6 American families can't pay their utility bills. Parents are worrying about what their children are being taught in the classrooms. We have antisemitism all over college campuses and students feel unsafe. We've got an open border where terrorists can come through, and there are dangers all around us. That 's not us. That's not America. We've got to stop focusing on the past and start focusing on what's going to make America STRONG and PROUD , which is exactly what I'm doing. "It’s time we elect a president who can WIN and get America back on track. Will you join me?" | | As president, we will restore our economy. If 8% of our budget is interest, quit borrowing! Cut up the credit cards! Rather than 87,000 IRS agents going after middle America, let's go after the hundreds of billions of dollars of COVID fraud that we know exist. We will stop the spending, we will stop the borrowing, we will stop the earmarks. And I will veto any spending bill that doesn't take us back to pre-COVID levels. We will put transparency back in our classrooms. As a mom, I know what that means. Parents should NEVER have to wonder what is being taught to your kids in schools. You have every right to know what's happening! We will secure our border, and we will get crime down because families should feel safe wherever they go. It's simple: Have the backs of our law enforcement and take the numbers of our criminals. And as the wife of a combat veteran, we will make sure the military knows we have their back. We have the solutions. But I need your help to win and make America strong and proud again! "If you’d like to join me in the fight to save our country, please consider chipping in a contribution to my campaign today. " Let's win this! | | My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" | Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc. **By providing your phone number, you are consenting to receive SMS/MMS news alerts, action items, and donation requests to the number provided by from each of Team Stand For America, Stand For America PAC, Stand for America, SFA Fund Inc., and Ambassador Nikki Haley directly or by third parties acting on their behalf. body:
13-year Marine veteran Lucas Kunce or January 6th coward Josh Hawley?
#
Josh Hawley is the corrupt politician who raised his fist in support of rioters outside the U.S. Capitol on January 6, 2021 — then ran out the back door like a coward the moment things got real.
Lucas Kunce is the 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust expert, and Democrat who’s already made this a neck-and-neck race to take Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat back for working people.
**It’s time to choose your fighter, Peter:**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39384?refcode=em20231125-4238&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4238%2E614464%2EZJaAnB)
**[ELECT LUCAS KUNCE: CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39384?refcode=em20231125-4238&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4238%2E614464%2EZJaAnB)**
**This race is one of our best and only chances to flip a GOP-held Senate seat in 2024** — and Lucas Kunce is gaining more and more momentum every day.
From outraising Hawley to earning endorsements from statewide labor organizations like the Missouri AFL-CIO + the Missouri Fire Fighters, Lucas has proved that this grassroots movement to defeat Josh Hawley will be a serious force to be reckoned with in this election cycle.
But after a slew of approval polls found Hawley’s numbers tanking among Missourians, national GOP insiders and corporate mega-donors stepped in to prop up his scattered campaign. **They’ve already spent MILLIONS to make Hawley look strong and fund attacks against Lucas — and with multiple polls showing this race in a dead heat, they aren’t going to stop anytime soon.**
That’s why we need to be prepared every day between now and November 5, 2024. We need to continue fighting back against their desperate attacks AND getting Lucas’ unifying vision for Missouri in front of voters. And we need your support to make it happen. **So we’re coming directly to you, Peter.**
**[Will you help Missourians choose their fighter in 2024 by adding a donation of $10, $25, or whatever you can afford today? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs in this race, so we’re counting on help from real people like you every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/39384?refcode=em20231125-4238&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4238%2E614464%2EZJaAnB)**

body:
| | | Peter,

I’m not going to lie - I was hesitant to send this email...

Today, anyone who speaks out against our two-tiered justice system could be dragged though the mud and smattered with charges by the radical Biden Administration.****

_**But enough is enough.** _

**I’ll say it loud and I’ll say it clear - Joe Biden’s Democratic Party uses the justice system to bury Donald Trump in bogus lawsuits in an attempt to keep him out of the White House.**

This isn’t about trying to find “truth” or “justice,” Peter - it’s about Joe Biden trying to win an election he knows he can’t win on his own.

What the Biden Administration is doing is wrong, disgusting, and un-American.****

The President should use his power to keep the American people safe, not to attack his political opponents.

**[EVERYONE in America has to take a stand if we’re going to defend our democracy. I’m still settling into my new office – both the physical space and the position I now hold in the federal government. I’m going to be honest with you, the last few weeks have been a blur – but productive and exciting as well.

name: Sen. Josh Hawley
subject: A bigger threat than Hamas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, The level of vitriol against Christian conservatives is staggering, and it is unrelenting.

Just this week, an article put out by liberal news outlet Salon attacking House Speaker Mike Johnson, among others, was titled, **“MAGA and Christian nationalism: Bigger threat to America than Hamas could ever be.”**

_**Wow, what a headline.**_

This is what we’re up against— the Left wants you to believe that our deeply held Christian faith and family values are more dangerous than **Jihadist terrorism**.

The new speaker of the house is a man rooted in faith and deeply conservative. _**[For this reason, the left hates him.](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=19a04af1c20646578df80f4e499a948a&_e=3B-dyS_nTxdtU-q9RCskPbSJyH9GtFYbyGHdyA7gZqZHp9q-XSjahFyoyUoSJu8VVK01hxi7x9NwzdbEOn_k7lGr6O0NqjJefbZH46wYpPWQwzEaKjxNTLPIrTZteZlvi1PlVt9rnACWWLtLNo8EsiEO-ON4uOYPAUCKuZYEJfajQe3M6MgmpeXhp2eLS9NhFwrsfMZGNfC0x5wQSMckfS7eKytcMzOrzy8WlS4uv8fFyT4wED2KD-Oa-NXC1U_dUoT_RjeNSGrfePYVubnYS1EU0S5IuK6WOhCCCs2To_W8pSFokKCnFzOCtxBqK6BvV9Mh_1jNHL3wwfLc9Ffo5S01Htwjc7V8SY6ZzvsU6SM%3D)**_ We must stand with Mike Johnson as he faces the left, the media, and corporate America!

clean_body: | | | Peter, The level of vitriol against Christian conservatives is staggering, and it is unrelenting. Just this week, an article put out by liberal news outlet Salon attacking House Speaker Mike Johnson, among others, was titled, “MAGA and Christian nationalism: Bigger threat to America than Hamas could ever be.” Wow, what a headline. This is what we’re up against— the Left wants you to believe that our deeply held Christian faith and family values are more dangerous than Jihadist terrorism. The new speaker of the house is a man rooted in faith and deeply conservative. We must stand with Mike Johnson as he faces the left, the media, and corporate America! | | Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee | |

name: Your America
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36090%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cX7txWyBAKkXjETfnnxJuA&sysid=1) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36091%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mgsr4HkSc69LSTIV3OIHSA&sysid=1) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36092%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=yMyYB3rfzix4I%2fbjOPIhug&sysid=1). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36093%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2iO7SGxYvgwlaTG%2b4RKDpQ&sysid=1)
---

Your America News
---

name: Chuck Hand
subject: I’m not apologizing for January 6, andhere’s why…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zo5eebmb9l72sj27oo66br98efumv6dk77ovikko_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob2c9h2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for "picketing" because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don 't regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what's right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I'm running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I'm writing to you today because **[I've been told you're the kind of person who's always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z5h6k6v4s1ha2ne6ndvt9la3g0rv18msavclkqd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob2c9h2bs)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6e263sth2ij0julfbk19i7ia9capf1qo6l09fu0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob2c9h2bs)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z4gt5use27a7eta2eagn0jmu3fen5fkgpjae7peg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob2c9h2bs)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I'd say they're treating me like a joke...that they don't _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball's chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking "deplorable" like me can win. ** That's why they're already firing everything they've got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq33hhn7774pis0eri9dq7j4qifekbjvv5vcv6ug_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob2c9h2bs)
---
They know that, when I make it to Washington, I'm going to be the biggest headache they've ever seen...

...because I'll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they've been screwing over for decades.

They don't want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you're just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you'll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zqv25o98jcl3ahkafchcd0qet0gp96haj2vphp6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob2c9h2bs)**

**[Make your donation using this secure link.](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zjcmjj9vn6s38es55hrkp1jccf3vbd8o81aouisg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob2c9h2bs)**

I appreciate all your help, and I can't wait to win this fight with you.

Thanks,

Chuck

PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
---

subject: #1 Solar Gadget Can Save Your Life In A Crisis
body:
It's Finally Back in Stock

# #1 Solar Gadget Can Save
Your Life In A Crisis
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zb9m1m0902dvmjsp0ui7uk0j54mr83luhifcs3so_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4qgftbiken2qrpcub4f4fagog3n4ra11jnoa9d0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi241ugg4uomv4iv77fvatho5aj0a72gpoveq548_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6h84f0g84fqcqttcuhuarich62tqvtufpu0ugco_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs) [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zuc2g6vgteori6k6lrr9oa0ap6dq5ld2ge4f7nvo_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z47a15643hjsa045l3bdu3ucqhc6lchvlea9mbp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs)

---
This is Republican Senator Roger Marshall. I led the standalone bill in the U.S. Senate that would send aid to Israel NOW. **Every single Senate Democrat voted AGAINST it.** **These Democrats are always saying they support Israel and want to help our friend and ally. But their actions tell a different story. ** They think our support for Israel should be tied to other wars and liberal causes. **Our support for Israel has no conditions.** These Democrats should **all** be ashamed of themselves. I’m SICK of them saying one thing and then voting another way. **[But I’m not going to give up, and I’m asking you not to give up either. Will you chip in right now to help me continue exposing them, and to help Republicans take back the Senate?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3amu6np4u4jkhv5a3bi7if0lqvem8pi3pnuef1g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob3cph2bs)**

name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: Have you seen what they're doing to our kids?
body:
The truth is, they’re setting these kids and their families up for a lifetime of medical complications and ailments.

| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdgms6ldqro3bc71g9k3ndf931llf7bqeborsdhg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs)
---
Friend,One appointment was all it took.**After one appointment at the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic, doctors fast tracked a 16-year-old girl into a double mastectomy.** _Not because she had aggressive cancer, and not because she had some rare condition that made it necessary..._ But because like so many other girls with mental health comorbidities, Luka Hein had been convinced she was a man in a woman’s body. And instead of giving her the mental health counseling she needed, doctors scheduled her for a permanent, painful and life altering procedure that she’d never recover from.Now, I don’t know how much you know about transgender medical “treatment.”Because of the multiple cases we’ve taken on in the past two years on this issue, I know a lot more than I ever thought I would.But even by transgender activist standards, a double mastectomy, as the first form of “treatment,” is careless and dangerous.Almost every hospital that offers what the Left calls “gender affirming care” insists on prescribing patients with puberty blockers, hormones, or some combination of the two for at least one year before putting them under the scalpel. **But the University of Nebraska Medical Center gender clinic showed no regard for Luka’s wellbeing –[and that’s why we’re suing them.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5i196ugsi2ve4qs0pfn9jn97ir0hp7m2kklbbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs)**Because this is bigger than Luka, and it’s bigger than the University of Nebraska Medical Center. Our children are under attack.>From our hospitals to our schools to our government to our media, kids are bombarded with transgender propaganda.If they show any signs of distress or deviation from the status quo, trusted adults and authority figures tell them that their real problem is being born the “wrong” body and there’s a simple solution. They tell young, impressionable kids that they can change their name, change their gender, get some new clothes, get medication, have a few surgeries and it will fix them.And they tell them everything is reversible if they change their mind later. They tell parents that they can either have a “dead daughter or a live son” – meaning that if their children aren’t allowed to transition, they’ll eventually kill themselves.But none of that is true.The truth is, so many of these kids end up more broken, suicidal and depressed AFTER transitioning than they were before. The truth is, they’re setting these kids and their families up for a lifetime of medical complications and ailments.And the truth is that if patriots like you don’t step up now, it’s only a matter of time before this evil reaches your loved ones. **[That’s why I hope I can count on your generous, tax deductible donation to the Center for American Liberty, to fund our lawsuit on behalf of Luka Hein and cases like hers.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjh3lh4tjdh08ksi266dha3re0p2rlp7bkt8fd0g_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1clh2bs)** Luka is one of three detransitioners we represent in landmark lawsuits against the hospitals and doctors responsible for mutilating their bodies as minors.We’ve taken on case after case because we know just how important it is to protect vulnerable children.I’ve sat face to face with young women that have had their lives and their health stolen from them. **_I can’t change what’s been done to them – but with your help, I can make these gender clinics pay._** And if we can win this case, we can send a loud, clear message to hospitals nationwide that our children are NOT lab rats.They aren’t science experiments, they aren’t blank checks for Big Pharma, and they aren’t political pawns for the radical Left.If we win this lawsuit, we could set a precedent nationwide and save thousands of children from Luka’s fate.But as a nonprofit organization, that won’t happen without patriots like you.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
---
Harmeet K. Dhillon Founder & CEO

name: Chuck Hand
subject: I’m not apologizing for January 6, andhere’s why…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvati030tkfmbbg6kjq55c5c467aick7qajt25a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob5cdh2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for "picketing" because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don 't regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what's right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I'm running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I'm writing to you today because **[I've been told you're the kind of person who's always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zh9tb378kee1dftp9tlmulldnks6i158evk0pe1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob5cdh2bs)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zojaqv2p8abl82ut4vasdnobemhafdsmvl3lkm3o_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob5cdh2bs)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9aatig677sp1attja78bs3llp07tpm2jgm7sdl0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob5cdh2bs)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I'd say they're treating me like a joke...that they don't _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball's chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking "deplorable" like me can win. ** That's why they're already firing everything they've got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z46m77h315b9301h61b4ak521e3736gb8c0sb3m8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob5cdh2bs)
---
They know that, when I make it to Washington, I'm going to be the biggest headache they've ever seen...

...because I'll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they've been screwing over for decades.

They don't want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you're just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you'll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zi8r4bh5gl2ssvnm053n24d805pnr4htcdgeiamg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob5cdh2bs)**

**[Make your donation using this secure link.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zvvps9vnus3dgiq63bqr86sceks30201f3t9cjkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob5cdh2bs)**

I appreciate all your help, and I can't wait to win this fight with you.

Thanks,

Chuck

PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA

subject: #1 Solar Gadget Can Save Your Life In A Crisis
body:
It's Finally Back in Stock

# #1 Solar Gadget Can Save
Your Life In A Crisis
**This Pocket-Sized "Power Plant" Sold Out in Less
Than 48 Hours - Now It's Finally Back in Stock** [**Tested by former Navy SEAL: See it in action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgdcdhss8bd10vppeqam2fdh163kprrmn4f6ifgg_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1c3h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgfdaumm79ahlt4544bp28h81omi9k14s780ogf8_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1c3h2bs) [**People are buying these in 4 packs - Learn More**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5hnsih10tn2rpufs3bjhhkg6s12pkvf5ruh7ti0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1c3h2bs) Oh no. We slapped our foreheads. We had just released the Patriot Power Cell. And the response was so strong, we couldn't believe it. The launch went WAY better than expected. We sold out completely in a matter of hours. The second time, we doubled our inventory thinking that would be enough to meet demand. And then... poof! GONE! Our inventory manager was asking... _**" Why were customers getting these 2... 4... or even 12 units at a time? Were they holiday gifts? Or just incredibly useful?"**_ Since then, the Patriot Power Cell has become one of our best-selling products of all time. Wow! And after making as many as we can, we think we finally have enough to meet demand... at least for now. That's why it's our privilege to introduce to you: [**Tested by Former Navy SEAL:
A Pocket Power Plant That's
Weather-Resistant, Has An Ultra
Bright LED Flashlight And
Charges 2 Devices At Once!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu0dlqpqh6pmv5mrpk1t20tklnh1ohua83n2b3ig_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1c3h2bs) [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z75ips72j235linmss36jt63qccq28m7vlifj958_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1c3h2bs) | | **Melanie D.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. They work so well, I bought eight more to give to my kids and friends for Christmas. I work outdoors a lot, so I take mine along to plug in my cell phone. They also have a flashlight on them, which comes in real handy. This is a good buy, you won't regret it.
---|---
| **Shirley C.** I'm very happy with the 4Patriots products. I've gotten the Power Cell, which is fantastic to charge my cell phone anywhere. It's rechargeable and I'm very happy with all of the 4Patriots products. And I'm very happy with Frank Bates, he's very truthful, honest and helps others in need. I really appreciate his products and his emails that I get. I'm really, really happy. I would recommend his products and him to anyone. Thank you so much.
---|---
| **Wing C.** I bought four of the Patriot Power Cells. I know they will come in handy. Because I know people with their cell phone, saying "oh I have no battery left." And you know what? They're getting it for Christmas. That's what I'm doing for them. We live here in New York, things are quite ample here at this time, ya know. But for emergencies like that - to have your cell phone, your contact to the outside world - it's important. Thank you very much, Frank.
---|---
| **Richard G.** It's a great item for me on weekends out in the country, the swimming pool, wherever else I don't have electricity available. Oftentimes people have come out to the pool, for example, and brought their power adapter to keep their cell phones or laptops or whatever charged up. They wound up losing them. With the Power Cell, it works great to recharge in the shade and I highly recommend it. Thank you very much.
---|---
[**Click here to see it in action!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgigh7kjsksnib6fqtbpde888bv7v6gctb4gltm0_rp22sh2s8i6eo30cjie6ob1c3h2bs)

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Will You Stand with Me?
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Wfn0zJumTg%2fqgvQyVV1ug&sysid=1)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=M%2b6Vbx4g4XDt%2firnHDdnFQ&sysid=1) As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles.

Your [signature on this petition](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36001%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=e4MTt8fDRl5qqcdimuDOXA&sysid=1) is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society.

The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to [stand with me now](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c36002%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WA1i1iCcnhYd4kWWRw0lkQ&sysid=1) to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations.

Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|

subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zucoptm76a2oraf4g8t1drub36i2gu3sdkb0eppo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zddpv9r85m4b5lsllo44dt1vmljqqjeob4qb91q8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6volaad2llp0hpdtbse1dgteetgk8e08ooneq4o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4060rvkcvg59537f4k44a4ctn6r94ka6d2319gg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)

name: Chuck Hand
subject: I’m not apologizing for January 6, andhere’s why…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
body:
I went inside the US Capitol to support President Trump.

---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr0d3ad72fjqou0n4mh734k0039f74hflt45u1o8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)
---
| Fellow Patriot,
**I went inside the US Capitol on January 6, 2021...** to support President Trump and stand up for fair elections in this country.
I was sentenced to**30 days in federal prison** on a petty misdemeanor charge for "picketing" because of it.
(10 of those days, I even spent in solitary confinement, because I refused to take the Covid shot.)
**But I don 't regret one single minute of it,** because I know that standing for what's right is ALWAYS the right thing to do...no matter what.
I'm running for Congress because I think our nation would be a hell of a lot better off if politicians in Washington _actually stood with and stood by their principles._
My name is Chuck Hand and I'm writing to you today because **[I've been told you're the kind of person who's always ready to help a real conservative fight for this country.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqj90s87nm0m1so9b7snn1odil9fjl7tco9rr06g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)**
**[Could you pitch in just a couple bucks to help me launch my campaign for Congress...](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv9g6nfkv5a8v0h1lggoj4gu8g1cs93gfta66e40_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)** and help me _finally_ give a real voice to the working men and women that make up this nation?
**[Donate here if you can. A couple bucks would be a huge help.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg3kog1kh1ab9stf8f92spfb8lbaivvjdf5i8a98_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)**
As you can guess, we have **_zero_** support from the GOP Establishment and a whole lot of big guns pointed at us from the Far-Left.
I'd say they're treating me like a joke...that they don't _really_ think a guy who works in construction in one of the poorest districts in America has a snowball's chance in hell...
**_...but they know better._**
After the last few years of conservative wins,**they _absolutely_ believe a Trump-loving, conservative-thinking "deplorable" like me can win. ** That's why they're already firing everything they've got at me. | | | | [STAND WITH ME IN THIS FIGHT!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoptgm7eq9k8jnpg0tdetb9ke6fjoaae817a0c3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)
---
They know that, when I make it to Washington, I'm going to be the biggest headache they've ever seen...

...because I'll force the Establishment to **look straight in the eye** with the American majority they've been screwing over for decades.

They don't want you to have a voice, ever again. **I _refuse_ to be silent.**

But making it to Washington is tough as hell for people like you and me...and **I can only win if I can depend on your help.**

I know times are tight, and I know you're just hearing from me for the first time.

But if you think we need more people like me in Washington, **[I hope you'll pitch in even just a dollar or two to help me prove that I can win this thing.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd2kotinl412k0mj7g6vdeks72bd477ep2cgdfr0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)**

**[Make your donation using this secure link.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs4k1gf6pq7ga7d6kna4vj1qd9avnd8heputhiq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32cth2bs)**

I appreciate all your help, and I can't wait to win this fight with you.

Thanks,

Chuck

PAID FOR BY CHUCK HAND FOR GEORGIA
---

---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: SmartAsset
subject: 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor
body:
5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znaav7v61280qpv0gj9oo2eiaq5jnd95lq9vpej0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs)
---
|
## 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor
---
| The questions you ask can help ensure you find the financial advice to help you plan to achieve your goals.
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zsf69iqhdq9een14e5gfrea9f2ksq7b36606sb9o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8kiltf2rmk7r8nm4td47cqjr857tploif96a5hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs)
---
|
---
| Whether you’re saving for retirement, considering major purchases, planning your estate, or just want a second set of eyes on your investments, hiring a financial advisor who you feel best suits your needs could be key. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person. While advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people who [work with a financial advisor](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z226qa9n2r4iaho1vu91092bcmkukv8e1bq5pam0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs) feel more at ease about their finances and could potentially end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Whatever your reasons for seeking financial advice, it’s important to have a list of questions planned to ensure you’re hiring a financial advisor who can help you plan to reach your goals.
### **5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor**
**1\. Are You a Fiduciary?** Fiduciaries are financial advisors with a legal obligation to prioritize your interests as they manage your assets or money. Unlike a broker who may push you into insurance policies or investments to rack up fees and commissions, fiduciaries are bound to recommend options that benefit you, the customer. While conflicts of interest can still exist, any potential conflicts of interest must be disclosed. SmartAsset's [free tool](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zum4hfckgefs9rme7ciqbmdr371uk83trofqfk60_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs) will only match you with vetted fiduciary advisors. **2\. How Much Experience Do You Have?** In addition to asking about their professional certification, it can also be a good idea to ask a prospective financial advisor about their overall experience. Generally, the more experience they have the better, especially if your financial situation is complicated. You should consider asking about their education, previous employers and track record of success. You might also want to consider performing a background check to find out whether they’ve ever been convicted of a crime or been involved in a criminal investigation by a regulatory or trade group. Don’t be afraid to ask for references from current or previous clients, and be wary of a financial advisor who seems reluctant to provide this information. **3\. What Type of Services Do You Offer?** Some financial advisors offer a range of services, while others specialize in niche aspects of financial management. For example, some advisors may only handle investments, while others take a more comprehensive approach, including retirement, estate planning and tax planning, along with other services. Ideally, you should look for an advisor whose range of services most closely fit your current and future needs. It’s also helpful to ask whether they specialize in a specific type of client. Some financial advisors may cater to retirees while others may prefer to work with families or divorcees. Some advisors cater to high-net-worth clients. [Choosing an advisor](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zah3tr9co5vveqifhig7ms07hf2872eenh41qoa0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs) who works exclusively with clients whose situations are similar to yours means they could be better equipped to offer the type of guidance and advice you may be seeking. **4\. What’s Your Fee Structure?** Before you sign on the dotted line, you need to know how much your prospective financial planner will charge for their services. Depending on the type of professional you’re working with, they may receive a flat or hourly fee, be paid on commissions, or a combination of both. Fee-based advisers, for example, charge an up-front fee, but may also get a commission for selling financial products. Fee-only advisors make money from the fees they charge their clients. Some fee-only advisors charge a flat rate while others charge by the hour. Advisors who cater to high-net-worth clients may calculate their fees based on a percentage of the assets under management. **5\. What’s Your Investment Approach?** You should also consider asking prospective advisors about their investing approach. If you’re not comfortable taking on a lot of risk, you could consider a financial advisor who advocates a more conservative strategy. Knowing whether or not their investment style matches your personal investing philosophy beforehand could potentially save you complications in the long run.
## **How to Find a Vetted Fiduciary Financial Advisor**
This is the biggest hurdle for many. With thousands of daily Google searches for "Fiduciary financial advisors near me," "best fiduciary financial advisor," and "financial investment advisors near me," the hunt for a vetted fiduciary advisor can feel like a wild goose chase. But it doesn't have to be. And thankfully, it really isn't. Our [free matching quiz](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5hr8tp9a3fvj6u8fib02bkgvug86ubksecrvvdg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs) links Americans with up to three fiduciary financial advisors who serve their area so they can evaluate and choose the one who fits their needs. Advisors are rigorously vetted through our proprietary due diligence process and legally committed to acting in your best interest. It's never too late to work towards the path of financial freedom.
## [Get your financial advisor matches today »](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf2ck2nool1cl95ch3h36gnls6puldtloo1m2o58_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs)
###
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu2ab7jcv4mgt00k4lcakl85ukv3iurrrl0v61vo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs "Get Started")
---
|
---
| | | The information contained in this article is general and not specific to any individual's situation. This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Planning and Progress", Northwestern Mutual (2022)](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z2dpgioadmn69ugbrv2m8lvvp4svat6pfdhvlbk0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs)
2. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb9tesqbhsqvbj5mc51hl38i3mu6vhse40gh7rk8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zdp6fq7v0us4p9qb2ecl7s8negi6caiih8fehf58_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34c3h2bs).

Advisors who cater to high-net-worth clients may calculate their fees based on a percentage of the assets under management. 5\. What’s Your Investment Approach? You should also consider asking prospective advisors about their investing approach. If you’re not comfortable taking on a lot of risk, you could consider a financial advisor who advocates a more conservative strategy. Knowing whether or not their investment style matches your personal investing philosophy beforehand could potentially save you complications in the long run. How to Find a Vetted Fiduciary Financial Advisor This is the biggest hurdle for many. With thousands of daily Google searches for "Fiduciary financial advisors near me," "best fiduciary financial advisor," and "financial investment advisors near me," the hunt for a vetted fiduciary advisor can feel like a wild goose chase. But it doesn't have to be. And thankfully, it really isn't. name: 1600 Daily
subject: FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator
body:
Demand Is Surging – 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znsd5pgpt72afipun3ie3l0ku116ojskna9d0as0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34cjh2bs) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zdui98sr0uekhtfd7mfde8683jedgho4v9rkilp8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34cjh2bs) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zmte0aferqo8ka3kb5s2tqvlg1krfv42ntf9blb8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34cjh2bs). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkfe2h7ehpv3fje0r1befs62bptmd73mg8edbp5o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34cjh2bs)
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlmb84k051pf63h456a8aopdq4psjk8jinp35ij0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj0cpim0oj246h22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34cjh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbncmdbgrm6bgmtkekqns2e94pek4luteo02pgo0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o34cjh2bs)_

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Would you want to be flown out to Alabama?
body:
I want you to join me.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685624%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=36peeHC8VrpkXJAEonFBmw&sysid=1)
---

Friend, would you want to be flown out to the fourth presidential debate?

As one of my supporters, I wanted to reach out and make sure you had a chance to enter the RNC’s debate contest!

**[All you have to do is send in a donation of any amount today and you will be entered for a chance to win:](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685635%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=y3lMZ8basr0QZKhhF2cOKg&sysid=1 "All you have to do is send
in a donation of any amount today and you will be entered for a chance to
win:")**

→ TWO free tickets to the fourth presidential debate.
→ Airfare for two.
→ Hotel accommodations.

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685624%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=36peeHC8VrpkXJAEonFBmw&sysid=1)

---

I would love for you to witness the fourth presidential debate in person, take part in history, and make memories that will last a lifetime.

**[I’m urging you to take advantage of this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Be sure to enter the contest before it closes.](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685637%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6xgazNO4FPaH3%2b4IV4TAhQ&sysid=1 "I’m urging you to take
advantage of this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Be sure to enter the contest
before it closes. ")**

Thank you so much for your support. I hope to see you there!

---
My very best,

---
---
| | **More About Nikki Haley**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685630%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=byTMUhUlwp%2fQ5R8BvrKaYg&sysid=1 "NikkiHaley_Podium")
---
My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States.

I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A.

I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I’m running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor”** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. **And I’ll do it as your next President. **

As President, I’ll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington’s spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America’s future.

**[Will you join me today and help me save our country?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685631%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cr3wQmEwNWY4hTqnOxcQkA&sysid=1 "Will you join me today and
help me save our country?")**

---

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join Thousands in Defense of Religious Liberty
body:
Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

|
---
| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9cpdoa9bra6btj8ogll1ugiiisshr5k81dbrn1o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32c1h2bs)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I write to you today with a sense of urgency because our nation's core values of faith, liberty, community, and life are under threat.

There have been countless stories recently that have raised my concerns about the ability to live out my faith in a public setting. [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zpo7ksm1omk7n2p3lcr3iiv9atpvumcn0shsm6lo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32c1h2bs) For example, a high school football coach lost his job for the simple act of praying on the field, and a Colorado baker who faced repeated legal battles for refusing to compromise his religious beliefs. These cases are just the tip of the iceberg, highlighting a growing trend of legal persecution against those who wish to live according to their faith.

[**It's becoming increasingly challenging for Americans to freely live out their faith, and I believe it's time for us to make our voices heard.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhs7dgu1sc459moibs93krkpa1j7eg8m6g97v2a8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32c1h2bs)

But here's the good news: Thousands of like-minded Americans have already joined us in this critical fight to safeguard religious freedom in America. They've voiced their concerns, shared their experiences, and taken a quick 2-minute survey on religious liberty in our country.

Now, I need you to add your voice to this growing chorus of defenders of faith and freedom. By participating in this survey, you're not just one among many--you're part of a movement, a powerful force united in our commitment to preserve the foundations of our great nation.

You can take the survey now using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6rhq6kepq0e9u8tcs6fhipeec4u8ip3stkqeva8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32c1h2bs)

Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

[Will you join the **thousands** who have already completed the survey and help us strengthen our collective voice?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znh081g35panasi2h7k7foh7kdp1vb2u29edkbv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g60o32c1h2bs)

In unity, we become an unstoppable force in upholding the freedoms that define America.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---

---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.

Dear Fellow Believer,

I’m sure I’m not only speaking for myself when I say that sometimes it’s easy to forget to pray –– especially for those we don’t see on a daily basis.

In fact, praying for the lost across the globe can sometimes be overwhelming. Where do we start?

That’s why I’m excited to introduce you to our latest resource: "Impacting Lostness Through Prayer Calendar" –– an 18-month prayer calendar crafted to empower you to pray for the least reached across the globe.

This calendar isn't just a piece of paper; it's a remarkable tool that:
* Enables you to impact the lives of individuals and communities who are in need of hearing the life-changing gospel;
* Allows you to develop a greater sense of empathy and humility for those who are lost;
* Structures a disciplined habit of prayer that can extend throughout a lifetime!

[ ](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzMwLTJhZGQyMWZmYjM2NDRkYTViMzM0NzJkZmMyOWVhMjlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjEiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5ZXJjYWxlbmRhcjIzLmh0bWw_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByYXllcmNhbGVuZGFyMjMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFX0ZBTFI0NDQ0MyJ9/Ckz0ch_IscQ01pLAY21OTA) Through this calendar, you'll receive a prayer prompt each month, guiding your prayers for those longing to hear the message of hope and salvation.

To receive your free copy of this powerful prayer tool, simply click on the link below to request it. We'll take care of the rest and mail the calendar to your doorstep.

Click on this link to secure your copy: [https://welcome.imb.org/prayercalendar23.html](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/c/7/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMzMwLTJhZGQyMWZmYjM2NDRkYTViMzM0NzJkZmMyOWVhMjlkIiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjIiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3dlbGNvbWUuaW1iLm9yZy9wcmF5ZXJjYWxlbmRhcjIzLmh0bWw_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXByYXllcmNhbGVuZGFyMjMmdXRtX3NvdXJjZT1wcm9zcGVjdGluZyZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PWltYWdlX0FFX0ZBTFI0NDQ0MyJ9/teALbJiCyg9dfMujP4jbHg)

Thank you for partnering with us in this essential mission of spreading hope and love to those who need it the most. Your involvement is crucial in making a lasting impact on lostness through prayer.

With heartfelt gratitude,

Emily Hall
