name: SmartAsset
subject: 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor
body:
5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor

*|MC_PREVIEW_TEXT|* | | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z65ucqnkucqpf73jcivstlde0hs949g5vbq2k7hg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs)
---
|
## 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor
---
| The questions you ask can help ensure you find the financial advice to help you plan to achieve your goals.
---
| [Take Retirement Quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z74sarp9glgg3vuf15ku67hb6ant7lqu387rkis0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs "Take Retirement Quiz")
---
| _Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free!_
---
| | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2ih8cokjcdqhv21q9j6kq4niml1u20rphomtpt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs)
---
|
---
| Whether you’re saving for retirement, considering major purchases, planning your estate, or just want a second set of eyes on your investments, hiring a financial advisor who you feel best suits your needs could be key. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person. While advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people who [work with a financial advisor](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3n8l5gdaf4gd9361fajkfuh8hbp6as2eskc4cd0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs) feel more at ease about their finances and could potentially end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Whatever your reasons for seeking financial advice, it’s important to have a list of questions planned to ensure you’re hiring a financial advisor who can help you plan to reach your goals.
### **5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor**
**1\. Are You a Fiduciary?** Fiduciaries are financial advisors with a legal obligation to prioritize your interests as they manage your assets or money. Unlike a broker who may push you into insurance policies or investments to rack up fees and commissions, fiduciaries are bound to recommend options that benefit you, the customer. While conflicts of interest can still exist, any potential conflicts of interest must be disclosed. SmartAsset's [free tool](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmmulgievi4ihh9tne1gag8mlmqlggt1t6euetig_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs) will only match you with vetted fiduciary advisors. **2\. How Much Experience Do You Have?** In addition to asking about their professional certification, it can also be a good idea to ask a prospective financial advisor about their overall experience. Generally, the more experience they have the better, especially if your financial situation is complicated. You should consider asking about their education, previous employers and track record of success. You might also want to consider performing a background check to find out whether they’ve ever been convicted of a crime or been involved in a criminal investigation by a regulatory or trade group. Don’t be afraid to ask for references from current or previous clients, and be wary of a financial advisor who seems reluctant to provide this information. **3\. What Type of Services Do You Offer?** Some financial advisors offer a range of services, while others specialize in niche aspects of financial management. For example, some advisors may only handle investments, while others take a more comprehensive approach, including retirement, estate planning and tax planning, along with other services. Ideally, you should look for an advisor whose range of services most closely fit your current and future needs. It’s also helpful to ask whether they specialize in a specific type of client. Some financial advisors may cater to retirees while others may prefer to work with families or divorcees. Some advisors cater to high-net-worth clients. [Choosing an advisor](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuad4837vvclubj8go5sro6137n48egs1laohpfo_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs) who works exclusively with clients whose situations are similar to yours means they could be better equipped to offer the type of guidance and advice you may be seeking. **4\. What’s Your Fee Structure?** Before you sign on the dotted line, you need to know how much your prospective financial planner will charge for their services. Depending on the type of professional you’re working with, they may receive a flat or hourly fee, be paid on commissions, or a combination of both. Fee-based advisers, for example, charge an up-front fee, but may also get a commission for selling financial products. Fee-only advisors make money from the fees they charge their clients. Some fee-only advisors charge a flat rate while others charge by the hour. Advisors who cater to high-net-worth clients may calculate their fees based on a percentage of the assets under management. **5\. What’s Your Investment Approach?** You should also consider asking prospective advisors about their investing approach. If you’re not comfortable taking on a lot of risk, you could consider a financial advisor who advocates a more conservative strategy. Knowing whether or not their investment style matches your personal investing philosophy beforehand could potentially save you complications in the long run.
## **How to Find a Vetted Fiduciary Financial Advisor**
This is the biggest hurdle for many. With thousands of daily Google searches for "Fiduciary financial advisors near me," "best fiduciary financial advisor," and "financial investment advisors near me," the hunt for a vetted fiduciary advisor can feel like a wild goose chase. But it doesn't have to be. And thankfully, it really isn't. Our [free matching quiz](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z238ac7a7m7vhbsir897rlu6476pnlubb0pf9v6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs) links Americans with up to three fiduciary financial advisors who serve their area so they can evaluate and choose the one who fits their needs. Advisors are rigorously vetted through our proprietary due diligence process and legally committed to acting in your best interest. It's never too late to work towards the path of financial freedom.
## [Get your financial advisor matches today »](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg9i2ca67cfe0ek5rsditq5dll04b5f0tv9nvc2o_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs)
###
---
|
---
| **Try SmartAsset's Financial Advisor Matching Tool**
Get retirement ready. Take this no-cost quiz to get matched with up to 3 vetted financial advisors serving your area.
---
| [Get Started](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9gmi4g0kfpg3n5epqetn4ed8n2lfqhjibla3gkg_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs "Get Started")
---
|
---
| | | The information contained in this article is general and not specific to any individual's situation. This is not an offer to buy or sell any security or interest. All investing involves risk, including loss of principal. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset Advisors, LLC ("SmartAsset"), a wholly owned subsidiary of Financial Insight Technology, is registered with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission as an investment adviser. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). SmartAsset is not a financial planner, broker or tax adviser. The Service is intended only to assist you in your understanding of financial organization and decision-making and is broad in scope. Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. Accordingly, before making any final decisions or implementing any financial strategy, you should consider obtaining additional information and advice from your accountant or other financial advisers who are fully aware of your individual circumstances. Sources:
1. ["Planning and Progress", Northwestern Mutual (2022)](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi0hpsmb3do5tgibdsa26dltreorq6sga4kh6ho0_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs)
2. ["Journal of Retirement Study Winter" (2020)](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpvt47f64fkkoc145ahuh8r1t5n5mnutj8j3pqao_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs). The projections or other information regarding the likelihood of various investment outcomes are hypothetical in nature, do not reflect actual investment results, and are not guarantees of your future results. Please follow the link to see the methodologies employed in the [Journal of Retirement study](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhvp5i87j0bnaq0i86sv47gu3cqrbcl9bq6qf4p8_rp22sh2s8i6eo34c1g6cor3c1h2bs).

clean_body: 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor |MCPREVIEWTEXT| | | | | | 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor | The questions you ask can help ensure you find the financial advice to help you plan to achieve your goals. | "Take Retirement Quiz" | Find up to three advisors that serve your area, free! | | | SPONSORED BY SMARTASSET | | | Whether you’re saving for retirement, considering major purchases, planning your estate, or just want a second set of eyes on your investments, hiring a financial advisor who you feel best suits your needs could be key. A 2022 Northwestern Mutual study found that 62% of U.S. adults admit their financial planning needs improvement. However, only 35% of Americans work with a financial advisor.1 The value of working with a financial advisor varies by person. While advisors are legally prohibited from promising returns, research suggests that people who feel more at ease about their finances and could potentially end up with about 15% more money to spend in retirement.2 Whatever your reasons for seeking financial advice, it’s important to have a list of questions planned to ensure you’re hiring a financial advisor who can help you plan to reach your goals. 5 Questions to Ask When Choosing a Financial Advisor 1\. Are You a Fiduciary? Fiduciaries are financial advisors with a legal obligation to prioritize your interests as they manage your assets or money. Unlike a broker who may push you into insurance policies or investments to rack up fees and commissions, fiduciaries are bound to recommend options that benefit you, the customer. While conflicts of interest can still exist, any potential conflicts of interest must be disclosed. SmartAsset's will only match you with vetted fiduciary advisors. 2\. How Much Experience Do You Have? In addition to asking about their professional certification, it can also be a good idea to ask a prospective financial advisor about their overall experience. Generally, the more experience they have the better, especially if your financial situation is complicated. You should consider asking about their education, previous employers and track record of success. You might also want to consider performing a background check to find out whether they’ve ever been convicted of a crime or been involved in a criminal investigation by a regulatory or trade group. Don’t be afraid to ask for references from current or previous clients, and be wary of a financial advisor who seems reluctant to provide this information. 3\. What Type of Services Do You Offer? Some financial advisors offer a range of services, while others specialize in niche aspects of financial management. For example, some advisors may only handle investments, while others take a more comprehensive approach, including retirement, estate planning and tax planning, along with other services. Ideally, you should look for an advisor whose range of services most closely fit your current and future needs. It’s also helpful to ask whether they specialize in a specific type of client. Some financial advisors may cater to retirees while others may prefer to work with families or divorcees. Some advisors cater to high-net-worth clients. who works exclusively with clients whose situations are similar to yours means they could be better equipped to offer the type of guidance and advice you may be seeking. 4\. What’s Your Fee Structure? Before you sign on the dotted line, you need to know how much your prospective financial planner will charge for their services. Depending on the type of professional you’re working with, they may receive a flat or hourly fee, be paid on commissions, or a combination of both. Fee-based advisers, for example, charge an up-front fee, but may also get a commission for selling financial products. Fee-only advisors make money from the fees they charge their clients. Some fee-only advisors charge a flat rate while others charge by the hour. Advisors who cater to high-net-worth clients may calculate their fees based on a percentage of the assets under management. 5\. What’s Your Investment Approach? You should also consider asking prospective advisors about their investing approach. If you’re not comfortable taking on a lot of risk, you could consider a financial advisor who advocates a more conservative strategy. Knowing whether or not their investment style matches your personal investing philosophy beforehand could potentially save you complications in the long run. How to Find a Vetted Fiduciary Financial Advisor This is the biggest hurdle for many. With thousands of daily Google searches for "Fiduciary financial advisors near me," "best fiduciary financial advisor," and "financial investment advisors near me," the hunt for a vetted fiduciary advisor can feel like a wild goose chase. But it doesn't have to be. And thankfully, it really isn't. Our links Americans with up to three fiduciary financial advisors who serve their area so they can evaluate and choose the one who fits their needs. Advisors are rigorously vetted through our proprietary due diligence process and legally committed to acting in your best interest. Working with an adviser may come with potential downsides such as payment of fees (which will reduce returns). There are no guarantees that working with an adviser will yield positive returns. The existence of a fiduciary duty does not prevent the rise of potential conflicts of interest. SmartAsset’s services are limited to referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States that have elected to participate in our matching platform based on information gathered from users through our online questionnaire. SmartAsset does not review the ongoing performance of any Adviser, participate in the management of any user’s account by an Adviser or provide advice regarding specific investments. We do not manage client funds or hold custody of assets, we help users connect with relevant financial advisors. SmartAsset.com is not intended to provide legal advice, tax advice, accounting advice or financial advice (Other than referring users to third party advisers registered or chartered as fiduciaries ("Adviser(s)") with a regulatory body in the United States). Your personal financial situation is unique, and any information and investing strategies obtained through SmartAsset.com may not be appropriate for your situation. But their actions tell a different story. ** They think our support for Israel should be tied to other wars and liberal causes. **Our support for Israel has no conditions.** These Democrats should **all** be ashamed of themselves. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Join Thousands in Defense of Religious Liberty
body:
American Cornerstone Institute
Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

|
---
| | | [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685754%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b05MmKlUYL7Y65O%2b7qoaUw&sysid=1)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I write to you today with a sense of urgency because our nation's core values of faith, liberty, community, and life are under threat.

There have been countless stories recently that have raised my concerns about the ability to live out my faith in a public setting. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685765%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mZ5lYSHCPTISboDQLxRRog&sysid=1) For example, a high school football coach lost his job for the simple act of praying on the field, and a Colorado baker who faced repeated legal battles for refusing to compromise his religious beliefs. These cases are just the tip of the iceberg, highlighting a growing trend of legal persecution against those who wish to live according to their faith.

[**It's becoming increasingly challenging for Americans to freely live out their faith, and I believe it's time for us to make our voices heard.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685766%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=efOOjOOHW551ifVisdOZ3w&sysid=1)

But here's the good news: Thousands of like-minded Americans have already joined us in this critical fight to safeguard religious freedom in America. They've voiced their concerns, shared their experiences, and taken a quick 2-minute survey on religious liberty in our country.

Now, I need you to add your voice to this growing chorus of defenders of faith and freedom. By participating in this survey, you're not just one among many--you're part of a movement, a powerful force united in our commitment to preserve the foundations of our great nation.

You can take the survey now using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685767%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=RsKJAH2g6G%2fB5S9bc1F4Tw&sysid=1)

Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

[Will you join the **thousands** who have already completed the survey and help us strengthen our collective voice?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685768%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5Y6ue3zJMPGEozqCwQHXEA&sysid=1)

In unity, we become an unstoppable force in upholding the freedoms that define America.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

President Joe Biden trails former President Donald Trump in multiple
polls and is hemorrhaging support in swing states and key voting
blocs, according to an analysis of polls by Politico. Biden’s support
among young voters has fallen to single digits in recent polls by
Quinnipiac, Fox News and Morning Consult, polls that show Trump
leading among all voters, Politico noted.

name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Be Part of the Movement For Religious Liberty
body:
Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
|
---
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zsdxcX9s5NVtnU-Hs29SNA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRc2UP0TFaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RU01X1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNiZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA0RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZV-SImNlRmWB5VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I write to you today with a sense of urgency because our nation's core values of faith, liberty, community, and life are under threat.

There have been countless stories recently that have raised my concerns about the ability to live out my faith in a public setting. [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zsdxcX9s5NVtnU-Hs29SNA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRc2UP0TFaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RU01X1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNiZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA0RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZV-SImNlRmWB5VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~) For example, a high school football coach lost his job for the simple act of praying on the field, and a Colorado baker who faced repeated legal battles for refusing to compromise his religious beliefs. These cases are just the tip of the iceberg, highlighting a growing trend of legal persecution against those who wish to live according to their faith.

[**It's becoming increasingly challenging for Americans to freely live out their faith, and I believe it's time for us to make our voices heard.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zsdxcX9s5NVtnU-Hs29SNA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRc2UP0TFaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RU01X1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNiZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA0RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZV-SImNlRmWB5VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

But here's the good news: Thousands of like-minded Americans have already joined us in this critical fight to safeguard religious freedom in America. They've voiced their concerns, shared their experiences, and taken a quick 2-minute survey on religious liberty in our country.

Now, I need you to add your voice to this growing chorus of defenders of faith and freedom. By participating in this survey, you're not just one among many--you're part of a movement, a powerful force united in our commitment to preserve the foundations of our great nation.

You can take the survey now using this secure link: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zsdxcX9s5NVtnU-Hs29SNA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRc2UP0TFaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RU01X1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNiZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA0RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZV-SImNlRmWB5VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

Your input matters. Together, we are making a difference.

[Will you join the **thousands** who have already completed the survey and help us strengthen our collective voice?](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/zsdxcX9s5NVtnU-Hs29SNA~~/AARclAA~/RgRnRc2UP0TFaHR0cHM6Ly9vZmZlcnMuYW1lcmljYW5jb3JuZXJzdG9uZS5vcmcvcmVsaWdpb3VzLWxpYmVydHktc3VydmV5Lz91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249cmVsaWdpb3VzbGliZXJ0eXN1cnZleSZ1dG1fc291cmNlPXByb3NwZWN0aW5nJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9RU01X1BBLVJPTi0yMDIzMTEyNiZzb3VyY2VfY29kZT1BQ0kyMzA0RVAwMDFXA3NwY0IKZV-SImNlRmWB5VIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAAAAAA~)

In unity, we become an unstoppable force in upholding the freedoms that define America.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder and Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Stop Republican attacks on endangered whale species
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell your Congressmembers to STOP Republican attacks on endangered whales![Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2143618?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ** Republicans in Congress have two critically endangered whale species in their crosshairs: the Gulf of Mexico Rice’s whale and the North Atlantic Right whale. **Both could be extinct in just a few years without protection.** Rice’s whale habitat in the Gulf of Mexico is consistently threatened with oil drilling by greedy fossil fuel companies. **Protections for these gentle giants would BLOCK oil and gas leases and reduce industry shipping traffic in the whale’s habitat** – which is part of why Republicans are opposing protections. Coastal communities understand the danger of offshore drilling. They’ve experienced oil spills before: destroyed beaches, dead wildlife washing onto shore, toxic pollution spiking serious health issues. Once a spill happens, nothing is ever the same. [**Please, Friend, tell your member of Congress to OPPOSE any attempts to weaken protections for endangered whales and fight offshore drilling!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2143619?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) ***2,171 more signatures needed*** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2143620?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Right whales in the North Atlantic are being **hit and killed** by ships. In fact, at least **16 whales have been struck by ships since 2017.** Others **die tangled in fishing gear.** Proposed speed limits on vessels could save many whales, but Republicans are trying to strip these protections too.
Fossil fuel profits are not more important than coastal communities or endangered species. You and I know that, but we need to make sure our laws do too.
[**Will you take just 30 seconds to help protect communities, whales, and our oceans from Republicans in Congress? Send your message now >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2143621?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2143620?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Hallie Templeton
Legal Director & Senior Campaigner,
Friends of the Earth**
|

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Tell your Congressmembers to STOP Republican attacks on endangered whales Republicans in Congress have two critically endangered whale species in their crosshairs: the Gulf of Mexico Rice’s whale and the North Atlantic Right whale. Both could be extinct in just a few years without protection. Rice’s whale habitat in the Gulf of Mexico is consistently threatened with oil drilling by greedy fossil fuel companies. Protections for these gentle giants would BLOCK oil and gas leases and reduce industry shipping traffic in the whale’s habitat – which is part of why Republicans are opposing protections. Coastal communities understand the danger of offshore drilling. They’ve experienced oil spills before: destroyed beaches, dead wildlife washing onto shore, toxic pollution spiking serious health issues. Once a spill happens, nothing is ever the same. == *2,171 more signatures needed | == Right whales in the North Atlantic are being hit and killed by ships. In fact, at least 16 whales have been struck by ships since 2017. Others die tangled in fishing gear. Proposed speed limits on vessels could save many whales, but Republicans are trying to strip these protections too. Fossil fuel profits are not more important than coastal communities or endangered species. You and I know that, but we need to make sure our laws do too. == == Standing with you, Hallie Templeton Legal Director & Senior Campaigner, Friends of the Earth** | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

body:
Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a2731e7affb41c88e2ed9f66fa963b5&_e=JMqdgn2ld0iQl6PerfPstuIiCd_Ebf32ODPSKSJSss_Vw6U1r6ZAlf1DojIXnGSX7ca1w03VuJxVCHx8bmH3828nZ7fS_lulmqlW2bbqBhYU8KYlywjH_jM6m0NI-MFMDDzh4kNZgR1fWPZ5A-T5gKVLI3s3QB0IaJOYaQcsYRvSiMJ4M0V4xV5jX3XOHt_E6ezmPMyMd6iY29PCNce7ZE_lhOvT2hXGLsv2jLYpzPoXVvAv9JA6RnjGouqRJcofHpmdQ1hl1cQFJemhIJ96zScl_F5lTZM4gPhE1S1qsjHJsCC-w3-o21yxNPfcmhQ0) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a2731e7affb41c88e2ed9f66fa963b5&_e=JMqdgn2ld0iQl6PerfPstuIiCd_Ebf32ODPSKSJSss_Vw6U1r6ZAlf1DojIXnGSX7ca1w03VuJxVCHx8bmH3828nZ7fS_lulmqlW2bbqBhYU8KYlywjH_jM6m0NI-MFMDDzh4kNZgR1fWPZ5A-T5gP72p8IxuLbFT7tzU6i1BFF9l6GjkbtuDH-Q8ntHWCh59cn1eOyHSl4IGHsXcbsAZ-mwC3yYq_-TWW7vh4N3_th-4h1Bo9FrpeoSBG0cb6CkqWcrklbbFGTeJjNVasZPwwkMwzMksfD3B75R0SLkP17pzXuKSDw8rcnE_k7ltsLi) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a2731e7affb41c88e2ed9f66fa963b5&_e=JMqdgn2ld0iQl6PerfPstuIiCd_Ebf32ODPSKSJSss_Vw6U1r6ZAlf1DojIXnGSX7ca1w03VuJxVCHx8bmH3828nZ7fS_lulmqlW2bbqBhYU8KYlywjH_jM6m0NI-MFMDDzh4kNZgR1fWPZ5A-T5gGIFrHns4BIp-bxVPwsrVpIGGjStTe55CbBNBT9dm_FLwssRfxUTCZVoJhQpbbQbedRE2yoXb-5PYP-dyv3D5u_P9xCHPMnWV2Qqb2jqorA5ZDZndHOZ1t25jHJyp3nfWrNknUztus_B8Njiqs_CcVsVqh4_UP6fA2hW-53dPgfS). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=4a2731e7affb41c88e2ed9f66fa963b5&_e=JMqdgn2ld0iQl6PerfPstuIiCd_Ebf32ODPSKSJSss_Vw6U1r6ZAlf1DojIXnGSX7ca1w03VuJxVCHx8bmH3828nZ7fS_lulmqlW2bbqBhYU8KYlywjH_jM6m0NI-MFMDDzh4kNZgR1fWPZ5A-T5gKA2hdQvTDf6is-EKzP2Ck4ospSBORfZffZrFEqeWU-orpFqS-fiialxQ29fnhg6w3f6Cdh1wt7F3ZMD-1PxFrEf2g_2rREQVoY7oE4HCw0nkgRhrL_FIozo61knh67-21gVX-JzJUijnJek4f5Bs4L8JsRt88pHm89pQRN476Pb)

FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. But that's not why this generator is going viral... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s an honor
body:
I want to make myself crystal clear: I work for you, the American People.

| |
---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

**It is an honor to be your Speaker of the U.S. House of Representatives.**

I want to make myself crystal clear from day one:

**[I work for you, the American People.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=142bde0d7ad0438c92856b6a8670f0c3&_e=S9G5wFbmEGtsIsoWHjSMx6ztIl5qfnAdWNcBcLsuhOpZQ5X7Jc0umnDTZ-fB83eOC80fCChB4cpriq96b6oU80YoHvr0-_O54zE2eLMVRm7NDoBXzvUAwrr0eVD-FNpFybmVFk0L_HgxwCuI4a7f_l4wTzIZ-y7-ZaiXU5ihReroNH7zUOVsYjDKYyw6vHcddt8AdrDQ9RduFBrlTGZB-5T-teBfx1mcCpFqnoTDoNW6eT9XmiPrWePMC-t5Aorkz0fXH00vsJNzz14C8mfn3Su4xNPRbJM90UGiAwwLluSAvnqt2nrXMEoY9Ee7jXzPMjh8uf6jmAVbYQ-oosn2fHpJgTHg6zASZymnHtRWllFXWxBBjmo-mwnMvAPHuTexfmYdV6bH1iOtdrFmYmaEK9kLh4D32eqGhDCq-pmkUCExb7T8N5jnU8AimIo0MxfePg35uHcoAa9d8MaN8jZHHw%3D%3D "I work for you, the American People.")**

My first order of business is speaking with YOU. I want to know about your priorities as we close out the year and what you'd like to see us do next. Working together is our best chance to defeat the Radical Left.

I just launched my **[NEW SPEAKER SURVEY](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=142bde0d7ad0438c92856b6a8670f0c3&_e=S9G5wFbmEGtsIsoWHjSMx6ztIl5qfnAdWNcBcLsuhOpZQ5X7Jc0umnDTZ-fB83eOC80fCChB4cpriq96b6oU80YoHvr0-_O54zE2eLMVRm7NDoBXzvUAwrr0eVD-FNpFybmVFk0L_HgxwCuI4a7f_l4wTzIZ-y7-ZaiXU5ihReroNH7zUOVsYjDKYyw6vHcddt8AdrDQ9RduFBrlTGZB-5T-teBfx1mcCpFqnoTDoNW6eT9XmiPrWePMC-t5Aorkz0fXH00vsJNzz14C8mfn3Su4xNPRbJM90UGiAwwLluSAvnqt2nrXMEoY9Ee7jXzPcF31jiPAOZIn9BryF8sgUR-rCh2F8wg5anhEXZ2hlMafpOF-COXXQDk7GUjuSedVuFeOFqD8vFrJUayqY6OUW3ivmgu7k8mlb8MBxU3rSkMQicn_zg7kebOZzr8o4bzvNXDAsLx37whYHiMUMwX79Q%3D%3D "NEW SPEAKER SURVEY")** - this gives you a chance to communicate directly with me. I'm humbly asking you to provide any feedback you'd be willing to share. This is very important to me.

_The only thing I ask is for you to respond as soon as you get this. I know you 're busy... but things are changing by the minute so I'd like your feedback right away. _
---
**[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=142bde0d7ad0438c92856b6a8670f0c3&_e=S9G5wFbmEGtsIsoWHjSMx6ztIl5qfnAdWNcBcLsuhOpZQ5X7Jc0umnDTZ-fB83eOC80fCChB4cpriq96b6oU80YoHvr0-_O54zE2eLMVRm7NDoBXzvUAwrr0eVD-FNpFybmVFk0L_HgxwCuI4a7f_l4wTzIZ-y7-ZaiXU5ihReroNH7zUOVsYjDKYyw6vHcddt8AdrDQ9RduFBrlTGZB-5T-teBfx1mcCpFqnoTDoNW6eT9XmiPrWePMC-t5Aorkz0fXH00vsJNzz14C8mfn3Su4xNPRbJM90UGiAwwLluSAvnqt2nrXMEoY9Ee7jXzPS8rxAluC7r7a-GgAArwrvvcOxIhq30t1HPlVTPGUsEWc-m8q4Nnnlv_TXRwX-R1wtX97vaNQqLL_aQEdchFgNpMUom9ng65ZG1Gi6x_7SwtWQ9_9CGsG9K-zs4-xrMyQtoqGTnqy4p3Ua4-1bv237g%3D%3D)[**TAKE MY NEW SPEAKER SURVEY**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=142bde0d7ad0438c92856b6a8670f0c3&_e=S9G5wFbmEGtsIsoWHjSMx6ztIl5qfnAdWNcBcLsuhOpZQ5X7Jc0umnDTZ-fB83eOC80fCChB4cpriq96b6oU80YoHvr0-_O54zE2eLMVRm7NDoBXzvUAwrr0eVD-FNpFybmVFk0L_HgxwCuI4a7f_l4wTzIZ-y7-ZaiXU5ihReroNH7zUOVsYjDKYyw6vHcddt8AdrDQ9RduFBrlTGZB-5T-teBfx1mcCpFqnoTDoNW6eT9XmiPrWePMC-t5Aorkz0fXH00vsJNzz14C8mfn3Su4xNPRbJM90UGiAwwLluSAvnqt2nrXMEoY9Ee7jXzPiSD5EBSNiehEjBWxL8ipddFOFSxtgJQ7IEU09vyrgwHF4pdHIZ2FzC-MswDD8Hq_tFc8-abYvO4ZsxXPLuYORzTMAqNjEz9o4tg8dRXPyrVRQepDg9yDtx1hhPBD8jGgIAf4F_-9Fpf5oBe3q5uABA%3D%3D) _**

I will be blunt with you.

The challenges facing our country will take courage and determination to overcome. Not just from me, but from you too. This will not be easy. We need your best effort and giving up is simply NOT an option - not if we want to save this great country.

The power to bring our country roaring back is in your hands. We just have to rise to the occasion - and that starts with having an open and honest dialogue. Don't spare my feelings. Be honest. I want to know exactly how you feel.

**[That's why I respectfully ask you for a few minutes to guide your House Majority where YOU want it to go.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=142bde0d7ad0438c92856b6a8670f0c3&_e=S9G5wFbmEGtsIsoWHjSMx6ztIl5qfnAdWNcBcLsuhOpZQ5X7Jc0umnDTZ-fB83eOC80fCChB4cpriq96b6oU80YoHvr0-_O54zE2eLMVRm7NDoBXzvUAwrr0eVD-FNpFybmVFk0L_HgxwCuI4a7f_l4wTzIZ-y7-ZaiXU5ihReroNH7zUOVsYjDKYyw6vHcddt8AdrDQ9RduFBrlTGZB-5T-teBfx1mcCpFqnoTDoNW6eT9XmiPrWePMC-t5Aorkz0fXH00vsJNzz14C8mfn3Su4xNPRbJM90UGiAwwLluSAvnqt2nrXMEoY9Ee7jXzPYjNNwhV0HkFMHgTnr-BW3a1nUUbCvr3zl8LVviP8fwBqQCG5ViTlIK4Lzh1OkB9P37i1J6Wx4arvN042Ak5nmNsCNyl3SZ4SOZDDxCTSq_48UN3Fbzks2LBw1ML_ip2dbZUBOdw0bt-Z84JCVlQdHg%3D%3D "That’s why I respectfully ask you for a few minutes to guide your House Majority where YOU want it to go.")**

More from me soon,

**Mike Johnson**
Speaker of the House

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=687002c1b90e4915ac868a93a57f09b1&_e=V69LgO6cOpcdNQxNBVMwH13VqIURZjY8noHPMBX3spERT79T1AJTpZN9jjMBfTShm-_ad2VMjWGC970xLIkkRnBLZoUpu21Jt6ks0LSwYtl5Y9B40uiBO_p_GimLHjjPCKqpRNo3atN6R6uN35sU0jkCdVP5TyOQu0UQx1D1ux8BfS9PJFjsQZL0QwxjSskQSXNMJOSJcImni6A5LdIEWOy2STbGBy5Jz4hHFmVTRxZIaqTutSLLh_eb1hcUvRI0 "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=687002c1b90e4915ac868a93a57f09b1&_e=V69LgO6cOpcdNQxNBVMwH13VqIURZjY8noHPMBX3spERT79T1AJTpZN9jjMBfTShm-_ad2VMjWGC970xLIkkRnBLZoUpu21Jt6ks0LSwYtkjMq_cHjG6xvntxCJaGy8OfpzWktTg5WAFGqH_JfbHhWx8V0hIfw783G7f82_r5MTGluVAt2BJDO4Wa18uIcmv2g2MCe889pv-0WLxB-Rmf-4iJ0x4P6LBTIdIvmru6DZ-mFsU1UkBtbaKsvBpcv7Z)[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=687002c1b90e4915ac868a93a57f09b1&_e=V69LgO6cOpcdNQxNBVMwH13VqIURZjY8noHPMBX3spERT79T1AJTpZN9jjMBfTShm-_ad2VMjWGC970xLIkkRnBLZoUpu21Jt6ks0LSwYtkJLuOKKb6j1z0WnNAPdJAKwwGjOE-aoMlhFCy5eITnxIeEFCpgNi7OKJQWZoNqq6Xj-wzH-5_3DHW9m7nZcBEHfUoGoJ63Urt8TVZ8KNzVIga8Qb45m8FoH1gsvnhOFg_wDQj1RRRX7prkj1Qg_Nps)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: This judge is ensuring that President Trump does not receive a fair trial.
body:
Judge Engoron must be removed from Trump's case in NY if we want justice to be upheld...

| Friend, I am urgently reaching out to my top supporters to update you on the status of the politically motivated show trial against President Trump in New York. Despite the best efforts of Radical Leftists like AG Letitia James and Judge Arthur Engoron we have been able to expose their corruption and push back against their biased miscarriage of justice at every turn. **We put a spotlight on this case when I filed my original ethics complaint against Judge Engoron,_which many of my supporters had co-signed_ , and a New York appellate court overturned the blatantly unconstitutional gag order placed on President Trump and his team!** **But extremists like Judge Engoron are determined to make sure President Trump does not receive a fair trial.** **And this radically biased judge proved that yet again when he hit back at President Trump and his team by wrongfully dismissing a motion for mistrial.** It is clear that the Leftist cabal persecuting America First conservatives like President Trump are lashing out because their strategy of lawfare is failing which is why it is now more important than ever to hold the line and send a message that the American people will not tolerate this judicial corruption. **That 's why I have revised my ethics complaint to remove Judge Arthur Engoron from Trump's case in New York in order to highlight his egregious denial of a mistrial.** [**Friend, stand with us by co-signing my revised ethics complaint.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34113a3e7bad43d79ae920fcdc4b0fd1&_e=h_ENxBLn-YjHSXhqvDmtdsaoENJckzjIh4Iu6KSJatiEN1oexZvahWooVBlHbwUr8OELA1lw9YatCKd2RFw7kzCDGQq2UQc3JeBJ3gAl8_PH3n8sWBVCXLuqH-sbV_Ix3iuAItvs5luPqZlKytlIjXaLUIcaWv8CH1_-dIuh3ogeZNJX7LFYYn-Q7MXAYsoJbcDUofyEgurJ860a2RPN6HJpGXTpeJuxf-qUKij9_a7YPL3qplIWcyGBxb3srfcDo-g47khE70BJ-UNNMzMMFA606HwhhzhGYLSgtOOI_D8NRWWEGGgZEnn9SHY-hJnM_Rcp1IKmncbY32lYPfPwvw%3D%3D)

#### [**How ranked choice voting upended the Boulder mayor's race**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65636f600fd2e116d3425fe4&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.axios.com%2Flocal%2Fdenver%2F2023%2F11%2F09%2Fboulder-mayor-race-ranked-choice-voting-election&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65636e7be0b95e438bed329d&l=en-US&s=MA7z4vCVecAavBF7h2ghV0iugJs%3D)
---
In the recent Boulder city election, Bob Yates, a former Republican who became unaffiliated in May 2022, initially led in the mayoral race. However, the introduction of ranked choice voting shifted the results. Incumbent Mayor Aaron Brockett, a liberal Democrat, overtook Yates with a lead of 497 votes and is expected to win. This shift is attributed to the second-choice votes from Nicole Speer's supporters, who finished third. Speer was endorsed by the local Democratic Socialists of America chapter. This election demonstrated the significant impact of ranked choice voting, which pushed Boulder's municipal politics further to the left. Yates, known for his limits on development and growth, had previously won more votes in the 2015 and 2019 council elections than Brockett. Brockett acknowledged that ranked choice voting was a key factor in his likely victory, differentiating it from a plurality winner system.
---
#### **RCV Overview**
Ranked Choice Voting (RCV) leads to confusion, disenfranchisement, and unfairly benefits left-wing candidates. It uses examples from various elections in the U.S. to argue against RCV.RCV as a Means to Left-Wing Power\- Instances where RCV affected election outcomes are highlighted, such as in Boulder, Colorado, where it helped a center-left candidate win.\- RCV is accused of leading to chaos, as seen in New York City’s 2021 election.RCV's Implementation Issues\- Errors and confusion in RCV implementation are cited, with examples like the Oakland School Board and Alameda County elections.\- Utah’s pilot program is mentioned as an example of RCV not delivering promised benefits.Reports and Studies on RCV\- A University of Minnesota report is referenced, claiming RCV fails to meet its proponents' promises.\- The report notes no significant change in voter turnout or diversity in elected officials with RCV.Voter Confusion and Disenfranchisement\- Examples from Oakland and Arlington, Virginia illustrate voter confusion and potential disenfranchisement.\- Low voter turnout, particularly among minority groups, is highlighted in Alaska’s 2022 general election.Opposition to RCV\- The D.C. Democrat party's rejection of RCV over concerns of disenfranchising minority voters is mentioned.\- Legal challenges to RCV are noted, arguing that it violates constitutional rights.Transparency and Majority Issues\- RCV is criticized for reducing transparency and complicating recounts.\- The concept of “ballot exhaustion” can prevent a true majority win.Specific Election Cases\- The role of RCV in Alaska and Maine elections is discussed, with emphasis on how it can alter expected outcomes.\- Cases where RCV led to unexpected winners are highlighted, questioning its effectiveness in reflecting majority preference. Overall, the text argues that RCV complicates the voting process, undermines traditional majority rule, and often benefits specific political groups at the expense of voter clarity and fairness.
---

### [**Read The Article On The Watchman**](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=65636f600fd2e116d3425fe4&u=https%3A%2F%2Falaskawatchman.com%2F2023%2F10%2F13%2Fpro-ranked-choice-voting-group-hit-with-elections-complaint-from-leader-of-repeal-effort%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_65636e7be0b95e438bed329d&l=en-US&s=vjsGyaBae6AISK5CzbRufJQN0pA%3D)
---
#### **PSA:**
#### **We submitted a formal complaint to APOC (Alaska Political Office Commission) concerning the actions of the Pro-RCV group in Alaska. While they have accused us of breaching various State Campaign Finance Laws, we assert that this group should also adhere to the same rules and regulations. Contrary to their portrayal, this organization is not grassroots and receives substantial funding from outside of Alaska. Our objective is to hold them responsible for their apparent hypocrisy and their attempts to intimidate and tarnish the image of Alaskans, their organizations, and families. Their efforts to suppress our movement against ranked choice voting should not go unnoticed, and they must answer for potentially breaking the same laws they accuse us of. It's concerning that these well-informed political activists, who have benefited from massive out-of-state donations for their ranked choice voting agenda and campaign finance law changes, manipulate the system to their advantage, expecting regular citizens to falter and then overwhelm them with financial and legal burdens. We trust that the State of Alaska will ensure that these laws are applied uniformly, calling this Pro-RCV group to account for any disregard of Alaskan laws and norms.**
#### **Please see the full 111 page complaint when it is made public by the news and APOC. All of this information is public information.**
---

Quinnipiac, Fox News and Morning Consult, polls that show Trump
leading among all voters, Politico noted. [...]

Friend, would you want to be flown out to the fourth presidential debate?

As one of my supporters, I wanted to reach out and make sure you had a chance to enter the RNC's debate contest!

**[All you have to do is send in a donation of any amount today and you will be entered for a chance to win:](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=fb81fbd50c9d4badac9edc687dc3858e&_e=8Bm6AC3GEMNSVEL96tcUFrFZOvRUNrlLlCcSM1BjFejgWrx1Wf8dRgSZWV4T8sBaabvuKOhBe984d5BuRW_mW5_B_ccb9_C4dxom4_2ODJyIPUNiufGDfKHNFUa2DZ0zlnKs_e3Zgk4ng0Ep3d7LA6y6Gvwy4o3ydGd0TXJknhP36athxIFrPORthU7I5Ko5wt-dAjN-Fr33CRpGFjuIHS4AUoLD4J_9Eb-QRkBbaOYOvZh2DSeg0PRFViVN4s6DgBYpzK9qYuFiiATIPoK62JoEm-ov8se6u5yUWmTH5GuPIm0J2pcXS9Um5VBfxwKuM8xtPq0-jjQH0N_prPFzdZOyME6MNYPSwIJEj1NmVrh4_Yjo7iI8MFoBmjJkBuHEGEecMVCFbdg_hkTGCFxhb3uuAfsQbvsAziANkIIsgGBJScn4OS77c9oQX4r3LeVGHKXWjKlegnuktuk_F6gJGmYvHYbU9BHlpBL4zbj6A9opKI1JZGnFFjmTezfWTjmAPOjhcZA5l1tAZuAnOYNCwjbNlrYjOinq1S3GG3rpVZAkZlqp4pps9nNeUtE8sgtRGO6DNAAJFkr6fkdDvuukqe4dhqf66Rv9uyPowOphz0C3pkr0fJIbO9wATJnnqw5richdGVYii34CURvrW-C4FX4rEkxASVhtBOLoWGen-do%3D "All you have to do is send in a donation of any amount today and you will be entered for a chance to win:")**

-> TWO free tickets to the fourth presidential debate.
-> Airfare for two.

My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States.

I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again.

I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country.

I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A.

I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer.

_**I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! **_

I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better.

**As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor"** because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery.

**At the UN I fought for America,** made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names.

I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. **And I 'll do it as your next President. **

As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future.

clean_body: I want you to join me. | | | | | | Friend, would you want to be flown out to the fourth presidential debate? As one of my supporters, I wanted to reach out and make sure you had a chance to enter the RNC's debate contest! "All you have to do is send in a donation of any amount today and you will be entered for a chance to win:" -> TWO free tickets to the fourth presidential debate. -> Airfare for two. -> Hotel accommodations. | | | I would love for you to witness the fourth presidential debate in person, take part in history, and make memories that will last a lifetime. "I’m urging you to take advantage of this once-in-a-lifetime opportunity. Be sure to enter the contest before it closes. " Thank you so much for your support. I hope to see you there! My very best, | Nikki Haley | | | | | | | | "NikkiHaleyMerch" | | "Claim Your Mug" | | More About Nikki Haley | "NikkiHaleyPodium" My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I'm running for President of the United States. I'm running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago - an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I'm running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something - that we do love this country. I'm running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I'm doing this for my son who's a senior in college and shouldn't have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn't believe in just to get an A. I'm running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I 'm running for President because we have a country to save! I've seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden's leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a "jobs governor" because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I've done it before. And I 'll do it as your next President. As President, I'll revitalize our economy, support small businesses, stop Washington's spending sprees, protect our border, champion school choice, and save America's future. "Will you join me today and help me save our country?" | | "DONATE" NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. body:

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a5357adf75e45ffa3ce0323cf35e4f2&_e=hbDFRN4IYujJHMRRbsk5sQvnSciONO2I9hSCXF_1ILWQuW51tqMDaGUZ17Xkt1cdQbMqy-5chJNTMLT3gyIe55mNXlE2_nu4QJLgEK9A8IIVUaMbeAZrllMwxovVVXKUckASCn5wdCYoCoCo65-BDm_sWp3GgD2iMW5c8kG4bYm5ajTG_Wp5UE8dKgCHaITBYiNcCd477a6WtzbkQLb2VJ3h6KsSKU83MqdqGBC0j1Ql1k2lJxga2q9u9C-STV4OLFkfwbPuYBdwmeO4oo-eKl4QWr3qdFDDUokDE4wqdC_P30GBwa9UzwsarO167k6j) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a5357adf75e45ffa3ce0323cf35e4f2&_e=hbDFRN4IYujJHMRRbsk5sQvnSciONO2I9hSCXF_1ILWQuW51tqMDaGUZ17Xkt1cdQbMqy-5chJNTMLT3gyIe55mNXlE2_nu4QJLgEK9A8IIVUaMbeAZrllMwxovVVXKUckASCn5wdCYoCoCo65-BDhruBlYlA-U4y1nTKUJko2YawZzrXYrBFs7Rt9j1gqaNEM2qB65BcySkZifG8YGL_ezEdBrzSHlqSVoItoS9C5cnGT7ZdM7sVAjApk701yTa-WK0cR1YkJw5LS4rrSHsRy9q1QpnvcyTQgOAA-D9UPF9kROkyhlaTLP-VNRq3wsi) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a5357adf75e45ffa3ce0323cf35e4f2&_e=hbDFRN4IYujJHMRRbsk5sQvnSciONO2I9hSCXF_1ILWQuW51tqMDaGUZ17Xkt1cdQbMqy-5chJNTMLT3gyIe55mNXlE2_nu4QJLgEK9A8IIVUaMbeAZrllMwxovVVXKUckASCn5wdCYoCoCo65-BDoq-64k3RDOckev7NgdifSi3tq7XcdQTmSEWlzkQSYvsznRFCWwrMPLZIPKc3_8vt03c1kMP4jKepTmuE-cWu7tShjGcVugKYmUgHd0orGXFN0VgA3lEgCg5EVEyLQXvWJoJGJ_N1odDq4_rbyAKd8uzIdwF5Ma-S8ITG4cmXN3-). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE."_ [**Click Here To See This Breakthrough Solar Generation In Action**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=7a5357adf75e45ffa3ce0323cf35e4f2&_e=hbDFRN4IYujJHMRRbsk5sQvnSciONO2I9hSCXF_1ILWQuW51tqMDaGUZ17Xkt1cdQbMqy-5chJNTMLT3gyIe55mNXlE2_nu4QJLgEK9A8IIVUaMbeAZrllMwxovVVXKUckASCn5wdCYoCoCo65-BDgzStxNs6wMgcR1aQ8Ju_ZF75m9jCukjjSY3GpzNC5tMp_Q6YTUpmQaiSu2Y2Ax_n_5D2zkLNKJrWhvRS44eE4E-dVrECRyeUxftNxWiQPcJ7RFW69nu2iHt0PzAZUwBs3pkl49EZbEiOzWVl4dE3gMq65japxNLJ3E0nOwZt34P)

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: REVEALED: What school book fairs are teaching children
body:
Here's what we're up against.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2e1fcc1a594116aaea50f535e704dc&_e=-SvTpJ_XnJitrOBwGAhG3DRraKKYKbNgL8RFm9KoHu2hEklXYJu_9coxJZHPd5fGCDIBkHJ142_sov1RmwkdpKYoHn_Dr0ffAZEv_vyvJfM50zKxAQphjKjfQY35gZD-PVpuI-c38PLTX29zqrrG7KTqwSfmsT4INAnPbhlgvsyLw9L7qtXP6oKqZ61YZB2mD_NBCLjHVKNAE4ndmFkkHBO5xH8jdEEuC6JaMKRLt3i6iNizXU2XVduE9uO8ghBn "SkyTree Book Fairs")

Friend,

SkyTree Book Fair and I did a deep dive and discovered the cause of why sexually explicit and disgusting books get into our children's schools, classrooms, and libraries.

Here's what we're up against.

These are books Scholastic promotes at book fairs in schools. Here are pages from "Welcome to St. Hell," a 2022 Scholastic book glamorizing gender transitioning to middle schoolers. (We've censored these pages as the original content could violate social media policies against adult material):

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2e1fcc1a594116aaea50f535e704dc&_e=-SvTpJ_XnJitrOBwGAhG3DRraKKYKbNgL8RFm9KoHu2hEklXYJu_9coxJZHPd5fGCDIBkHJ142_sov1RmwkdpKYoHn_Dr0ffAZEv_vyvJfNQJmRrcYZ2jaO3MTF9UVE-bvnXsDswLja8D9K7Zxu7Gd9nNBW2rt0LCBvwe3-GyX9_Vgcu-Qvdyi4KUSnJByGIY_LvVcYDVjfneL62aWJwRUvnO4cO6AbiISle9GR_58vIiJQWQnXgmrL7aehmhSx6)[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2e1fcc1a594116aaea50f535e704dc&_e=-SvTpJ_XnJitrOBwGAhG3DRraKKYKbNgL8RFm9KoHu2hEklXYJu_9coxJZHPd5fGCDIBkHJ142_sov1RmwkdpKYoHn_Dr0ffAZEv_vyvJfMuzJw1CV6kM52o0vrLMjoDaW5bbjHBSORn10hmQIx4yhZ1pdlb094odxD5T3_iL_X6-vpbhKLQqDnncgfcrQjSMl_QHEt6iP6V-KrbRdMhUXVeNc7-o6CHBL0_YVPf9sjYHJodARuVModASsXpaOeR)

Scholastic holds a virtual monopoly on school book fairs. Like many of our cultural institutions in the last decade, Scholastic has fallen prey to the woke mob and radical LGBT political agenda.

Scholastic promotes this agenda over the well-being of our children.

**Here is the solution:**

SkyTree Book Fair offers schools a different option for book fairs. SkyTree Book Fairs is providing schools, parents, and children with an empowering alternative with literature rooted in truth and family values that matches the quality and ease of Scholastic while countering their harmful agenda.

Here's how you can help.

[I am asking for your urgent support to help SkyTree replace Scholastic in schools. Can you donate $35, $50, or even $100 today toward Sky Tree? We are kicking off with a goal to raise $100,000 this month.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2e1fcc1a594116aaea50f535e704dc&_e=-SvTpJ_XnJitrOBwGAhG3DRraKKYKbNgL8RFm9KoHu2hEklXYJu_9coxJZHPd5fGCDIBkHJ142_sov1RmwkdpKYoHn_Dr0ffAZEv_vyvJfOtASwxOlSC7x2nj8sZWOXOFhY9T1CV1QyQz0XwRXWD72P_dLJsS2pkxKSEHgG8z8h9G_bxn3EzT45bUQa2wXuY7tASWD1NBqoz4MVknI_fo3QTydigOF8Yj7C85BOveR1404MW-gUwndMdd3NY-4g1)

[Donate](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2e1fcc1a594116aaea50f535e704dc&_e=-SvTpJ_XnJitrOBwGAhG3DRraKKYKbNgL8RFm9KoHu2hEklXYJu_9coxJZHPd5fGCDIBkHJ142_sov1RmwkdpKYoHn_Dr0ffAZEv_vyvJfPsq5YNuodY1fT8WBdW6Pl_RoVvNDWWXbRgrl3_QcAJTgScorjKPJg7pF4G8YrkHtL5ZMV4iOuPOXuO1iXhnVVTMeSW3wS0jENDjRSGM9WecXEMdQ4_YBruc_DVOZMoTSl7DlTltyJW0RtHC-75rBKI)

SkyTree was inspired by my first children's book, As You Grow. Now, I am helping them spread to schools across the country as an alternative to Scholastic. And here's the thing: SkyTree will not only promote age-appropriate books, but they will do so more efficiently to make it easier for schools to choose SkyTree over Scholastic.

And it's working!

SkyTree has already secured its first public school book fair in Spotsylvania, VA!

No more race-infused storylines. No more confusing gender content. Only age-appropriate content that will nurture childhood innocence and character.

SkyTree needs your support today. American children need your support today!!

We are quickly lining up hundreds of new book fairs in the Spring semester. It costs roughly $7,500 to host a book fair. Please help sponsor SkyTree book fairs in schools across the country.

[Donate $10 >>](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5f2e1fcc1a594116aaea50f535e704dc&_e=-SvTpJ_XnJitrOBwGAhG3DRraKKYKbNgL8RFm9KoHu2hEklXYJu_9coxJZHPd5fGCDIBkHJ142_sov1RmwkdpAkzF4XhizYgpUQH8Xn0o77dUWKBPumPFOIu7ghwZUGoFppNWy4xH8mJW-6mTz5Q9CdEoTGLpQbya-rJ7ixlrK0JutIAFTRMMt05T8joZsZDiA3KbrWQUygCzj0o0SKzDbChSEYUwro_LlweyIkgRs5kbI_SSnP9q2_VxNybk7Gv)

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9c52f605211444a86982b0cb8ffa8e9&_e=26FO0Gjifu_n0A7R1OKc8AmKH8TmUYHIdzRBMDOF5IWqQbM8mq1K93hkwIYr-fSzFCUFfeIHrEjLr5LeALcJUy39MTnPzUMuH7erzDxFWRig5qNMRg26K9BT6KHpVDOO5xLF_eMVzZhUx35lsOZU9xvxIVGsxCy_8v2A6vleyPuhljqHrWGEqTlMzoZFpqqi5mcBbGCKNflj74Ix1paSvqc0N88zUakWCZ4--f1yLDRFsdZIzcjmkq-rDKxTeXTwSAaVjPGmSNowGJkvkBrAn3t2DXd6Me87DzfDCJF797SLJv2dL5oLNHLQeqRc96g5) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9c52f605211444a86982b0cb8ffa8e9&_e=26FO0Gjifu_n0A7R1OKc8AmKH8TmUYHIdzRBMDOF5IWqQbM8mq1K93hkwIYr-fSzFCUFfeIHrEjLr5LeALcJUy39MTnPzUMuH7erzDxFWRig5qNMRg26K9BT6KHpVDOO5xLF_eMVzZhUx35lsOZU97-hfOZmhwseMgJlmwcMuXX9pQynLzWGm5jOLMqyW5YnIASFFFXnQN8R7kcW5606BRbr99mysstmRAXEaptNRwuUbE5ja0mVRQgQmpEUUW6dbxbhPwXmLOfpINZKKIU1fiDlRZqk9uD7pdR7Vrg7daAh-O-XorN-jU2IR_3MCPrv) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a9c52f605211444a86982b0cb8ffa8e9&_e=26FO0Gjifu_n0A7R1OKc8AmKH8TmUYHIdzRBMDOF5IWqQbM8mq1K93hkwIYr-fSzFCUFfeIHrEjLr5LeALcJUy39MTnPzUMuH7erzDxFWRig5qNMRg26K9BT6KHpVDOO5xLF_eMVzZhUx35lsOZU96gYLF7Ml7XqZiygQ5144e6TPpPlWtrQ659T6jiggq5zouPmeLBhnf83OXAa2FlCgBGxHy-gTbCZZRcD9BouooiQLiXV0p3heo1px3oOAMT2LHqwJZKf1zm-4qMmt6t_iK3m9qq82WUMC2UM05w9GAdC4z8DtbaTstAM_OP1gqKU). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the [**Patriot Power Generator**](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a801e0f896e04145a34a7e8ba48bdf5f&_e=j_avq-jXsID5Q-mYEmkYGVYZWmGY9bd16uG4Q8jXTEvJCLb9erEkF_WnuqqFAID9C-FaV2g1W8hdDSk4oraKpmib0WnxSIDhg2JTO_QRGiZymjV7gCjJ3iUvgyGgVKOFSG0dDlps7G2v21PGMlRDVrq08iXd1jg62bPEQpcTmcyAN9Xg6kJk2ca4IisY7ljd50PwrIty5CCaXxyt58y_uhkB2xlbxofCfS0FQiCN4SVrL_VsXH8FdhmP33SzIr-7zFJsP_JPMwsqeSrsK3iwH7oZxVx3Dt1SloZMJt2ez2E9Crnw0HXk6UzvPUBkXp9R). **THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months! Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, "Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse." Despite this clear and present danger... Our Government is Woefully Unprepared They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months. Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator. Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and without gas, fumes or noise. Our top recommendation in portable solar generators is the . THIS breakthrough solar generator is safe enough to use inside. And never needs gas, ever. And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on Fox & Friends... And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now. Demand is surging... "It has a battery inside. You can charge it with electricity or - what's really cool - with a solar panel that comes with it for FREE." Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

| Dear Fellow American,

Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34c099e7820d4e7e8252ec4a479a1237&_e=FlkF2qjan9bodoYuNNJMj3paA3FH2_2XX-ekyVsH4wVbfPeO9fYO2lna7I9RpL_oY-QJJy9YVPOdaeMTQGFIiyZEz7YYNOCdxas0kC_qf7KLHED7nCEclKkuyeLDVzwUVa5qowlZbWsIRzdwqyZjZjSx6qsSLx2EWTWsiIOwvkTlJOvhR9jMTC8CLBRRe6pF4oDhaWQE5-0vc2h15zCO95q0Xi1IwCf5gEHHMjWWOGQyH0-y0lo75v7ldKFF6Lr9_74tsM5B793UvI9H2nbWaFbltGr-bEB_kPvp2voHvPXhd9nV0VtPjSM6sWHoRAwqKD0q1XlH974G0BTcaAdbXUpOWLnbejoSMaIoxU2Jfmq5g9cGKPb6coNpBv4HxrmpX_Yoiuo8zW8SXZhtkQ54VskAklkHYh-9CsiGchCIlrw%3D) As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles.

Your [signature on this petition](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34c099e7820d4e7e8252ec4a479a1237&_e=FlkF2qjan9bodoYuNNJMj3paA3FH2_2XX-ekyVsH4wVbfPeO9fYO2lna7I9RpL_oY-QJJy9YVPOdaeMTQGFIiyZEz7YYNOCdxas0kC_qf7KLHED7nCEclKkuyeLDVzwUVa5qowlZbWsIRzdwqyZjZjSx6qsSLx2EWTWsiIOwvkTlJOvhR9jMTC8CLBRRe6pF4oDhaWQE5-0vc2h15zCO95q0Xi1IwCf5gEHHMjWWOGQyH0-y0lo75v7ldKFF6Lr93PLiLeM308Jr4InySS2YIUi1CKK2lxll3NxJCrooL9nooKPgVkR_pCP8sUBrhk-QFMtrsV5juC-apVP4Is7ycY3CBFPHH4zp4mVVMaiKqNo-Io50Oq3enbw_c8ovl1JcOUBb-vNKIN_v5WckXFBeGbXI_3lqvnxvuuXSHyfhVCU%3D) is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society.

The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to [stand with me now](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=34c099e7820d4e7e8252ec4a479a1237&_e=FlkF2qjan9bodoYuNNJMj3paA3FH2_2XX-ekyVsH4wVbfPeO9fYO2lna7I9RpL_oY-QJJy9YVPOdaeMTQGFIiyZEz7YYNOCdxas0kC_qf7KLHED7nCEclKkuyeLDVzwUVa5qowlZbWsIRzdwqyZjZjSx6qsSLx2EWTWsiIOwvkTlJOvhR9jMTC8CLBRRe6pF4oDhaWQE5-0vc2h15zCO95q0Xi1IwCf5gEHHMjWWOGQyH0-y0lo75v7ldKFF6Lr9r5nmdx18CcwLE5iW7SWwLu4xSn4o3NUWA6Sasclft50FjxIgoNKLPkTr-E4qy-422a9-Bc8MZROSdNRY3hqZs82aaD_UOYMTt0FL7nVGcRaBMO-dy5HR667qhC6PXHRx8qeemjSsg37NrC47u7mQswDEvH9_3wrSqsjW4J2Jcmw%3D) to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations.

Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference.

Sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
