name: Elise Stefanik
subject: This judge is ensuring that President Trump does not receive a fair trial.
body:
Judge Engoron must be removed from Trump's case in NY if we want justice to be upheld...

| Friend, I am urgently reaching out to my top supporters to update you on the status of the politically motivated show trial against President Trump in New York. Despite the best efforts of Radical Leftists like AG Letitia James and Judge Arthur Engoron we have been able to expose their corruption and push back against their biased miscarriage of justice at every turn. **We put a spotlight on this case when I filed my original ethics complaint against Judge Engoron,_which many of my supporters had co-signed_ , and a New York appellate court overturned the blatantly unconstitutional gag order placed on President Trump and his team!** **But extremists like Judge Engoron are determined to make sure President Trump does not receive a fair trial.** **And this radically biased judge proved that yet again when he hit back at President Trump and his team by wrongfully dismissing a motion for mistrial.** It is clear that the Leftist cabal persecuting America First conservatives like President Trump are lashing out because their strategy of lawfare is failing which is why it is now more important than ever to hold the line and send a message that the American people will not tolerate this judicial corruption. **That 's why I have revised my ethics complaint to remove Judge Arthur Engoron from Trump's case in New York in order to highlight his egregious denial of a mistrial.** [**Friend, stand with us by co-signing my revised ethics complaint.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=725c7c63fcfb4941a9b18c2f96dc1d2c&_e=6__cLWu7ZxN8vq4toR2h1zOGTf7voWzrDfNgnfUuLRdDBmHqZI0kHRjHBYCl3D6Sga2TiJWw8g_14bqol4h2JPKNAYrQ3dTio5FaGaSf_e0MMJ2BRJZM5gWJ3tWInNqs_RPNmAbLAXXuKf4K6_q015O8ppjMGkT0b_LbUQLflCpIqt5OdYO3z_SEf2AFQudvFzn0Tm6054nQFiXEZXkvDyCw2vqwjAZC0TUBoJryGl9d2zy97oyXXIFCxdPZas20tlGAsILAVSM309tH67naemuPjRtoN8i6eROr0J70_yDdmtP-LlhrgHjNrQWExBqKtjSN6mMMMe7k1I-IaWJA6A%3D%3D)

clean_body: Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. | | | | | Dear Fellow American, Today, our nation stands at a crucial juncture. The foundational principles that have shaped this great country, the cornerstones of faith, liberty, community, and life, are being threatened. The very essence of our American Dream is under siege. As the founder of the American Cornerstone Institute, I have written a petition calling for us to collectively uphold these cardinal values in the face of rapidly shifting ideologies. It is a patriotic call to arms to those who believe in preserving our traditional American principles. Your is not just a mark on a document - it's a personal statement of belief, a voice affirming the importance of faith, liberty, family, and life in the fabric of our society. The stakes have never been higher. I urge you to to ensure that our nation remains a beacon of hope, freedom, and opportunity for future generations. Your commitment and dedication to these values are invaluable. Together, we can make a difference. Sincerely, Dr. Ben Carson Founder and Chairman American Cornerstone Institute | | Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country's most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government's role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation's citizens. | | Copyright(C) 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved. name: (1) Ron DeSantis, me
subject: Attacks incoming because of THIS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsqLEP1iNB

I've got a number you're going to want to take a look at.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osqLEP1iNB

Friend,

News of our record fundraising haul from the last quarter has hit
the press and we've got big things coming because of the support
we've brought in. The doubters had their heyday, and yet again,
we've proved them.

Now, we're bringing the fight right to the Hawkeye State, making
progress on visiting the good people of Iowa in all 99 counties,
and EARNING this nomination. But after three debates and another
incredible fundraising showing, we have truly showed our hand as
the threat in this race, and we are about to face attacks from
every angle to keep us from winning in Iowa. We cannot let this
take us down.

Help me keep it up: Chip in $15

Other candidates are taking the American people for granted and
feeling entitled to votes. That couldn't be further from my game
plan. I am on the ground, building relationships, and earning the
grassroots support that'll be necessary to win this election, and
this will only be made harder as other candidates attempt to take
us down in the coming months. I KNOW what it takes to win
elections, but this is my first nationwide race, and I am
counting on your support more than ever to cover this new ground.

We've just entered our critical sprint leading up to the Iowa
Caucus on January 15th, and coming together now will make the
difference when that night comes. If we step back and lose in
this first nominating contest, we drop the ball for the future
generations of this country and risk losing next November. Losing
to Joe Biden... and losing freedom that soldiers have shed blood
and tears for.

All
across Iowa so far, I've gained incredible support and
endorsements from political, evangelical, agricultural, and local
business leaders, but I'll need YOUR support to get me through
the rest of this stretch.

Chip in
$25

Chip in
$47

Chip in
$75

Chip in
$100

Chip in any amount you can

When we win Iowa, Friend, we won't slow down. We're going all the
way, and we have to raise the resources we'll need to make it.
The people of this state are getting to know me, and we're
scaring the rest of this field. They know they can't catch up in
this critical state, and it's only the beginning. Your donation
will help us keep meeting Iowans and keep dominating across the
state. We can fight back against the millions that will be waged
to hold us back if we raise our own. Grassroots supporters are
who will decide the fate of this election. That's you.

In
Freedom,

Ron
DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

| | | Friend, My son, Officer Chris Taylor, is going to trial right now... ...and radical leftists are THREATENING potential jurors if they don’t convict him. I’m appealing to you in this emergency because I need your help to save my son from life in prison for protecting the public from a dangerous lunatic. **[Please donate $10, $15, $20, $25 or more to help Chris’ legal defense.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFu8yAQhJ9mfcOCNQH7wOH_G7mHSr33VGF23RCZ4GCiNG9fOap6nfk08_m0LnF-OLD_AfEUaQNE6P4B4vXjnsrtnN5exYHO4mre02Ev8QUQ62PlP_J3pOXk47Kn9tiQ62aSumGnrFRSamOxOTnm2WhC3_da0mDmA1mF5G3gyQ9k-iY6lNgphUZ1ymrThmHmgSbq_UAD9wRaPn9an7jE4NVW776UnFMbcmoWd6p13Z5iI-C4cbgVbv2FKdedABwvYSXAkSZRkQQnoa3g7wrduOVbCfwZMjF0R5rEjgpO2k5CStMUR-s9LkvcjAUtv54iIaefAAAA___4a2Qx) ** Chris’ trial has begun in Austin, Texas, where an open socialist District Attorney named José Garza is going after cops with a vengeance. District Attorney Garza has already indicted more than a dozen police officers for doing their jobs because he puts criminals first and public safety last. **What’s worse, leftist groups are trying to scare potential jurors to go along with a legal lynching of my son.** This past summer, leftist groups put flyers such as the one below on the cars of potential jurors outside of the courthouse.
---
[](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFu8yAQhJ9mfcOCNQH7wOH_G7mHSr33VGF23RCZ4GCiNG9fOap6nfk08_m0LnF-OLD_AfEUaQNE6P4B4vXjnsrtnN5exYHO4mre02Ev8QUQ62PlP_J3pOXk47Kn9tiQ62aSumGnrFRSamOxOTnm2WhC3_da0mDmA1mF5G3gyQ9k-iY6lNgphUZ1ymrThmHmgSbq_UAD9wRaPn9an7jE4NVW776UnFMbcmoWd6p13Z5iI-C4cbgVbv2FKdedABwvYSXAkSZRkQQnoa3g7wrduOVbCfwZMjF0R5rEjgpO2k5CStMUR-s9LkvcjAUtv54iIaefAAAA___4a2Qx)
---
These flyers are a threat of violence against potential jurors. Would you feel safe being on a jury knowing that leftists would lash out if you voted against convicting an innocent man? I know I wouldn’t! These threatening flyers forced the judge in Chris’ case to abandon the first attempt to pick a jury and to reschedule the second attempt. Chris’ lawyers have been pushing the judge to move the trial out of Austin because the hate-filled atmosphere here won’t allow Chris to get a fair trial. But the judge allowed the trial to proceed anyway — even though we’ve already seen that leftists in the community are willing to threaten potential jurors. There’s not much time to save Chris from being ripped away from his beautiful wife Amy and their son and locked up for life for MURDER because he defended himself from a dangerous lunatic. [**Will you help Chris today by making a tax-deductible gift of $10, $15, $20, $25 or more to help them fund Chris’ defense?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFu8yAQhJ9mfcOCNQH7wOH_G7mHSr33VGF23RCZ4GCiNG9fOap6nfk08_m0LnF-OLD_AfEUaQNE6P4B4vXjnsrtnN5exYHO4mre02Ev8QUQ62PlP_J3pOXk47Kn9tiQ62aSumGnrFRSamOxOTnm2WhC3_da0mDmA1mF5G3gyQ9k-iY6lNgphUZ1ymrThmHmgSbq_UAD9wRaPn9an7jE4NVW776UnFMbcmoWd6p13Z5iI-C4cbgVbv2FKdedABwvYSXAkSZRkQQnoa3g7wrduOVbCfwZMjF0R5rEjgpO2k5CStMUR-s9LkvcjAUtv54iIaefAAAA___4a2Qx) Chris’ life changed entirely on April 24, 2020, when he and other officers were called to a domestic situation in an apartment complex. A man, Mike Ramos, who appeared to be using illegal substances reportedly. pointing a gun at his girlfriend in the parking lot. Chris and seven other officers responded due to the seriousness of the report by a concerned citizen. After officers used a non-lethal round during the confrontation, Ramos got back into his vehicle and started to drive. Chris faced a choice... ...let the reportedly armed and incapacitated man drive onto public roads, endangering everyone, or use his weapon to stop Ramos. Chris chose to save countless potential lives that day. However, bystanders with partial cell phone footage of the altercation uploaded clips to social media. Local Black Lives Matter groups stoked outrage and my son was made a scapegoat for the whole Austin Police Department. I didn’t know how we would fight these unfair charges until Jim Fotis and the National Center for Police Defense (NCPD), a 501(c)3 non-profit charity, offered to help us. Founded by Jim Fotis, an Army veteran and retired police officer from New York, the NCPD has been instrumental in taking the lead to stand up for police officers Sheriff Joe Arpaio (“America’s Toughest Sheriff”), Tulsa’s Police Officer Betty Shelby, New York Cops Anthony Federico and Hugh Barry Jr., Michigan’s Mark Bessner, and many more. The NCPD is a 100% hard-hitting organization of police officers (retired and active) and defense attorneys who know what Chris has been through and what it takes to see his case to victory. Chris’ trial has begun, and we don’t have much time to act. **[Will you help Chris today by making a tax-deductible gift of $10, $15, $20, $25 or more to the NCPD to help them fund Chris’ defense?](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFu8yAQhJ9mfcOCNQH7wOH_G7mHSr33VGF23RCZ4GCiNG9fOap6nfk08_m0LnF-OLD_AfEUaQNE6P4B4vXjnsrtnN5exYHO4mre02Ev8QUQ62PlP_J3pOXk47Kn9tiQ62aSumGnrFRSamOxOTnm2WhC3_da0mDmA1mF5G3gyQ9k-iY6lNgphUZ1ymrThmHmgSbq_UAD9wRaPn9an7jE4NVW776UnFMbcmoWd6p13Z5iI-C4cbgVbv2FKdedABwvYSXAkSZRkQQnoa3g7wrduOVbCfwZMjF0R5rEjgpO2k5CStMUR-s9LkvcjAUtv54iIaefAAAA___4a2Qx) ** Chris’ legal defense will cost more than $200,000 — that’s money we don’t have. And remember, radical leftist groups are threatening potential jurors with violence if they don’t vote the “right way” and convict my son for defending his own life. The lawyers say there’s still a chance for my son... ...but we need your immediate help. **[Please, as the loving mother of an honorable and honest cop, I beg you to lend us a hand by donating $10, $15, $20, $25 or even $50 or $100 today.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8jsFu8yAQhJ9mfcOCNQH7wOH_G7mHSr33VGF23RCZ4GCiNG9fOap6nfk08_m0LnF-OLD_AfEUaQNE6P4B4vXjnsrtnN5exYHO4mre02Ev8QUQ62PlP_J3pOXk47Kn9tiQ62aSumGnrFRSamOxOTnm2WhC3_da0mDmA1mF5G3gyQ9k-iY6lNgphUZ1ymrThmHmgSbq_UAD9wRaPn9an7jE4NVW776UnFMbcmoWd6p13Z5iI-C4cbgVbv2FKdedABwvYSXAkSZRkQQnoa3g7wrduOVbCfwZMjF0R5rEjgpO2k5CStMUR-s9LkvcjAUtv54iIaefAAAA___4a2Qx) ** There’s no time to waste. Thank you for stepping up today. With gratitude,

Christy Koinzan

The NCPD is a 100% hard-hitting organization of police officers (retired and active) and defense attorneys who know what Chris has been through and what it takes to see his case to victory. Chris’ trial has begun, and we don’t have much time to act. Chris’ legal defense will cost more than $200,000 — that’s money we don’t have. And remember, radical leftist groups are threatening potential jurors with violence if they don’t vote the “right way” and convict my son for defending his own life. The lawyers say there’s still a chance for my son... ...but we need your immediate help. There’s no time to waste. Thank you for stepping up today. With gratitude, Christy Koinzan | | The National Center for Police Defense is a 501c3 Charitable Institution. All Contributions are Tax-Deductible. National Center for Police Defense 10521 Judicial Drive Suite 200 Fairfax, VA 22030

# **FOX & Friends Features Breakthrough Solar Generator**
_**Demand Is Surging - 107,000 Americans Have Already Claimed Theirs...**_ [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84238298027049c4a57ec0595da82fdc&_e=AlrnNOSZjpCd_vo1EX0Nw7IYpDQdR0HWz_fWksGIwFjZHGbqGNI0jnTLpRWCobflgi3Lm3Iz0M7vRKH9l_QHo_zTEpGD6Yg0HDxYNFzySpf4qrtwNh5uvyO9KaR1ctVCSBZCb5MSeotQT-rLDxAaVCkfwHwkAFT84wRnK4UxMzIGZpRQRTXfL3LR3XdVvriH7iGJzuh9VIsQyU-yh9e7kGI1S2OCwVMXn6pSMUU-A1evvBsmY5FpR1vWbl3W0-iM_hSaius0pMQQ2CZYdd4BJBICmAZKkEtnP4l7NcEvz8WFazMXT-wZrSGoiZ_HLb1L) FOX & Friends featured a breakthrough solar generator right before a "polar vortex" sent thousands of Americans into total darkness. Skip Bedell recommended it as the perfect gift to prepare for winter storms. **_And then BOOM!_** _**Demand surged and 4Patriots sold out.**_ Days later, a massive ice storm hit the nation. The folks who were fortunate enough to claim their silent, fume-free solar generator were thanking their lucky stars. Because despite power outages, rolling blackouts and bone-chilling temperatures... Those who acted fast and got their [**4Patriots solar generator**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=84238298027049c4a57ec0595da82fdc&_e=AlrnNOSZjpCd_vo1EX0Nw7IYpDQdR0HWz_fWksGIwFjZHGbqGNI0jnTLpRWCobflgi3Lm3Iz0M7vRKH9l_QHo_zTEpGD6Yg0HDxYNFzySpf4qrtwNh5uvyO9KaR1ctVCSBZCb5MSeotQT-rLDxAaVBDLsv6AAv18kRsBKGa8Nzzr9vjHcEu4TNlsY8b4wrCpdb1OzbN23NhLi7w-WJPzOXmyH8qx7_40aUh68X9j3Rc6NgLtHn9U9KxAmjK_NaZpZ1R0qeTractcHkFRvde13Stmw2B6KFgeb8dVuFAkmO0yyqdps1LyGzbvgUo9rNnn) had peace of mind and could power critical devices like lights, space heaters, communications, critical medical devices and even fridges and freezers. Sadly, those who didn't prepare were left to hope and pray the lights came back on soon. **But that's not why this generator is going viral...** **National Security Experts Fear Imminent Threat to Our Power Grid** Freak ice storms, hurricanes and raging wildfires aren't the only threat to our nation's crumbling power grid... Shockingly, in 2022 alone there were over 70 physical attacks on our nation's power grid! And even worse, attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could trigger... **A nationwide blackout that could last up to 18 months!** Former CIA Director, James Woolsey, warned that an attack on America's infrastructure would, _"Blackout the national electric grid and other life-sustaining critical infrastructures for over a year. Killing 9 out of 10 Americans by starvation and societal collapse."_ Despite this clear and present danger... **Our Government is Woefully Unprepared** They ignore dire warnings from national security experts about our vulnerable power grid. Warnings of physical, electro-magnetic pulse (EMP) and cyberattacks... And who suffers because of their neglect? YOU and your family. **Imagine a blackout lasting not days, but weeks or months.** Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment your power fails. An entire country plunged into darkness. Without a generator, your fridge, electric range and microwave would be dead. All the food in your fridge and freezer - spoiled. Your well couldn't pump fresh water into your house. And even if you don't have a well, a total grid failure means no fresh water to drink, cook or clean with. This is not some crazy doomsday theory. It's a real threat. **That's why many Americans are taking matters into their own hands and are securing their own solar powered generator.** Solar generators are a smart choice because they produce an endless supply of life-saving electricity when you need it most - and **without gas, fumes or noise**. And never needs gas, ever.** And you'll have peace of mind knowing that you and your family have a safe, reliable and easy-to-use source of backup power. To survive a blackout, storm, grid-down event... or worse. It's why the Patriot Power Generator was recently featured on **Fox & Friends**... **And why over 107,000 Americans already have it in their homes right now.** **Demand is surging...** _"It has a battery inside. name: Colin Allred
subject: I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
| | | | |

| | |

| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tbbd755ad-d507-4d24-95b0-69603ab57ad6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5117464d-7bcc-4204-9ea4-0fda82a65edb/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Peter, I thought my days of putting people on the ground were over when I left the NFL. Then January 6th happened. I was on the House floor when rioters breached the Capitol, and I remember hearing the glass break and the shouts coming closer. As they pounded on the doors, I texted my wife Aly, who was seven months pregnant with our second son: “Whatever happens, I love you.” I took off my jacket and got ready to fight anyone who came through the door. Thankfully, it never came to that. And while I was barricaded on the House floor with my colleagues and our gas masks in hand, Ted Cruz – who had cheered on the mob earlier that day – hid in a supply closet. Ted Cruz’s false claims about the 2020 election helped incite the insurrection. That's Ted for you: All hat, no cattle. That day is one of many, many reasons I know Ted Cruz has got to go. People lost their lives, and our government came the closest it ever has to crumbling. His MAGA extremism is bad for Texas and our country, and it’s time to hold him accountable. [I’m running to replace Ted Cruz and give Texans the senator we deserve, and I hope you’ll help me do it, Peter. Will you donate now to me and Blue Amp Actin to help build our grassroots movement and defeat Ted Cruz once and for all? Any amount you can spare is truly appreciated. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91237053-f14c-4b62-94d6-3654890b1b52/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T61d2e529-d0ff-4bf8-8d31-afbd339407f8/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: It takes a veteran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | [](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=bd5dd0b20d0b4d59af21762970a18b38&_e=VMC98YhBae3TA7EVAy5NbwVqFJj4ps6PYUBPEfuJD9nPBkQMWo0S0fxY0k1If7iLeEaVWFaEa7frB5dtzFJX85ANlCkJzT0ojkts-seBJp-cEM2kjP2MvTJTpou4OINgFVmmqsMVy7MyhyTVo8QTUxsgbJ7Yu73ut9Ufl0zAcmWdBTFKoTibmBPscky8lYlmEXeXg5tsN3K3rV7t24TNDMMjLShWqTljhYfMSToq2pwlUr51zCZeuwRpyXnxgcu0okf1qTdOOqeK6SkqdwURcgRoGThswekLRLBJxb1BI3EAesA8jfjZDQEFFpyz1dKusq752EtDlK75scHZeU7kYL72RTAfAukBks6yyHCoFW0m2gUXyNxVdbWvZev1DB6k)
---
| | Peter, My name is Hung Cao. I’m a retired Navy Officer who spent 25 years fighting for our country alongside SEAL Teams and Special Forces in some of the most dangerous battlegrounds in the world. You may not know me yet, so I wanted to share my story.

My family and I came to America when I was just four years old after my father was put on a kill list in Communist Vietnam. If it wasn’t for this country, I probably wouldn’t be here today.

I owe my life to America - so I paid her back by attending the Naval Academy after graduating high school and dedicating my career to fighting for this country.
---
[](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=bd5dd0b20d0b4d59af21762970a18b38&_e=VMC98YhBae3TA7EVAy5NbwVqFJj4ps6PYUBPEfuJD9nPBkQMWo0S0fxY0k1If7iLeEaVWFaEa7frB5dtzFJX85ANlCkJzT0ojkts-seBJp-cEM2kjP2MvTJTpou4OINgFVmmqsMVy7MyhyTVo8QTUxsgbJ7Yu73ut9Ufl0zAcmWdBTFKoTibmBPscky8lYlmEXeXg5tsN3K3rV7t24TNDMMjLShWqTljhYfMSToq2pwd6gzL9O9gRNrXdrTibs6ExtARjB2TWuy1p-kIdBNShlXT-n1yQ4ErmvMABo1P4_49loQcxdTdh58VSQV6XVhtR9rdVX6eFajLJKgPOAxN62UtvSr2EsFKlVS_gDQaMglYMzWdUeGdZrEJLhBuViZC)
---
I served in Iraq, Afghanistan, and Somalia where I performed dangerous dives and dismantled IED’s with seconds to spare.

It wasn’t easy, and there were many times where my life flashed before my eyes.

**But it was worth it, because I was protecting this country so the next generation could have the same opportunities that I did.**

**Now that Democrats are trying to destroy that American Dream, I’m not about to sit by idly.**

Our fight isn’t just overseas anymore. It’s right here in America, where far-Left liberals in Washington DC are working to erode your freedom and compromise our future.

I’m not a career politician. I spent my life serving our country, not serving special interests.

**But one thing about me is I’ve always been called to service, and that’s why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Virginia.**

I won’t lie about who I am. I’m not well connected, rich, or famous. I’m just a concerned citizen who won’t back down when the country I love is in jeopardy.

**[I’m all-in for the fight to take back the Senate, no matter how hard it gets. However, I can’t win his thing alone. Will you join me on my mission today to make America work for hardworking, law-abiding citizens again?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=bd5dd0b20d0b4d59af21762970a18b38&_e=VMC98YhBae3TA7EVAy5NbwVqFJj4ps6PYUBPEfuJD9nPBkQMWo0S0fxY0k1If7iLeEaVWFaEa7frB5dtzFJX85ANlCkJzT0ojkts-seBJp-cEM2kjP2MvTJTpou4OINgFVmmqsMVy7MyhyTVo8QTUxsgbJ7Yu73ut9Ufl0zAcmWdBTFKoTibmBPscky8lYlmEXeXg5tsN3K3rV7t24TNDMMjLShWqTljhYfMSToq2pzGl8PJmgLX2MCT9GCZRX7ZgheK3ZkcIF4t9g4GO8p5de5H7647ojbisR3hThUpZiY9CyCn-ATn1MiL7sInx2z17GNdXQoq8usu-u1DZQFHOdEGgpo0zDh43EHIk5STOeSYZw87egn5Jq0zbaqZGmLC)**

name: Mark Meckler, Convention of States Action
subject: The Constitution – use it or lose it!
body:
| | |
---
Friend, Here’s the latest shocker: There are 20,822 border wall panels currently sitting in storage.
That’s no exaggeration.
On Biden's first day in office, his administration suspended wall construction at the southern border. The government suddenly abandoned everything, including contractors AND materials that the previous administration had organized.
Instead of assembling millions of dollars of supplies along the border, the **Department of Defense is paying a whopping $160,000 per month** to store over 20,000 panels, fiber optic cables, and lighting.
This waste must be _stopped_. Our border must be _secured_. American taxpayers must be _represented._
**[Friend, I’m asking you to please, right this second, simply sign the National Petition for an Article V convention to save America.](http://email.mail.oneamericanflag.com/c/eJxckU-PmzAQxT-NuYHwmED2wKFdSnvYXal7aI_WYA_Eqf8g2zRKPn1FlFbVXnx4fnoz7zfoVmvma8-6zwzgZHRiAEx8YgDLj9_n7R1ur7m8Pb38Kr-c3Uu9_8IzA8jXlf5ZHykVOTR2V7uh0H2j6Ni0U0E972pe18fm0BanvuGN6g5zPXFA6Dqtp5YUTa0Gmg7Nky5MDzUIzqHlDdQHUc2N1oJzQaA56mPHmnofVAVP6CgahX62uFQquML2p5zXdN9rZDCqkCq_KUtbWnGhtJsYjBa9Nn5hME4haorlBa0tL5gylcDEuGUnHWmzOSaGR612F1PYoiImhv_weGXlA8HDpdCtaBbPxHBvUpf7I1VI0pqUZSSf0copotfS00WqsF7lFA16jzJt05lUlkIGnP8mBp_JZyYGr2y5IcLX159v324MWumt0UwMH8T7McXwPbzFZ_5-1kXs9Xox1prU7giXO0MV3J8AAAD__76ap7I)**

| | MILLIONS of taxpayer dollars have been wasted on nonfunctioning supplies, and we can expect this ridiculousness to continue as political control swings back and forth.
If you’re tired of watching your money go to failed government projects, you can find hope in Convention of States. Article V of the Constitution was written for times like this. Our state legislatures give us the means to correct the federal government and Article V gives us the power.
Our current path is unsustainable, and action is critical NOW. Liberty-minded endorsers like Ben Carson, Rand Paul, Charlie Kirk, and Mark Levin are vocal supporters of COS, and you can be too.
Time is running out, and you have the ability to say you’re in this fight, not just standing by silently.

subject: Peter, will you personally endorse Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We're counting on your support.
#
Peter — will you personally endorse Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race?
Since Lucas launched his campaign to defeat Josh Hawley back in January, he’s earned support from community leaders, former statewide elected officials, the Missouri AFL-CIO + dozens of other statewide and local labor unions, and major national organizations like the League of Conservation Voters.
**But now, he needs one more critical endorsement — from you.[Will you stand behind Lucas in this race against Josh Hawley by adding your personal endorsement today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231126_endorse-lucas?t=1&akid=4239%2E614464%2EvY_BzD)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231126_endorse-lucas?t=2&akid=4239%2E614464%2EvY_BzD)**
Lucas’ bold message of taking back power from corrupt politicians like Hawley is already resonating with Missouri voters — and all the GOP insiders propping up his campaign know it. So now, they’re determined to do, say, and spend whatever it takes to tear down Lucas and the grassroots movement we’re building together.
They know Lucas Kunce can defeat Josh Hawley in 2024 — and that every endorsement, donation, and everyday person like you sharing Lucas’ message could make all the difference in what polls are already showing is a neck-and-neck race. **That’s why we have to ask:**
**[Will you join the national organizations, local leaders, and everyday people supporting Lucas Kunce in Missouri’s U.S. Senate race by adding your personal endorsement today? When you add your name, we send a signal to everyone watching our race that this movement is growing even stronger every day.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231126_endorse-lucas?t=3&akid=4239%2E614464%2EvY_BzD)**
**[ENDORSE LUCAS →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/lk-email-20231126_endorse-lucas?t=4&akid=4239%2E614464%2EvY_BzD)**
It’s going to take an unprecedented amount of support from real people like you to elect Lucas, flip this seat, and take back power for everyday Missourians — and we’re so grateful that we’ve always been able to count on you, Peter.
Thanks for everything,
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20231126-4239-footer&t=5&refcode2=4239_614464_vY_BzD&akid=4239%2E614464%2EvY_BzD)**

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.lucaskunce.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=4239%2E614464%2EvY_BzD). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

name: Save Social Security (via FFR)
subject: re: 𝗠𝗔𝗚𝗔 Mike Johnson!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
need your response in the next few hours!
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20447%2E4449941%2EvWY8uf)
---
_**We have GREAT news:**_ [ ]() _**But we also have bad news:**_

MAGA Speaker Mike Johnson is itching to CUT Social Security, _leaving Seniors relying on Social Security for survival with a terrifying and uncertain future._ | _So we’re launching a MASSIVE poll to see where Democrats stand:_
**[_Do you approve of the Biden Administration’s yearly increases in Social Security payments?_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/social-security-poll?source=FFR_20231126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20447%2E4449941%2EvWY8uf)** | **[YES, OF COURSE! »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/social-security-poll?source=FFR_20231126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20447%2E4449941%2EvWY8uf)**
---
**[NO, I DON’T »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/social-security-poll?source=FFR_20231126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=9&akid=20447%2E4449941%2EvWY8uf)**
**[I’M NOT SURE »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/social-security-poll?source=FFR_20231126_EMPOLL_E1_T0_AC_RS&t=10&akid=20447%2E4449941%2EvWY8uf)**
**_WE NEED 250 LOCAL RESPONSES FOR ACCURATE DATA_ – PLEASE RESPOND PROMPTLY BEFORE OUR POLL CLOSES TOMORROW AT 9AM.**
Thank you for sharing your thoughts! We can’t protect Social Security without your response.

Thank you,

– FFR
| | Paid political advertisement paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P.O. Box 66005, Washington, D.C. 20035.
Your contribution to FFR will be used in connection with FFR’s matching funds program to match the contributions of other contributors. Contributions to End Citizens United Non-Federal are not tax deductible.
fightforreform.org Thank you for supporting Fight For Reform, a State Level Project of End Citizens United. The Supreme Court’s 2010 Citizens United v. FEC decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections. **Fight For Reform is standing up to Big Money by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
I need you with me.
#
Hi friend, it’s Ruben.
Joe Manchin announced that he isn’t running for re-election to the U.S. Senate.
Here is the absolute, 100% truth: With Joe Manchin out of the Senate we have ZERO margin for error. We have to win now — if we lose in Arizona, we lose the Senate.
Cook Political Report just updated their race ratings. There are TWO pure toss-up Senate races in the entire country, and Arizona is one of them. All eyes will be on us. All eyes will be on this race.
And it isn’t just some boring Republican I’m running against, either. It’s Kari Lake — the “MAGA Queen.”
This is a critical moment. I need you with me.
**[Please, split a $15 donation between my campaign today and The Long Run. Help us with this race. Help us hold the Senate. Help us beat Kari Lake. Please.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.yaQa6D&refcode=em231126-1-t1&t=1&akid=5024%2E196590%2ENXX3R0)
[CONTRIBUTE $15](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=longrunpac-em-gallego-split.yaQa6D&refcode=em231126-1-t1&t=2&akid=5024%2E196590%2ENXX3R0)
Let’s get this done.
Semper Fi,
Ruben

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5024%2E196590%2ENXX3R0). Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=5024%2E196590%2ENXX3R0)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

body:

Last time he ran for Senate, he won by _**LESS**_ than 1% of the vote - _they even had to do a recount._

clean_body: | | | Peter, Senator Rick Scott is up for re-election this year, and it’s going to be one of the closest races in America. Last time he ran for Senate, he won by LESS than 1% of the vote - they even had to do a recount. Chuck Schumer and Joe Biden know how important this race is which is why they’ve pledged to spend millions to beat him. When Senate Dems step out of the line, he’s the first one to call them out for their lies. This race is make or break, and when I faced a tough election in 2022, Senator Rick Scott was always by my side. He even made a few trips to Wisconsin! But now, it’s my turn to help him! | | Thank you,Senator Ron Johnson | | | Team Rick Scott Featured Merchandise *Made in the USA Golf Balls and Joe Biden, the two things that seem to get themselves lost the most! Claim your set of "Help, I'm Lost" Golf Balls today! Become an Official Member of Team Rick Scott by claiming your 2024 Membership Card! Socialism sucks, simple as that. I'll make this quick.
House Democrats need just five seats to claim the majority in 2024 – so I need your help.
_**Last quarter, we missed our $30,000 fundraising goal by nearly $20,000 – we can’t let that happen for this crucial fourth quarter.**_

Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors.

clean_body: | | | | Roger needs your input... I'll make this quick. House Democrats need just five seats to claim the majority in 2024 – so I need your help. Last quarter, we missed our $30,000 fundraising goal by nearly $20,000 – we can’t let that happen for this crucial fourth quarter. Now, I don’t need to raise the most money to win, but I DO need more money to stay competitive. That’s why we’ve set a goal to raise $15,000 by the end of November to stay on track with where I need to be, and I’m counting on YOU. Thank you so much! Here's the best link to donate: Roger Williams Sent from my iPhone | Roger Williams is a Christian, conservative, pro-life, and second amendment supporter taking Texas values to Washington, D.C. He is a small business owner with over 45 years of experience and is running for Congress to create economic growth, jobs, and provide strong leadership. Roger worked alongside President Trump to fight against high taxes, rising energy prices, and soaring healthcare costs. His passion for conservative leadership led him to support Republican candidates from the White House to the county courthouse. Roger serves on the Board of Trustees for the Bush School of Government and Public Service at Texas A&M University, the Texas Christian University Board of Trustees, and the National Football Foundation and College Football Hall of Fame Board of Directors. | "Facebook" | "Twitter" ---|--- | | ⬇DONATE BY CHECK⬇ ROGER WILLIAMS FOR U.S. CONGRESS 10 N. name: Jim Gaughran
subject: Reminder: Please Join Us at Foster Restaurant in Sea Cliff, NY on Monday, November 27th
body:
I know you believe, as I do, that America desperately needs reasonable gun safety reform. After my son Scott died saving 31 students in the Parkland High School massacre, I devoted my life to advancing the cause of gun safety in every way I could. I started here at home because I live in New York. Jim Gaughran took up the cause of reasonable gun safety immediately. From his first day as State Senator, Jim was a champion for passing major reforms in our state’s gun laws. Without hesitation, Jim fought hard to make the people of New York safer, and he succeeded.| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/73997919/440288047/-899457644?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTk4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDE3MTI4MS02YzhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qX8yN2becykN5vt0w4MSsx8LoaMyZQbHL_j0U5Yke2g=&emci=15d4ad02-c587-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=90171281-6c8c-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=23367709)

clean_body: I know you believe, as I do, that America desperately needs reasonable gun safety reform. After my son Scott died saving 31 students in the Parkland High School massacre, I devoted my life to advancing the cause of gun safety in every way I could. I started here at home because I live in New York. Jim Gaughran took up the cause of reasonable gun safety immediately. From his first day as State Senator, Jim was a champion for passing major reforms in our state’s gun laws. Without hesitation, Jim fought hard to make the people of New York safer, and he succeeded.| | | | | | | Dear Peter, Our event in = is coming up tomorrow. Please join us if you can! See below for details. Best,Jim | | = | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Gaughran 2020 P.O. body:
Sign now to protect the Voting Rights Act >>
| **Court Strikes Down Key Tool to Enforce Voting Rights Act — Setting up Likely Supreme Court Showdown** | [SIGN THE PETITION: PROTECT THE VOTING RIGHTS ACT! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/protect-vra?source=VPP_20231126_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=6&akid=11855%2E878179%2E6ZDzhv)

The Voting Rights Act is one of our country’s landmark civil rights laws.

_**But the MAGA majority on the Supreme Court is on the verge of completely DESTROYING it!**_

If we don’t take IMMEDIATE action, we could lose ALL the progress we’ve made on voting rights. **Ahead of the MOST important election of our lifetime!**
[**This is make-or-break, so we’re counting on 1,000 top Democrats (that’s YOU!) to stand up before it’s too late! Add your name by midnight to demand the Supreme Court protect the Voting Rights Act »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/protect-vra?source=VPP_20231126_EMPET_E1_T0_AC&t=7&akid=11855%2E878179%2E6ZDzhv)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1225%2E552475%2EjHt6VE)
Peter, we have a simple question for you.

Pennsylvania is key to the GOP’s plan to take back both the Senate _and_ the White House, so **the pressure is on**.
Don’t forget that Bob’s opponent is a mega-millionaire with the backing of Mitch McConnell and national Republicans.
Your grassroots contribution makes a bigger difference today than it will in a week or 6 months from now. So here’s the question:
_**Will you do your part to help defend Pennsylvania’s Senate seat by chipping in to our campaign today?**_
**[Together, we can stand up to the GOP and defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority — so please, chip in right away.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231126-1?refcode=em20231126&refcode2=1225_552475_jHt6VE&akid=1225%2E552475%2EjHt6VE)**

Thanks for all you do.
Together,
Team Casey

name: Dr. Annie Andrews
subject: Join us in working towards a brighter future for our kids
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THEIR FUTURE PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friend,

The support we have received these past few months has been amazing. From launching our first digital ad, to our initial 2024 endorsements, we are thrilled with the momentum we have towards building a brighter future for our kids.

Children face the consequences of our policies every day. It is _THEIR FUTURE_ that is threatened by lack of action from politicians who prioritize politics over their well-being.

That’s why we need to use _OUR VOTE_ , to support leaders who prioritize our kids.

**_[But, we need your help. Our team needs to raise $7,500 before our end-of-month fundraising deadline on Thursday at midnight in order to stay on track with our goal. name: VoteVets
subject: "Vermin"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
It was one of the most chilling statements that Donald Trump has ever made, Derek.
#
It was one of the most chilling statements that Donald Trump has ever made, Derek.
Echoing the exact language used by dictators like Mussolini and Hitler, Donald Trump said that good people who stand against his vision of tearing down our democracy are “vermin.”
He said that as media reports show Trump and his extremist partners are planning to fire as many as 50,000 career civil servants to fill the government with MAGA loyalists.
American Military cemeteries around the world are filled with fallen heroes who made the ultimate sacrifice in World War II to defeat the likes of Mussolini and Hitler. It would be the final insult to them — the ones who Trump called “suckers” and “losers” — if he were re-elected.
The Veterans of the Greatest Generation and those who came after didn’t fight for this country to turn it over to this wannabe dictator. We didn’t swear an oath to defend the Constitution so this traitor can rip it to shreds. We didn’t beat him like a drum back in 2020 just to let him march right back to the White House.
Not on our watch.
Not a chance.
VoteVets wrote the playbook that beat Trump back in 2020. We’ll mobilize Veterans around the country to speak out against him and his ugly brand of authoritarianism. We’ll run ads that can win in swing states and get voters to the polls.
We’ll beat him again, Derek. But we need you with us.
[**Chip in to VoteVets today. Make it for $5. Help us stop Trump before it’s too late.](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.rp0I1d&refcode=em231126-1-re&t=1&akid=19874%2E3013755%2E7W3QXS)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| [CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-nov23.l1xwc9&amount=5&refcode=em231126-1-re&t=2&akid=19874%2E3013755%2E7W3QXS)
---
We mean that, Derek. We have a good shot at beating Trump again. But if we let this threat go unanswered, he could take back the White House. And we all know that would be an absolute disaster.
So, please. Chip in.
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

name: Courier Newsroom
subject: Peter, you've been chosen to sponsor Courier Newsroom
body:
America is in the midst of a vast information gap that our local newsrooms across nine battleground states are working tirelessly to fill.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74000967/440298701/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFlNTkxYjMtNzA4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dUuUBpehTwPpEBc8bQnNulLagJhImKyZk__WXtGPhN8=&emci=f2057308-8e88-ee11-8925-00224832e811&emdi=5ae591b3-708c-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=14016711)
**Peter — the 2024 election is already proving to be a critical test for the mainstream media and American democracy.**
Donald Trump is the first former President to be indicted on criminal charges, but he’s still the overwhelming favorite to win the Republican presidential nomination.
The situation is creating a familiar dynamic. The mainstream media gives Trump wall-to-wall coverage while he and his cronies flood right-wing media with lies and propaganda.
**As a result, right-wing misinformation is _thriving _, Peter.__**
**At Courier, our local newsrooms across nine battleground states work tirelessly to correct misinformation and cover the stories that matter most in local communities.**
To do that, we make our news stories freely available to anyone who needs them. We publish directly in the online spaces where misinformation thrives.
But, to keep it this way, we have to fundraise to support the work of our journalists.
**In that spirit, we’re excited to announce our Sponsor a Newsroom Project.**
You’ve been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will go towards supporting each of our newsrooms located across nine battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Wisconsin. And that’s not all. Courier is making plans to open newsrooms in New Hampshire and Texas ahead of the 2024 election. **[We’ve set a goal to raise $10,000 by midnight TONIGHT so can we count on you to chip in $5 now and help our newsrooms spread their stories across their states?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74000968/440298702/-924895368?refcode=em20231126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFlNTkxYjMtNzA4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dUuUBpehTwPpEBc8bQnNulLagJhImKyZk__WXtGPhN8=)** **[Chip in $5 ➡️](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74000970/440298703/-924895368?refcode=em20231126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFlNTkxYjMtNzA4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dUuUBpehTwPpEBc8bQnNulLagJhImKyZk__WXtGPhN8=)**
---
Our **Sponsor a Newsroom Project** will be game-changing for our newsrooms and the communities they serve — especially as the presidential election takes off. Our news teams in states like Pennsylvania and Virginia have already shown what a powerful role trustworthy local journalism can have in their recent state elections.
**The stakes will be even higher in November 2024.**
This plan only works though if we can raise enough money to help outfit our newsrooms with the staff, technology, and resources they need.
**[Will you pitch in $5 so we can hit our $10,000 fundraising goal today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74000971/440298704/-924895368?refcode=em20231126&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNWFlNTkxYjMtNzA4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=dUuUBpehTwPpEBc8bQnNulLagJhImKyZk__WXtGPhN8=)**

clean_body: America is in the midst of a vast information gap that our local newsrooms across nine battleground states are working tirelessly to fill. Peter — the 2024 election is already proving to be a critical test for the mainstream media and American democracy. Donald Trump is the first former President to be indicted on criminal charges, but he’s still the overwhelming favorite to win the Republican presidential nomination. The situation is creating a familiar dynamic. The mainstream media gives Trump wall-to-wall coverage while he and his cronies flood right-wing media with lies and propaganda. As a result, right-wing misinformation is thriving , Peter. At Courier, our local newsrooms across nine battleground states work tirelessly to correct misinformation and cover the stories that matter most in local communities. To do that, we make our news stories freely available to anyone who needs them. We publish directly in the online spaces where misinformation thrives. But, to keep it this way, we have to fundraise to support the work of our journalists. In that spirit, we’re excited to announce our Sponsor a Newsroom Project. You’ve been chosen to sponsor our local news teams! Your donation will go towards supporting each of our newsrooms located across nine battleground states — including Arizona, Florida, Iowa, Michigan, Nevada, North Carolina, Pennsylvania, Virginia, and Wisconsin. And that’s not all. Courier is making plans to open newsrooms in New Hampshire and Texas ahead of the 2024 election. = = Our Sponsor a Newsroom Project will be game-changing for our newsrooms and the communities they serve — especially as the presidential election takes off. Our news teams in states like Pennsylvania and Virginia have already shown what a powerful role trustworthy local journalism can have in their recent state elections. The stakes will be even higher in November 2024. This plan only works though if we can raise enough money to help outfit our newsrooms with the staff, technology, and resources they need. = = Thank you, Courier Newsroom Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

subject: The stakes of firing Ted Cruz just got a whole lot higher.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey friend -- It's Colin Allred, and I need to be blunt with you: **The stakes of firing Ted Cruz just got a whole lot higher.**

With Sen. Joe Manchin not running for reelection in West Virginia, GOP mega donors now have millions more to spend targeting close races across the country. It just became more important than ever that Democrats fight for every Senate seat, including in Texas, so we can continue our progress to deliver for the American people.

Together, we can beat Ted Cruz and defend the Senate. But a recent poll shows **14% of Texans are undecided, and I need your help to reach them.** This could be the difference between flipping Texas or putting Mitch McConnell and Ted Cruz in control of the Senate, so please:

**[Will you split a donation of $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC? Every dollar helps make sure we have the resources we need to defeat Ted Cruz and defend our majority in the Senate.](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231126-ColinAllred-AllredTandemUndecidedsPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231126-ColinAllred-AllredTandemUndecidedsPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=12687%2E9716520%2EVtDdIN)**

It's no secret that beating Ted Cruz will be a tall order. But I'm a 4th generation Texan who's defied the odds my whole life -- including when I defeated an 11-term incumbent Republican to win my seat in the House.

**That's why, right after I jumped in to challenge Cruz,_Inside Elections_ announced that Texas had become a "Battleground" race.**

But I need your help.

This race is going to come down to those 14% of undecided voters. To make sure our winning message reaches them, we're going to need to raise enough resources to compete with Ted Cruz's mega donors.

We can win in November, fire Ted Cruz, and elect a senator whose team is Texas. **But it'll take a massive grassroots effort to break through the noise and connect with those undecided voters, and that's why I'm personally asking:**

**[Will you split $5 or more between my campaign and the DSCC today? This race -- and possibly the Senate majority -- will come down to which campaign gets through to the most voters. Your gift will go a long way toward reaching voters across Texas and helping Democrats defend the Senate>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/13292?amount=5&t=5&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20231126-ColinAllred-AllredTandemUndecidedsPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20231126-ColinAllred-AllredTandemUndecidedsPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=12687%2E9716520%2EVtDdIN)**

body:
|
#
---
Team, **The most important election of our lifetime.** We’re sure that you’ve heard that phrase used to describe what seems like _every_ election in recent years. But stick with us. Here’s our case for why it may very well be: MAGA Republicans are dangerously close to retaking the White House and winning control of Congress — and if they do, they are going to do everything they can to reverse the progress we’ve made and impose their radical, out-of-touch agenda on us. If MAGA Republicans win in 2024, they could: 🚨 Pass an extreme national abortion ban with zero exceptions
🚨 Rip away our Social Security and Medicare
🚨 Pass enormous tax cuts for their wealthy friends and donors
🚨 Continue to refuse to address the climate crisis
🚨 Roll back common-sense gun safety measures Democrats have made enormous progress over the past few years — creating good–paying jobs, protecting our fundamental freedoms, growing the middle class, and making health care more affordable. But if we lose in 2024, _**all of the progress we’ve made could be in danger.**_ Team Fight Like Hell PAC is dedicated to electing Democrats across the country and standing up extreme MAGA Republicans who want to reverse the progress we’ve made. **[Ahead of our November end-of-month deadline, will you consider chipping in today so that we’ll have the resources we need to ensure Democrats win up and down the ballot in 2024?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74002247/440302831/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODU5NTkwMWItNzI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SIaS44RA3WNbkjVgFhOCEhxB4oDNBxc8NkQJ-5PNTng=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74002248/440302832/432809736?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOM_AC90_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODU5NTkwMWItNzI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SIaS44RA3WNbkjVgFhOCEhxB4oDNBxc8NkQJ-5PNTng=)

name: Team Gallego
subject: A bit of bad news…
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
We didn’t make enough progress to our goal yesterday.
#

Peter:
Ruben emailed yesterday, and he set a pretty aggressive goal. 15,000 donations by the end of the month.
And this isn’t the news we wanted to share today, but we’ve got to do it.
We didn’t make enough progress to our goal yesterday. Coming on the heels of Thanksgiving, after the NRSC just dropped the first attack ad of the cycle against Ruben, after a poll showed Ruben down by a point against Kari Lake... the timing is terrible.
If we fall short this month, if we show any weakness, Kari Lake, the MAGA-right, and the GOP establishment in DC are going to pour money into attack ads against Ruben. They’ll take any opening we give them, Peter. We can’t let that happen.
So here’s the plan:
[**Send a $5 donation to Ruben’s campaign today. Yes, just $5. It might not seem like $5 is the kind of money that can win a Senate race, but it adds up fast when we’re all chipping in together. And we’ll put that donation to work immediately.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2327?c0=ruben-em-nov23.UQNMpe&refcode=em231126-1-f&t=1&akid=1482%2E734936%2Ekaj_UZ)
[CHIP IN $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/2327?c0=ruben-em-nov23.UQNMpe&refcode=em231126-1-f&t=2&akid=1482%2E734936%2Ekaj_UZ)
If you’d like to chip in more than that it would be greatly appreciated. But really, $5 is all we’re asking for. That’s how we’ll win this campaign — a donation here and there, however much you can afford, whenever you can. Together.
Thank you.
Team Gallego

If you'd like to receive only the most important emails going forward, [tell us at this link](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/fewer_emails/?source=fewer-emails&t=3&akid=1482%2E734936%2Ekaj_UZ). Or, if you need to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1482%2E734936%2Ekaj_UZ). If you would like to support Ruben's campaign for Senate, please consider [making a donation today.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ruben-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1482_734936_kaj_UZ&akid=1482%2E734936%2Ekaj_UZ)
clean_body: We didn’t make enough progress to our goal yesterday. Peter: Ruben emailed yesterday, and he set a pretty aggressive goal. 15,000 donations by the end of the month. And this isn’t the news we wanted to share today, but we’ve got to do it. We didn’t make enough progress to our goal yesterday. Coming on the heels of Thanksgiving, after the NRSC just dropped the first attack ad of the cycle against Ruben, after a poll showed Ruben down by a point against Kari Lake... the timing is terrible. If we fall short this month, if we show any weakness, Kari Lake, the MAGA-right, and the GOP establishment in DC are going to pour money into attack ads against Ruben. They’ll take any opening we give them, Peter. We can’t let that happen. So here’s the plan: If you’d like to chip in more than that it would be greatly appreciated. But really, $5 is all we’re asking for. That’s how we’ll win this campaign — a donation here and there, however much you can afford, whenever you can. Together. Thank you. Friend,

Let me preface this email by saying THANK YOU for all the support you've given me over the past few months. Running for office isn't easy, but when I see everyone ready for change in this country, I know I made the right decision by running for the United States Senate.

All the people who've helped on the campaign trail and the volunteers who have combed the state to support my campaign have genuinely humbled me. The best news is we're just getting started.

Without my grassroots supporters, this campaign would be NOWHERE. [**I can 't do this without you; that's why I hate to ask you again, but there's just too much on the line in 2024. Can you help me again?**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f952c3846fc1455ab1f9d23eb22d8581&_e=xOPPv8UyD8qFsP0WGbGnwcbKDkiZPfBqvYSLj6kY6X1E-NGgqgwnHQsoWREvqg34oho33DXHgBWBEspiXNDHW10Z2lo0Lfh5b22k8UFu555YkQOIhsAeQNZcNvT2fU2pIhJTDIQYfWCPWBe2UsgVRy4SIPn-7l71PmK_m1nikYLrveJDStsgdOy8qbvoRTCHj97yrtsNZsnXtzr-DpzJe3vGj54afPlggcUyggnf3RPvTjJUBRu-SyxDgBM9KGuyWpbCq_uuPcsVZ9j5q_8O-R_RaSNe1OYHG74cW1vD2qwBRb7W5ro0ABQ-NRGZqv_EmZ2DC3qUIm5un2dx0g_YWlwHPR5pBHtxkllMzKUzplvkP2XQezvz4wDGtNESP9PB0UlMh8S55Ztw27lC2GIkvQ%3D%3D)

My radical opponents have taken notice of my campaign; they're calling in all the dark money they have available from their Hollywood donors, and they've already stockpiled MILLIONS of dollars to take me out. The leftist establishment knows I have the best chance at taking out Sherrod Brown, and they're willing to do ANYTHING to take me out of this race. [**We absolutely must win this election.**](https://click.historyoftheday.com/u/click?_t=930f96a60371422687dbefcfca24c32b&_m=f952c3846fc1455ab1f9d23eb22d8581&_e=xOPPv8UyD8qFsP0WGbGnwcbKDkiZPfBqvYSLj6kY6X1E-NGgqgwnHQsoWREvqg34oho33DXHgBWBEspiXNDHW10Z2lo0Lfh5b22k8UFu555YkQOIhsAeQNZcNvT2fU2pIhJTDIQYfWCPWBe2UsgVRy4SIPn-7l71PmK_m1nikYLrveJDStsgdOy8qbvoRTCHj97yrtsNZsnXtzr-DpzJe3vGj54afPlggcUyggnf3RP-o092q3rqDJUk6hCF6BDXYsLJbX96kOhgzIvn-FsvHd7El_2HSPAeYkdptxJElAV2LE0DN7YxpLb0JJQ0-sVYuW8g6kDzj00e2oCgclZvqDh0rklY4Dmkgh4cLlDVR8L3rKo_3q4baw8z9I6wHy9s7-qNTAFAWCfcbDfA0KH4rQ%3D%3D) **I 'M HUMBLY ASKING FOR YOUR HELP**

name: Adam Schiff
subject: "Adam Shifty Schiff"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek, Donald
Trump leveled yet another vile personal attack against me last weekend at
an Iowa campaign rally, riling up his crowd and online MAGA supporters,
and here’s why it matters:

California’s Republican presidential primary and our Senate primary
elections both fall on Super Tuesday, March 5. Trump’s legions of MAGA
supporters are all eligible to vote in our Senate primary election. We
will have to respond to Trump’s lies and attacks by then.

So before I share the ugly details, [ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1004&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]will you rush a contribution of
$3 or
anything you can afford to help my campaign fight back and respond?

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]Trump at a rally yelling into a microphone, calling Adam 'Adam Shifty
Schiff'

“Adam Shifty Schiff, with a neck like a pencil. I said, how does he hold
up that fat, ugly face, with a neck — Pencil Neck. We call him Pencil
Neck. What a dishonest guy.”

Derek, I
have to tell you — being accused of dishonesty (let alone a fat ugly face)
by none other than Donald Trump is a badge of honor that I will always
wear proudly. Because it shows he is afraid of me. And he should be. I
hold him accountable and don’t let him run over me like he does so many
others.

But this is bigger than just me. Trump loathes being held accountable to
the Constitution and our democracy, and he lashes out against anyone who
will defend them.

His attacks on me, on judges and prosecutors, on the press, are an attack
on our entire constitutional order of government, and with California’s 22
million registered voters preparing to vote on Super Tuesday, we cannot
let Trump’s attack go unanswered.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]So
Derek,
rush a contribution of any amount to my Senate campaign to help me respond
to Trump’s latest vile personal attack. I need you with me today.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]EXPRESS DONATE
$3

$10

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=1009&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]EXPRESS DONATE
$25

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=1010&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]EXPRESS DONATE
$50

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=nov2023_abs_em.5RW9ow&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=1011&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]EXPRESS DONATE
$100

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1012&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]ANOTHER AMOUNT

Trump would not attack me so often if he wasn’t terrified of seeing me
elected as California’s next U.S. Senator.

With your support today, we’ll make his worst fears come true — and ensure
that neither he nor any other demagogue can damage our democracy the way
he did, ever again.

— Adam

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=nov2023_abs_em.uaqk5d&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_NO_20231126_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1013&akid=4564%2E5257348%2EH9Wl6F ]Adam Schiff for Senate Banner

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Let me explain:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I cannot do this alone.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=749%2E791427%2E6LWtyH)

Friends, I’ll get right to the point.
I’m reaching out to you directly this morning to humbly ask if you can **[contribute $3 to my re-election campaign today.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231126-1-t1t2&t=2&akid=749%2E791427%2E6LWtyH) Let me explain:
As you may already know, we don’t fund our campaigns for Congress the same as many of my colleagues in Washington.
Instead of relying on corporate PAC contributions or maxout checks from wealthy and powerful industry lobbyists, we count on LOTS of small-dollar, grassroots donations from supporters like you, from all walks of life and from all over the country.
Put simply, what that means is that I cannot do this alone. Each and every one of these contributions — whether they be $1, $100, or anything in between — are critically important to our campaign’s chances of success.
It also means from time to time, I have to ask.
If we’re going to have the resources required in 2024 to take on the right wing, the super PACs, and all the well-funded, well-connected special interests who want to see our progressive movement fail, it’s going to take ALL of us.
So please. I’m asking:
**[Can you make your first contribution — of $3 or any amount that makes sense for you — to stand with our campaign today? I would not be asking if your support was not so important to our fight.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-nov23.oBEWmx&refcode=em231126-1-t1t2&t=3&akid=749%2E791427%2E6LWtyH)

clean_body: I cannot do this alone. Friends, I’ll get right to the point. I’m reaching out to you directly this morning to humbly ask if you can Let me explain: As you may already know, we don’t fund our campaigns for Congress the same as many of my colleagues in Washington. Instead of relying on corporate PAC contributions or maxout checks from wealthy and powerful industry lobbyists, we count on LOTS of small-dollar, grassroots donations from supporters like you, from all walks of life and from all over the country. Put simply, what that means is that I cannot do this alone. Each and every one of these contributions — whether they be $1, $100, or anything in between — are critically important to our campaign’s chances of success. It also means from time to time, I have to ask. If we’re going to have the resources required in 2024 to take on the right wing, the super PACs, and all the well-funded, well-connected special interests who want to see our progressive movement fail, it’s going to take ALL of us. So please. I’m asking: If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | ** | | | | | | | Thank you for everything. name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: How I came to run for office
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)

[](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231126-1-tt&t=2&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)
---
Friends --
While I know our campaign sends a lot of emails your way, I want to take a few to tell you about my decision to run for Senate in the first place, and why your support is so important in our success.
The truth is, we all know America is _going through something_ right now. We seem to be living from crisis to crisis. But there are certain things that should be really simple:
Like living a middle-class life in the state that invented the middle class.
Like making things in America so that we’re in control of our own economic security.
Like protecting our children from the things that are _truly_ harming them.
And preserving our rights and our democracy so that our kids can live their version of the American dream.
**I’m running for Senate because I believe that we need a new generation of leaders that thinks differently, works harder, and never forgets that we are public servants.**
But my decision to run for Senate is also deeply personal to me, and it's related to what motivated me to first run for the House in 2018.
It's about my mom, Judy. She was diagnosed with stage IV ovarian cancer in 2009 — and didn't have health insurance at the time. She had let it lapse after the insurance companies had gouged her for years because she happened to have a pre-existing condition. She passed away in 2011, but that experience — of desperately trying to get her care at the same moment we were filling out bankruptcy paperwork — fueled me to run. I remember the exact moment that made me run: when the then-GOP controlled House of Representatives, the body I now serve in, voted to repeal those protections for people with pre-existing conditions.
Six years later, the Republican leaders, fueled by the extreme wing of the party, are continuing the march to repeal things that the average Americans want. They want to privatize Social Security and Medicare, repeal drug price protections like allowing Medicare to negotiate, then there’s the rights they’re obsessed with repealing: a woman’s right to choose, voting rights, and any possible gun safety legislation.
By winning this Senate seat, we’ll help ensure that Democrats retain the (slight!) majority and can pass legislation that expands access to healthcare. Not the obsession with taking things away.
To be upfront: **Winning this race is going to take a lot of resources. A crazy amount. And we have to do it without raising a single dollar from corporate PACs.**
Donations a year from now – when we’re in the home stretch – are important. But donations now are even more important, because they allow us to map out a strategic plan and make decisions about when and how we reach voters.
[**That is why I would love it if you would consider donating $3 or whatever you can to my campaign today.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231126-1-tt&t=3&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)**
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $3](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/128?c0=ebs-em-nov23.3eWQbG&refcode=em231126-1-tt&t=22&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/129?c0=ebs-em-nov23.F34f-I&refcode=em231126-1-tt&t=23&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)**
---

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-nov23.3rl2W8&refcode=em231126-1-tt&t=25&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/124?c0=ebs-em-nov23.pnH3Jc&refcode=em231126-1-tt&t=26&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/127?c0=ebs-em-nov23.bJItSa&refcode=em231126-1-tt&t=27&akid=837%2E135344%2E9UbwqB)**
---
****
Thank you,
Elissa

name: Pat Harrigan
subject: Last email I’ll ever send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
| | | [](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f873143cf91246d9bd4e855db13ddb29&_e=ehtlAMoXpqrt64_C-DBXkGoiypAA_UXMzCGYHsr82iF_D1FMHb4OQyHuWB-Yd7NysZkbonElwspXrqhEuwoyYuGc68NZtRvtKQQkrQwBIw3mOIV1Vg6M3SmPuyuXlWr7bZvM0TYSOVpk1I8nYZcA_y3SjDiXzQsfnetJzq0-IeubvZOpZktOnCk7nf97eyObwKzSqlj7uvKGDGK8E8jupT-LijmHSvWvtLhiDD3C1tr43L-4YF42jf85vy7g1iNnfBbBI8C38zsm5ZD0fO_DWZmv_RXTw5FbmSd4uZY4_UfI7ZP9feRt-Z_6IGgB5zlNZ9HaA93YqmGadWpX_PtDGxI1y3eXnLD-JvBVCUOZPqY%3D)
---
Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you.

You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way.

**But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. **

My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat.

After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls.

**I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. **

Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map.
---
[**That 's why I'm humbly asking if you'll chip in just a few bucks today.**](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f873143cf91246d9bd4e855db13ddb29&_e=ehtlAMoXpqrt64_C-DBXkGoiypAA_UXMzCGYHsr82iF_D1FMHb4OQyHuWB-Yd7NysZkbonElwspXrqhEuwoyYuGc68NZtRvtKQQkrQwBIw3mOIV1Vg6M3SmPuyuXlWr7bZvM0TYSOVpk1I8nYZcA_y3SjDiXzQsfnetJzq0-IeubvZOpZktOnCk7nf97eyOboIvnEExv0ojBxLJ_Ny7Yzsp1uT_FoL6R3GhZNtY69kxt1xpHYe2r3AS2JZUdN6tFTRAZm5WJqC7F2zOZfJfuJxKqoRSPg1QOr99EPxd0PKBtjWT4ihsiQFArTmko3NBS2TmI9HOnWqO3301C-tTZdPLfuqkPcQd-iyuwhpdZN8c%3D)
---
The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before...

I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - **really, really tough. **

The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts.

[Please have my back on this one:](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=f873143cf91246d9bd4e855db13ddb29&_e=ehtlAMoXpqrt64_C-DBXkGoiypAA_UXMzCGYHsr82iF_D1FMHb4OQyHuWB-Yd7NysZkbonElwspXrqhEuwoyYuGc68NZtRvtKQQkrQwBIw3mOIV1Vg6M3SmPuyuXlWr7bZvM0TYSOVpk1I8nYZcA_y3SjDiXzQsfnetJzq0-IeubvZOpZktOnCk7nf97eyOb-j9JFW6q8NYlZmJbWiRAfZZHtoy82QAVQiVXv2TABRvy4B4oYIQqBcQw4IZZbCZkZb_szCIfNhcvPCYCuX8k-yCEYcv88V2vSXfwHJ-KidPHDAS2nlH7yNEpHsG65H2NYJID22ocNf9kbii8MiI7OAnuQxHnDu4siaOswJzAKg4%3D)
---
