clean_body: | | | Fellow American, This is the first and last email I'll ever send you. You see, I'm a little unsure about opening up to you this way. But the deck is stacked against us, my back is against the wall, and your response to this message will decide everything. My name is Pat Harrigan. You don't know me, but I'm a Green Beret veteran from North Carolina. I graduated from West Point, and I served 18 months in combat. After that, my wife and I started a firearm parts company from our double-wide trailer - and grew it to become a successful, job-creating business. And most important of all, I'm the dad of two beautiful girls. I 'm also a GOP candidate in the MUST WIN race in NC, a district that WILL decide who controls Washington. Nancy Pelosi and Joe Biden already have $100 million bucks ready to trash our GOP candidates in every swing district on the map. The talking heads and political know-it-alls say I can't win this race. But I bet you've heard that one before... I'm not the kind of guy who asks for help, but starting a grassroots campaign is tough - really, really tough. The Democrats won't stop attacking us and cutting off every path to victory we have. Folks like you & me - they hate our guts. Look, I'm not a politician. I'm nothing flashy or special, just a regular guy who loves this country more than anything. So, I'm opening my heart to you today in hopes you'll stand with me. I won't give you empty promises & fancy slogans. That's not me. But I'll give you my word as a veteran that I'll fight with all I have to do what's right and make you proud. Thank you & God bless. Pat Harrigan GOP Conservative Candidate North Carolina's 14th District | | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee | | Pat Harrigan is a former member of the U.S. Army. name: MAGA Watch (via Team Swalwell)
subject: MAGA Mike ✈️ Mar-A-Lago
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
The Speaker of the House has him on speed dial, access to his travel, and is “all in” on supporting him in 2024. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74007885/440320122/-1254787857?refcode=headerfooter-header&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYjdlNzUwMC03ZDhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZDtm_b6Nmn5dm_mpr1OF-pf02HZBIOremtqiUw6CO8Q=)

And what has Sinema done to earn these Republicans’ admiration in the first place? Well for starters, she confirmed over 100 of Trump’s judges – and then when Democrats took the Senate and President Biden won, she did everything she could to obstruct progress for hardworking Americans while doing the bidding of Wall Street.

Sinema blocked voting rights and she obstructed abortion rights – but she made sure that the carried interest loophole stayed intact.
We know Sinema’s priorities – and so do Arizona voters. No wonder only 2% of Sinema’s donations were grassroots donations.
Time and again, Sinema proves she’s going to put herself and her donors – the ones footing the bill for her vacations – above the needs of hardworking, everyday Arizonans. __**_[Please chip in so we can let everyone in Arizona know before 2024: Sinema sold out and we’re going to fight tooth and nail to replace her.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zztRR-VocW8jOgYjlrgeNU9DSTSPLzvk8_Dqzw_mhDUXTCfT1zBV5NtgOiqdenH5AcEWk_gYrgqi8OrvNSItF1yF8Nz27kn_F1qw-lAeEJ4UdsKZ-ZcGscRFc9-CJXj3-Q8OPHBPeCbzhEEw8ddTjNLHFaNe_kBEKliepODV5fTxPNnk9BcI59-emeJBbTKGRsK9KUaAoNfwlFBJeZf08kp3fDvFLqXn9vRBzFf-ysk6t0GsxCYklREUGc2GaYFJQzgHNY6nsV3LmaUQbJbNekAHsENcdeOA5LObkSx0_B8A/41m/ThRGmODQRBCupqeXAOQJ2g/h7/bESqyCTW5LBYWBlFfDqIfsAJ9reaBlUe1atG7wjmwfA)_ **

name: Team Lizzie
subject: 100 days to go!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie-reelect-logo-outlined.png]
We are 100 days away from the Texas primary election!
We’re building a strong foundation for Lizzie’s re-election, starting with the primary in March. With so much on the line this election, we know how important it is that we do everything we can in these next 100 days to hold on to this seat. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231126?refcode=lpfe231126]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231126?refcode=lpfe231126 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231126?refcode=lpfe231126]
In case you missed it, three candidates have announced that they are interested in challenging Lizze in the Democratic primary 100 days from today.
We know Lizzie is the right person for this job, and we are going to spend the next 100 days talking to voters about why. And you know what that means by now: hiring a field team to talk to voters, putting mail in their mailboxes, placing ads where people will see them, and putting up signs. You also know that all takes money.
We know we can do this—we’ve done it before! In 2018, Lizzie defeated seven candidates to win the Democratic primary and beat a nine-term Republican incumbent to become the first Democrat in more than 50 years, and the first woman ever, to represent #TX07!
There are more than 100 things you can do to help—whether it’s making phone calls, sending texts, knocking on doors, adding your name, sending postcards, or posting on social. Today, we are hoping you will help us by contributing:
Send 100 Dollars - $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231126?refcode=lpfe231126&amount=100]
Send 100 Quarters - $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231126?refcode=lpfe231126&amount=25]
Send 100 Dimes - $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231126?refcode=lpfe231126&amount=10]
Send 100 Pennies - $1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe231126?refcode=lpfe231126&amount=1]
We’ll be in touch about the others, too. Thanks so much for all that you do!
Thanks,
Team Lizzie
PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS

name: Bob Casey
subject: We have a lot of work to do before our deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
It looks like this could be our toughest race yet, and we have a lot of work to do. |
#
Folks, this is Senator Bob Casey from Pennsylvania. Make no mistake: our new GOP opponent, Mitch McConnell, and national Republicans are going to pull out all the stops to flip Pennsylvania. Their determination to win PA’s Senate seat could make this the most expensive race in the country. It’s a rare privilege to serve the people of our Commonwealth in the U.S. Senate, and I don’t take this responsibility for granted. Pennsylvanians deserve a Senator in Washington working for them and their families. It is an honor that they’ve trusted me to do just that. It’s why we’re working so hard to ensure that we can compete with the flood of dark money the other side is planning to spend against us. **[This moment matters. If you’re ready to help us hold this seat, split a donation between my re-election campaign and Tina Smith’s today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74009838/440326223/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231126_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjljOTRkZC03ZjhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnupElA-DFio21DbAlj3BDWBE8U933Ui8j8GbCA7xR8=)** | [DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74009839/440326224/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231126_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjljOTRkZC03ZjhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnupElA-DFio21DbAlj3BDWBE8U933Ui8j8GbCA7xR8=)
---
It looks like this could be our toughest race yet, and we have a lot of work to do.
We’re up against McConnell’s hand-picked candidate — a mega-millionaire who could easily self-fund his campaign.
Plus, national Republicans are committed to doing in 2024 what they almost did here in 2022 and 2020 – flip Pennsylvania red.
They didn’t win then, and they won’t win now. If we come together, we can make sure we continue making progress in Washington for the people of Pennsylvania.
**[Please, if you can, split a donation between my campaign and Tina Smith’s.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74009840/440326225/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231126_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjljOTRkZC03ZjhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnupElA-DFio21DbAlj3BDWBE8U933Ui8j8GbCA7xR8=)**
With gratitude,
Bob Casey
Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
---
Tina Smith for Minnesota
PO Box 14362
St. Paul, MN 55114
United States
[Fewer emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74009841/440326226/704600832?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231126_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjljOTRkZC03ZjhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnupElA-DFio21DbAlj3BDWBE8U933Ui8j8GbCA7xR8=&emci=719c94dd-7f8c-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&emdi=729c94dd-7f8c-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=6227932) | [Unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/waoR0e7lX0uLW5LEbBO87Q2?unsubscribedata=68d6HwcJ6crJIuQTY4mLEGRQBtRywxoJc1MAhBqwpiVwFEpxyKGVCYIYpfH8QZgqVDOG2EymnKD02R9feqZLIV5gNuMb57Hd40TVIcckf0elk7PkhtFw8nnh4btq3aSO%2BJW0EcTnoo6dd0Pt67ohghALK85kVSBcmCmc06%2BIU2nT3dnFurzNjj8%2BIukBXEtQ0z6Pkht1paidjUpl7VXjiPCJMdkAS%2FSDz3p2fd1RCcVeqCzZlzxv2rJgrRvDth6DDehWQYS1v%2F0hyHlXlAGL%2FXT4hZX3kpnqBJode3Lu6CjiRjLwLHOzNLjMI%2BGI6bqNRcC0RqAcrs8oSFAzGnkSnRhc5aX4F0fuQPz0YkXUcL7BTci0HRINwPljXWGzJX9G623YLcm7V0melSdMmsLFM8PEzT3OFkjue50OrmAkhu8%3D) | [Privacy Policy](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74009842/440326227/1262160201?refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20231126_AM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MjljOTRkZC03ZjhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WnupElA-DFio21DbAlj3BDWBE8U933Ui8j8GbCA7xR8=&emci=719c94dd-7f8c-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&emdi=729c94dd-7f8c-ee11-8924-6045bdd47111&ceid=6227932)

name: Powered By People
subject: Following up on your questions to Beto
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

A few weeks back, we reached out and asked if you had any questions for
Beto. After going through hundreds of submissions, we sent the most
frequently asked questions to Beto for him to answer!

You can read his responses below. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231126.cWMVl_&refcode=ema20231126-235458&t=1001&akid=235458%2E444211%2EFC4eG4 ]But first — if you can, please
consider making a donation of $3 or more today to fund the important work
that Beto outlines in his answers.

“How can Texas get abortion rights on the ballot like they did in Ohio?”

Earlier this month, Ohioans voted to enshrine abortion rights into their
state constitution, becoming the seventh state to pass a citizen-led
ballot initiative on reproductive freedom since the fall of Roe v. Wade.

Unfortunately, Texas law doesn’t allow for citizen-led ballot initiatives.
Only the state legislature can propose constitutional amendments — and the
majority-Republican House and Senate have blocked all efforts to place
abortion rights on the ballot.

That means the only way to restore abortion rights in Texas is to change
who’s in power. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/59973?t=1002&akid=235458%2E444211%2EFC4eG4 ]If you want to help us elect pro-choice leaders in
Texas, click here to learn how to become a Volunteer Deputy Registrar so
you can help register voters in your community.

“How are donations spent by Powered by People?”

While Republicans have made Texas the hardest state in the nation to
register to vote and cast a ballot, donations from our supporters are
helping us fight back.

These grassroots contributions have enabled us to register over 250,000
Texans to vote. They’ve allowed us to call and text millions of voters,
hold in-person canvasses across the state, and help produce historic voter
turnout in Texas over the past few election cycles.

To learn more about the work your donation will support in 2024, [ https://act.betoorourke.com/signup/volunteer-kickoff-webinar/?source=ema20231126-235458&t=1003&akid=235458%2E444211%2EFC4eG4 ]please
join us on December 5th for our 2024 Kickoff Webinar, where we’ll talk
about our plans for next year and how you can get involved.

"With so much extremism in Texas, what motivates you to keep going?”

My heroes are people like Lawrence Nixon, who labored for more than 20
years to break the “white primary” in Texas, and John Lewis, beaten so
bloody that he almost died marching for the right to vote in Selma.

When I’m tempted to despair, I think of those heroes of the past who
refused to accept things as they were. They achieved major victories for
American democracy through their tenacity and perseverance.

I also think about my kids. Their generation will inherit the world we
leave behind and will undoubtedly judge us on what we achieve and what we
fail to achieve. The more time I spend with them, the more committed I
become to the work of organizing the voters we need to win the big,
important elections that will decide the future of our state and country.

We hope Beto’s answers to your questions help inspire you on a path of
action ahead of the 2024 elections. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20231126.cWMVl_&refcode=ema20231126-235458&t=1004&akid=235458%2E444211%2EFC4eG4 ]It is the antidote to despair and
the key to victory — so please, make a donation of $3 today to help fund
Powered by People’s work to register and mobilize Texas voters.

Thank you,

— Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=235458%2E444211%2EFC4eG4

PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Can I share some of my thoughts with you?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
While I was having breakfast this morning, I found myself thinking of the GIFFORDS community and wanted to reach out to you personally.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231126-1-30-nor&t=1&akid=6940%2E3935704%2EN1jvua)
---
Hi there, it’s Gabby Giffords.
While I was having breakfast this morning, I found myself thinking of the GIFFORDS community and wanted to reach out to you personally.
Over twelve years ago, I was shot in the head while meeting with constituents in Tucson, Arizona. I’ve been in recovery every single day since then. I often think about my recovery the same way I think about our movement to end gun violence: some days are more difficult than others.
It hasn’t been an easy journey for me, but even on my darkest days, I’ve refused to give up hope. Today, I encourage you to take a moment to renew your hope that we can and will have a future someday where the threat of gun violence no longer looms over us.
I know this work isn’t easy. But the fights worth having rarely are. That’s why we can never, ever give up.
[**I can’t do this work alone. So please, can I ask you to chip in $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today?**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-nov23.H_pglF&refcode=em231126-1-30-nor&t=2&akid=6940%2E3935704%2EN1jvua)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

---

---

| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-nov23.yh47H-&refcode=em231126-1-30-nor&t=23&akid=6940%2E3935704%2EN1jvua)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-nov23.a4zGU7&refcode=em231126-1-30-nor&t=24&akid=6940%2E3935704%2EN1jvua)**
---

| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-nov23.d42LVW&refcode=em231126-1-30-nor&t=25&akid=6940%2E3935704%2EN1jvua)**
---
****

****
Thank you. Your support makes a world of difference for our movement.
My very best,
Gabby Giffords

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Kevin Thomas
subject: I hate to bother you on a Sunday.

body:
From Detroit to Gaza, I will keep defending our rights and our shared humanity. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvXfjOP8KWeTiWuVCHRbgi_IN1VoQa5io0nJ6sgnNyVk4zx3ThOvJ09VUVaooYAdcGV1LAdWBoLie2XVM1wKC0mEngDOYQXeE2kAFl6-kH3M5jZxZPYTZ8LbqEpP95LWDnIBvIQsOa2oH_qW-2Xwk8zOsV1jBIh9H96XaW1GD_AwryASw_CMtQLvyqF8JgvMDomo_iDz0ZXqUP8SWeryPv4BsfsUGarLYmYrWylWHzbEdqDkIiSbRIfCpP93FucFI0zMPoGZGmC9OeCUMiJ1qw9f6X9FT2a1vp7ElzFb70YuPJdeJL8CmXLfPOODHg33NBDtOLYmwoqpbgrnKtL6bk9g/41m/8jTefy6LRyqgJqsdm4vI6Q/h0/mbjORNUNkW5jFCsACUORL8oUKuo2ffgcPCzUl-vDx-w)
---
Friend, In recent weeks, U.S. police have assaulted Americans at nonviolent protests for a ceasefire, including at a multi-faith vigil for a ceasefire in Washington, DC. Without warning, police pepper-sprayed, punched, kicked, and threw protesters down stairs. Police injured about 90 people, many of whom were Jewish people lovingly saying “not in our name.” Growing up in Detroit, I was taught to march and protest for freedom, justice and more at an early age. It is what I did to demand clean air, an end to police brutality, and illegal foreclosures in my own neighborhood. So for me, this is how we fight against fascism and oppression. Where we fight against those who would rather fund bombs, wars, and oppression rather than the calls from their own constituents demanding an end to the madness of wars. It is our responsibility as Americans, human beings, to raise our voices and exercise our full rights under the Constitution. **These brutal, authoritarian tactics are outrageous, and they undermine our democracy and our civil rights.** [**Please sign if you agree: Instead of funding war and militarized police that threaten our communities and our movements, we urgently need to invest in human needs like clean water, access to healthcare, and housing.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mtZW8B_8qtJj-DttZsUqQ57zyRfxsdpPfaiOoCQP_pLmVkHbFVeWUp2fZXZS5-EMJiIEqq98JkPwJl0iiRw05rIkT1C4Wrd64BaMMBnqGsSycO7c2L--2DVg72KGEizmC1ymVBIpf9RtL_HjTKFR6cz_OODzFcLf12XJks4YaVG0U5cexRkBDuVUTgMg78VYowwvTK55EK0qsi113kZaNh_EJ3pRBvNqyCcO67vvzwqm4x7D6Aaa8acl1MTFoIUBzcTPBkae2oU75FmsIbb40DO3CXmqOASt5rR7YQwNF8WLro2V1Tvk3zxkgAPSyOqMisLrmG6ZIFaRjsm41FZ4ihy5XEtWuh41m2kwo1hQ3b0bM1ebIN76CoyMB-jw-__engYYwBlhUMLQILlvOX_tFu45diIZVSLXL3ALphDYzmIipgusT502MmUaNj7v1_vEPBGqyHibpaXs8mg-jwhtPjDLJpStON19CUg_pQZ6Eg5_oLk_Zcyyxphb6IOey7Jor5_EinQ0l8Z-i9JDGqD34bQ/41m/8jTefy6LRyqgJqsdm4vI6Q/h1/z3vWSIQN9WHOy-ykgNnsGL0gqERCc-_j3qdZNSv_5rI) | [SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mtZW8B_8qtJj-DttZsUqQ57zyRfxsdpPfaiOoCQP_pLmVkHbFVeWUp2fZXZS5-EMJiIEqq98JkPwJl0iiRw05rIkT1C4Wrd64BaMMBnqGsSycO7c2L--2DVg72KGEizmCVfHMVTbIWF_sSk2FnrlPUKRO7jiFzu_HhTeoK4wcJBXm2v1AJlFQWcwCgdSRhwebtBbH1RxNNJsOwJPKdpOrefTNKGyc5UEni9UI_vhZnEoTFIGzwy4S49ZfA28iuaNDHS4dbfJbbRRvoFDR8X1ZqhH-NxcKeMQfGdJr1Y-8Uvu7702N2BkF_QoQs7W5uKpgx2PDPj2RjuzJz4kjqNWpbr0_T8VwU-DTF-ouEcaCi0aS0TyWdAbFSqAGvfrRsHGG_mVgbaGV7CimhK5qeVmv88iMtmUDlQSStvTnVxFVc91j_hHjmbzhAcXxD-M7L3ggcQyVbdsuRIerRAEMcxkqXqxAETX0KgWZi4cPGgWMp4aofRpOXpguJC0_ldANrjH_lnE0bp3dusUehuwTrhB0ow/41m/8jTefy6LRyqgJqsdm4vI6Q/h2/BC_ywNjBdTQjXlcRJqlcDOvM5VYOnrTmce0sTMlA-YI)
---
Anti-war advocates held a nonviolent vigil, lighting candles, singing in DC begging to be heard alongside the 80% of American Democrats who want a ceasefire.
As a member of Congress, I pride myself in listening to and engaging with my residents, even when it's hard. However, many colleagues would rather ignore and hope the movement would just disappear. Some even slandered and accused their constituents of supporting terrorism. It was the same members who refuse to support a ceasefire.
I still remember the police using tear gas on people peacefully protesting against Cop City, a massive training center for militarized policing in Atlanta. Georgia officials have shamefully charged these nonviolent activists with domestic terrorism and racketeering. This isn't democracy, it's fascism.
**These attempts to criminalize and suppress dissent are dangerous attacks on our First Amendment right to protest. And those same police departments in Atlanta and DC have long collaborated with Israeli police and military.**
Jewish Voice for Peace, Amnesty International, Human Rights Watch, and others have denounced these “deadly exchanges,” where American and Israeli agents of state violence train each other to subjugate marginalized communities, surveil grassroots movements, and silence people who are speaking up for human rights.
No one should be harassed or dehumanized by government agents. We can’t keep spending U.S. tax dollars on war crimes abroad and increasingly militarized police forces that abuse human rights at home.
It’s clear that these harmful systems of oppression are intertwined, and we especially cannot justify funding them when our neighbors are struggling to put food on the table, fighting to keep a roof over their heads, and are forced to ration their medication.
[**Sign the petition: Instead of funding war and militarized policing, we need to invest in human needs.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mtZW8B_8qtJj-DttZsUqQ57zyRfxsdpPfaiOoCQP_pLmVkHbFVeWUp2fZXZS5-EMJiIEqq98JkPwJl0iiRw05rIkT1C4Wrd64BaMMBnqGsSycO7c2L--2DVg72KGEizmCQ-m7-ewcEQbf4FOjj9IW-ZPUSqQwlsBTjL56PtM9SPxlpDGHzf-fDUI01fiQM3DRfnK_RbUJNlalrJzeMRxKUqFlrECiXb3WdwYfVeaL7ulrOEaaGS4H91qy-n4Ql079ZBMuPfDvIr6Fka9OM3BhmWFYpHn2LF26QguSzarSB7bbVtCTZzrX5wbrfP_Lotwsa1hlw6K263flpcRZjuZki-SLb85ccVzhTqJSUpYE59fB8jDPemimaJV0K2F-AxvVzKET5BEnITY7ohNpRguw7uf3taCVN_Npr9yda2fKqL35JzPYnd_iUFAvjS7ik2KJh_tIP_r6M_O8GnbsLpvBag579lYS6Xb_1d7Mn2mB5ptjipqwzTQjIH4YYCOjByNnVcTfOdPPg3udaQcypb405A/41m/8jTefy6LRyqgJqsdm4vI6Q/h3/vWwe2ErrmrDRoIPKRtnsjIcuein_8ZmldOqUvQo3VLo)
[SIGN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm9hFWYg4Cpvcku7P80uO4mtZW8B_8qtJj-DttZsUqQ57zyRfxsdpPfaiOoCQP_pLmVkHbFVeWUp2fZXZS5-EMJiIEqq98JkPwJl0iiRw05rIkT1C4Wrd64BaMMBnqGsSycO7c2L--2DVg72KGEizmCwtuoL31BDKQgW69UiEt_WPnmzcRsl3DjKKj-i3294PnldBzbPbgtQgZe1ibcJWaJH44fJTBQa56e9R-VS_9lFsfHnz-sWYD77l1jOSegNvIuTjw3SwFeejYnq_Iok9I29NlWHoFyJbaUTcKHk30q_mbky31rAnJWXvujM4HY_oTJzO9Fwmfbi-Q7xWSHP7RE-Wn5mq-oOK_B6VlNT3D_Ta4dD5D5p-3wGEzHuTHzXDrur8hOGjI4t5Zv--hf8EABvgqic1sCFBeEQY5CRUE7iZuVQyaG3mXhfFP6J-q0E15O5ykVZRydtBUdYL1YEiDuJDkHfZg3bVephTKFEf3OdW2qxRilpLeQdDy_ERo5vSdfycMUXrW9CxnD_qseaWbcV2F6zC9a-5F2EsXppnf2wg/41m/8jTefy6LRyqgJqsdm4vI6Q/h4/5z9AiFo6udns-YP2Az0mES7tb9hz882ZjXkMEBkaRuE)

From Detroit to Gaza, I will continue to demand equality and justice for all. I will keep defending our rights and our shared humanity.
In solidarity,
Rashida

clean_body: From Detroit to Gaza, I will keep defending our rights and our shared humanity. | | | Friend, In recent weeks, U.S. police have assaulted Americans at nonviolent protests for a ceasefire, including at a multi-faith vigil for a ceasefire in Washington, DC. Without warning, police pepper-sprayed, punched, kicked, and threw protesters down stairs. Police injured about 90 people, many of whom were Jewish people lovingly saying “not in our name.” Growing up in Detroit, I was taught to march and protest for freedom, justice and more at an early age. It is what I did to demand clean air, an end to police brutality, and illegal foreclosures in my own neighborhood. So for me, this is how we fight against fascism and oppression. Where we fight against those who would rather fund bombs, wars, and oppression rather than the calls from their own constituents demanding an end to the madness of wars. It is our responsibility as Americans, human beings, to raise our voices and exercise our full rights under the Constitution. These brutal, authoritarian tactics are outrageous, and they undermine our democracy and our civil rights. | Anti-war advocates held a nonviolent vigil, lighting candles, singing in DC begging to be heard alongside the 80% of American Democrats who want a ceasefire. As a member of Congress, I pride myself in listening to and engaging with my residents, even when it's hard. However, many colleagues would rather ignore and hope the movement would just disappear. Some even slandered and accused their constituents of supporting terrorism. It was the same members who refuse to support a ceasefire. I still remember the police using tear gas on people peacefully protesting against Cop City, a massive training center for militarized policing in Atlanta. Georgia officials have shamefully charged these nonviolent activists with domestic terrorism and racketeering. This isn't democracy, it's fascism. These attempts to criminalize and suppress dissent are dangerous attacks on our First Amendment right to protest. And those same police departments in Atlanta and DC have long collaborated with Israeli police and military. Jewish Voice for Peace, Amnesty International, Human Rights Watch, and others have denounced these “deadly exchanges,” where American and Israeli agents of state violence train each other to subjugate marginalized communities, surveil grassroots movements, and silence people who are speaking up for human rights. No one should be harassed or dehumanized by government agents. We can’t keep spending U.S. tax dollars on war crimes abroad and increasingly militarized police forces that abuse human rights at home. It’s clear that these harmful systems of oppression are intertwined, and we especially cannot justify funding them when our neighbors are struggling to put food on the table, fighting to keep a roof over their heads, and are forced to ration their medication. From Detroit to Gaza, I will continue to demand equality and justice for all. I will keep defending our rights and our shared humanity. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

---
Last week, FOX News sports reporter Charissa Thompson publicly [admitted](https://substack.com/redirect/ade72417-3092-4c40-9cc7-41485a785843?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to making up quotes in published articles that she attributed to coaches when they failed to respond in time to meet publication deadlines. She eventually [apologized](https://substack.com/redirect/a01d522e-e832-4606-83e2-a342bc5c0f38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), after drawing condemnation from an entire industry of widely co-opted writers & editors seemingly [unwilling](https://substack.com/redirect/a01d522e-e832-4606-83e2-a342bc5c0f38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to look in the mirror.
It's entirely fair to criticize a journalist for inventing quotes, or for failing to immediately apologize when their ethical lapses are discovered. But those important critiques observe merely the tips of a vast, still overlooked iceberg.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c5ff3e8b-81fa-4253-b2af-97de1b76f3ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Even setting aside the consistent role of journalists as [propagandists](https://substack.com/redirect/24b66381-9666-40f7-927a-294f69a5a598?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) dedicated to promoting [disinformation](https://substack.com/redirect/9d91caf4-cbca-4bfb-9175-fce8269c1077?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) favoring Wall Street and the Pentagon at the cost of human rights and life on Earth, further problems abound--not the least of which is the unfortunate use of the term "journalism" to describe reporting on ultimately predatory industries that reduces "journalism" to public relations and unpaid advertising.
In this article, I'll focus on writers and so-called "journalists" who cover sports. Those who cover entertainment generally demonstrate the same pattern, but I'll save a case study expanding the pattern beyond sports for another post.
### **The scandal in plain sight**
Making up quotes is a violation of press ethics, full stop. There is simply no justification for a reporter putting words in the mouths of sources who are fully capable of speaking for themselves, and the institutions they help lead.
Many critics leapt on the chance to observe Thompson's admission of ethical failure, especially since her initial [failure](https://substack.com/redirect/a01d522e-e832-4606-83e2-a342bc5c0f38?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to acknowledge its severity appeared so painfully oblivious. Yet most critiques of Thompson reflected impressive myopia, focusing on obvious problems while overlooking those looming in the shadows.
### **Bread & circus to opiate the masses**
Many contemporary observers of corruption within the pharmaceutical industry might be surprised to discover that the pattern of opiates addicting people en masse is far from a recent problem. In another century, [the British Empire fought a series of wars with China](https://substack.com/redirect/22bca752-9334-4c81-ab06-0bc9845a01e6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to establish its power to run drugs, specifically opium, and reap profits by subjecting an entire civilian population to addiction despite the Chinese government's attempts to criminalize the trade.
The opium trade, and the imperial wars to secure it, were not only [commercial enterprises](https://substack.com/redirect/37693d46-bfb0-47bf-b6d5-18c87b6d9718?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for the British, but also [political ones](https://substack.com/redirect/0df49368-f338-4e86-94fb-dd17ffa5e73f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The opium trade helped remedy a European trade deficit driven by Chinese tea exports, filled the coffers of the British crown, and also helped cultivate docility among Chinese subjects of British colonialism. British military dominance over China eventually led the British to [gain sovereignty over Hong Kong](https://substack.com/redirect/2f7920ba-cdd4-40e1-bf9a-212913a39358?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from 1841 until 1997, interrupted only by four years of Japanese occupation during the Second World War.
Observing the impacts of the opium trade on China may have helped prompt Karl Marx to observe how institutional religion has played a similar role, [convincing downtrodden](https://substack.com/redirect/e565d987-8701-475f-b3f5-900c6e7bea0d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) people to accept their lot in this life based on promises about one to come. (Incidentally, one of my favorite songs by Arrested Development, who wrote powerful hits including [Tennessee](https://substack.com/redirect/33a03856-26ed-4046-b450-db43451b9614?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and [Mr. Wendal](https://substack.com/redirect/8b992566-0861-4343-9e18-14e6f0326ce5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), is [Fishin 4 Religion](https://substack.com/redirect/1519f809-1b63-4160-b381-8dec2ccdfea9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The song offers a powerful depiction of this pattern emerging in the Bible Belt)
Sports journalism, as well as entire industries of professional sports, play the same roles today that opium did in China 200 years ago.
Learning anything new? Subscribe to stay informed! Subscriptions are free, while paid subscriptions help expand my work.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..fVQO6ZFj5bMim6wt_6IaELur6tFoCbvRsv1h1gbCYhU?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=139158132)
### **" Journalism" as public relations**
Actual journalism is [rooted](https://substack.com/redirect/e9ac7e16-a59d-433d-861a-d07c9c1759ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in adversarial accountability: it aims to document events _in order to_ enable public accountability.
But what if reporters document events involving figures who don't have any public authority? What, exactly, is the point of "journalism" about industries, beyond simply promoting them?
Sports "journalism" abandons any pretense of accountability. Like entertainment "journalism," it serves nothing beyond promoting a for-profit industry.
Journalism empowers and enables democracy. But writing and broadcasts about industries, from sports to entertainment, instead serve capitalism.
### **Standing above the law**
Most industries are subject to federal laws governing competition that aim to protect consumers and the marketplace. Laws preventing monopolists from abusing their market power are the basis for lawsuits recently waged by the Federal Trade Commission and the Department of Justice against corporate defendants including [Google](https://substack.com/redirect/388f4c82-2f68-4884-8be4-e258b1010ba6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), [Facebook](https://substack.com/redirect/c279a37a-2667-4d49-a4aa-31578ef67344?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) / Meta, and [Amazon](https://substack.com/redirect/76963ff0-64b3-438f-a47a-09ed48cba1c3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Antitrust laws have been applied in earlier eras to everything from independent booksellers to railway bridges, and have been held to prohibit everything from [price fixing](https://substack.com/redirect/9a808d5e-a708-4be3-95ac-dbcf658147a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by horizontal competitors to [predatory pricing](https://substack.com/redirect/b5906221-f07d-4e92-b55d-b11b6072e789?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by a single enterprise. Monopolists have been held liable for violating antitrust laws even for simply [denying competitors access](https://substack.com/redirect/7c6ec505-fdb8-48fe-a94f-fd5a9b104ee7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to facilities deemed essential to enable competition (like a bridge over a river, or a national telecommunications network).
Yet sports leagues are generally immune from these laws--not for any defensible purpose, but because they wield enough influence to have effectively bent the law in their favor. Professional baseball gained its exemption from antitrust laws due to the largesse of the Supreme Court, which in 1922 unanimously (and absurdly) held that professional baseball did not affect interstate trade or commerce, despite Major League Baseball today generating over [$10 billion in annual revenue](https://substack.com/redirect/cf8bde3b-647d-4ff6-bd44-11168a2d73b7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) predicated on interstate sales of items including merchandise, tickets, and telecasts.
As sports leagues generated major revenue for broadcast outlets, the industries of sports and entertainment came together to effectively bribe Members of Congress into granting them statutory exemptions. In 1961, a federal court [ruled](https://substack.com/redirect/55ef03da-8746-4e5c-b1ff-1a76317787a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) against the National Football League and CBS in an antitrust case brought by the government. That victory [prompted](https://substack.com/redirect/bad41af8-581f-4f21-8d59-663fed25fdbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Congress to pass the Sports Broadcast Act (SBA) in the very same year, immunizing sports leagues and broadcast outlets from antitrust scrutiny.
Today, the NFL's arrangement with outlets to whom it grants exclusive broadcasting rights is facing [a new challenge](https://substack.com/redirect/fd639628-7b33-4662-a501-e5327c98f844?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The plaintiffs, including public establishments and individual subscribers to DirecTV's NFL Sunday Ticket package, won an initial victory on appeal a few years ago. Crucial to that decision was the distinction between broadcast outlets (which were covered by the 1961 SBA) and cable (which had not yet emerged and which the law did not explicitly address). But the case [remains](https://substack.com/redirect/4825b5d2-b05d-4aed-82f4-d760351ba64f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in litigation, and the league's antitrust exemption survives for now.
It's not only the case that sports "journalism" abandons ethical journalism to instead embrace what amounts to unpaid advertising. It particularly represents unpaid advertising on behalf of an industry that has captured policymakers and bent the law to favor of the wealthy owners of teams.
Thank you for reading! As a dissident voice challenging bipartisan and rampant corporate corruption, I rely on readers in order to reach new audiences. Feel free to share this post!
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1018597&post_id=139158132&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTM5MTU4MTMyLCJpYXQiOjE3MDEwMjM5MTUsImV4cCI6MTcwMzYxNTkxNSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTEwMTg1OTciLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.ytZMnI2gb8TzY9ZH-HQCL9ZnY5ft7NTYAshFXOUoc1w)
### **The short end of the stick**
Fans watch sports in order to observe players. Yet, ironically, it is players who have been most consistently abused by the leagues for which they play.
What could better reflect fascism than forcing celebrities onto the sidelines when they decline to participate in the public performance of hypocritical nationalistic rituals? The pledge of allegiance references "liberty and justice for all," but both values have actually been in short supply across the United States since its founding over two centuries ago.
Many sports, particularly contact sports like football, routinely subject participants to serious injury, including traumatic brain injuries that often lead to devastating cumulative impacts. A study of deceased former NFL players found that [nearly 90% of them suffered from degenerative brain disease](https://substack.com/redirect/194e166d-a6dd-4788-be75-ccfd477db183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
For any industry to so brutally abuse its workforce is unconscionable. Professional athletes are exceptionally skilled & dedicated human beings whose are used by sports league and effectively discarded after their bodies wear out. Some endure years of painful [symptoms](https://substack.com/redirect/bb421d24-20e4-4fe8-9eb3-9e689e788b75?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) including headaches, dizziness, and memory loss, as well as [impairment](https://substack.com/redirect/e3a8991d-6f9a-41da-af19-23e199dd6777?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of sight, hearing, or speech.
Beyond health impacts, players often also lose their rights when putting on a professional team uniform. The right to player speech has been prolifically policed by team owners.
For instance, former San Francisco 49ers quarterback Colin Kaepernick was notoriously [benched](https://substack.com/redirect/7f0e5768-072e-4c79-9be8-c070d19490ce?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for daring to silently observe the discrimination and profiling that continue to drive policing across the country.
Kaepernick was not the only player silenced by a sports league, nor is the NFL the only league guilty of having silenced its players who speak out about injustices.
In 1996, Denver Nuggets point guard Mahmoud Abdul Raouf was [suspended by the NBA](https://substack.com/redirect/21ca71d0-b286-441b-aa01-6a7a9bc072a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for simply refusing to stand for the national anthem. He eventually worked out a compromise enabling him to return to the court, but at the cost of his right to silent self-expression.
What could better reflect fascism than forcing celebrities onto the sidelines when they decline to participate in the public performance of hypocritical nationalistic rituals? The pledge of allegiance references "liberty and justice for all," but both values have actually been in short supply across the United States since its founding over two centuries ago.
To be fair, many professional sports players are highly compensated. Many others, however, [toil in relative obscurity](https://substack.com/redirect/d32a9c5a-713d-4d10-a608-5c61ad1252b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), risking injuries and losing their rights in exchange for the chance to play the sports they love, and that others love to watch them play.
In any case, a _player 's_ compensation has no relationship to this critique of sports _leagues_ and their various efforts to dupe the public.
It's one thing to bend Congress to the will of an industry. It's an entirely different thing to degrade journalism and reduce it to an institutional [instrument](https://substack.com/redirect/6ded6d82-0678-4338-ab2d-b4f3c067da5f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of capitalism, an industry reliant on players whom it takes advantage of, and policymakers willing to bend the law in its favor.
### **Fans have no say**
The most fundamental purpose of journalism is to document information that empowers public decision-making. But there is no public decision-making related to sports, beyond the corrupt votes in Congress to grant legal exemptions to antitrust limits.
Sports teams are generally unaccountable to any public audience. The [relocation](https://substack.com/redirect/b02e59d2-949f-4ae6-81bc-fc35c061f515?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) of the Oakland A's to Las Vegas (or of any other sports team from one city to another) proves the point. The only actors to whom sports teams are ultimately accountable are owners. That helps explain the [longstanding refusal](https://substack.com/redirect/0ec9ef61-79b4-42c8-8bc8-87ff1dc2410b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by the owner of the Washington Commanders to rename the team in light of [concerns about the racial slur](https://substack.com/redirect/c815f4d1-bc74-48ca-8409-2d6078cfd394?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) embedded in the team's former name.
Two exceptions prove the general rule. The Green Bay Packers and the Boston Celtics are both publicly traded companies. Writing about the controversies within or surrounding those teams arguably serves some public purpose, since it enables stockholders to make more informed decisions. These teams offer a counterpoint to my otherwise generalizable thesis.
Beyond those two teams, fans are not stockholders: they are consumers. And "journalism" informing them about their teams, their victories, their failures, and their dramas does nothing to enable better public decisions.
It arguably enables better _private_ decisions, such as whose jersey to buy and whether to buy a ticket to see a game or instead watch it online or even just highlights on cable news. But that is the same function performed by advertising, or consumer reviews.
Journalism is ethically committed to much more than merely that.
Paid subscribers can access a further section that examines three points of historical contrast, explains the ultimate impact of this unfortunate contemporary pattern, and explores how it has enabled continuing violations of international human rights from Gaza to America's prisons...

It particularly represents unpaid advertising on behalf of an industry that has captured policymakers and bent the law to favor of the wealthy owners of teams. Thank you for reading! As a dissident voice challenging bipartisan and rampant corporate corruption, I rely on readers in order to reach new audiences. Feel free to share this post! The short end of the stick Fans watch sports in order to observe players. Yet, ironically, it is players who have been most consistently abused by the leagues for which they play. What could better reflect fascism than forcing celebrities onto the sidelines when they decline to participate in the public performance of hypocritical nationalistic rituals? The pledge of allegiance references "liberty and justice for all," but both values have actually been in short supply across the United States since its founding over two centuries ago. Many sports, particularly contact sports like football, routinely subject participants to serious injury, including traumatic brain injuries that often lead to devastating cumulative impacts. A study of deceased former NFL players found that . For any industry to so brutally abuse its workforce is unconscionable. Professional athletes are exceptionally skilled & dedicated human beings whose are used by sports league and effectively discarded after their bodies wear out. Some endure years of painful including headaches, dizziness, and memory loss, as well as of sight, hearing, or speech. Beyond health impacts, players often also lose their rights when putting on a professional team uniform. The right to player speech has been prolifically policed by team owners. For instance, former San Francisco 49ers quarterback Colin Kaepernick was notoriously for daring to silently observe the discrimination and profiling that continue to drive policing across the country. Kaepernick was not the only player silenced by a sports league, nor is the NFL the only league guilty of having silenced its players who speak out about injustices. In 1996, Denver Nuggets point guard Mahmoud Abdul Raouf was for simply refusing to stand for the national anthem. He eventually worked out a compromise enabling him to return to the court, but at the cost of his right to silent self-expression. What could better reflect fascism than forcing celebrities onto the sidelines when they decline to participate in the public performance of hypocritical nationalistic rituals? The pledge of allegiance references "liberty and justice for all," but both values have actually been in short supply across the United States since its founding over two centuries ago. To be fair, many professional sports players are highly compensated. Many others, however, , risking injuries and losing their rights in exchange for the chance to play the sports they love, and that others love to watch them play. In any case, a player 's compensation has no relationship to this critique of sports leagues and their various efforts to dupe the public. It's one thing to bend Congress to the will of an industry. It's an entirely different thing to degrade journalism and reduce it to an institutional of capitalism, an industry reliant on players whom it takes advantage of, and policymakers willing to bend the law in its favor. Fans have no say The most fundamental purpose of journalism is to document information that empowers public decision-making. But there is no public decision-making related to sports, beyond the corrupt votes in Congress to grant legal exemptions to antitrust limits. Sports teams are generally unaccountable to any public audience. The of the Oakland A's to Las Vegas (or of any other sports team from one city to another) proves the point. The only actors to whom sports teams are ultimately accountable are owners. That helps explain the by the owner of the Washington Commanders to rename the team in light of embedded in the team's former name. Two exceptions prove the general rule. The Green Bay Packers and the Boston Celtics are both publicly traded companies. Writing about the controversies within or surrounding those teams arguably serves some public purpose, since it enables stockholders to make more informed decisions. These teams offer a counterpoint to my otherwise generalizable thesis. Beyond those two teams, fans are not stockholders: they are consumers. And "journalism" informing them about their teams, their victories, their failures, and their dramas does nothing to enable better public decisions. It arguably enables better private decisions, such as whose jersey to buy and whether to buy a ticket to see a game or instead watch it online or even just highlights on cable news. But that is the same function performed by advertising, or consumer reviews. Journalism is ethically committed to much more than merely that. Paid subscribers can access a further section that examines three points of historical contrast, explains the ultimate impact of this unfortunate contemporary pattern, and explores how it has enabled continuing violations of international human rights from Gaza to America's prisons... subject: My friend Bob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_112623_CaseyBennet_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_112623_CaseyBennet_act]
Hi friend,
I'm writing to you about my friend and colleague, Bob Casey.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_112623_CaseyBennet_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_112623_CaseyBennet_act]
Bob represents Pennsylvania in the Senate — and next year, he’s facing one of the toughest Senate races in the country. Now that Senator Joe Manchin isn’t running for re-election, our margin for error is zero. If Bob loses his race, we could lose control of the Senate.
I need Bob in the Senate helping me address the most pressing issues facing our country: ending child poverty; fighting the climate crisis; protecting reproductive rights; and bringing down the cost of living.
I told Bob I’d reach out to you because you’ve always stepped up when it matters most, friend. Can I count on you to split a donation between my campaign and Bob’s campaign today to make sure we can protect our Senate majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_112623_CaseyBennet_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_112623_CaseyBennet_act]
Bob’s opponent for 2024 is a hedge fund mega-millionaire and Mitch McConnell’s hand-picked candidate.
We saw how National Republicans poured money into electing Doctor Oz to Pennsylvania’s other Senate seat in 2022. But, together, we defeated Doctor Oz and got John Fetterman to the Senate.
This race could quickly become the most expensive one in the country.
Your grassroots support now could make the difference, so I have to ask: can you split a donation between my campaign and Bob’s campaign now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-casey?refcode=X_112623_CaseyBennet_act]
Thank you for being on our team,
Michael

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Ronald Reagan was right
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=a70de4072cb64dd79e8056cd660b0341&_t=W7qqWQz_BxHCGAoJi7GtmEchERmdY4DQUZJevyjilM5dQJYnY30uE2N9S0_i-UO5hXvMTf-aUnRnUcfp9A_BgC3ExiTQ6S6ABCHlg0flumg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_s=a70de4072cb64dd79e8056cd660b0341&_t=W7qqWQz_BxHCGAoJi7GtmEchERmdY4DQUZJevyjilM5dQJYnY30uE2N9S0_i-UO5hXvMTf-aUnRnUcfp9A_BgC3ExiTQ6S6ABCHlg0flumg%3D)
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a70de4072cb64dd79e8056cd660b0341&_e=fAouqSTCjLjuPdiRMeD4-VxbuSGyQOcgmx6bXmErcRUfCacJf0nBUdAFZvCHb3ZT1PkmhyK3pcSpBQJaC_jNgHH4XhkWvIuqr3lwXXQ5Nyhz18-AS8q5wDuzlM_ycK7kuApuab6lUgWgsTBiGi1xU0kKXv9tEGjZOOBSCEBy740hKQDEqu6kYjic7NSXowTPQi3QFduhTjNMpbnh9fBcOb_qP8lqYDwNzJwy74S62dRLq73NCN4YodDCQrgsv2fne4XZVHgQvwJ40OifXsZviV2i1Uilg_RrmAp_cSX8Sg8b9EJNB1xLYokfkEpGjvvsScK0sfNZ9kODPolYzqPcepOjIiaQM-xBRLIiG5b7BAQuKuYYereLUqp-2otSdAa1f54TDvLw3CkYmD_jUmiiFN5cgL39wC8yNCNNSCMpfkY%3D)
---
Peter -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a70de4072cb64dd79e8056cd660b0341&_e=fAouqSTCjLjuPdiRMeD4-VxbuSGyQOcgmx6bXmErcRUfCacJf0nBUdAFZvCHb3ZT1PkmhyK3pcSpBQJaC_jNgHH4XhkWvIuqr3lwXXQ5Nyhz18-AS8q5wDuzlM_ycK7kuApuab6lUgWgsTBiGi1xU0kKXv9tEGjZOOBSCEBy740hKQDEqu6kYjic7NSXowTPQi3QFduhTjNMpbnh9fBcOb_qP8lqYDwNzJwy74S62dRLq73NCN4YodDCQrgsv2fn3q6e2MGigNIo3mkO_Xdxpr-TZuMZizd3eVz86qwuz5lkoksddgeqsFY1gsfLaakJLtjwbfxH7_bQ0B8Wr4H6qYoYFfXOS-5dnWqI0sKFXIb9t4tAkvUTVdAGoWaHre7Y9uR25-C01uMInYOpZi6OnwhXv1TFRgZWdQe5OlWbBPE%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a70de4072cb64dd79e8056cd660b0341&_e=fAouqSTCjLjuPdiRMeD4-VxbuSGyQOcgmx6bXmErcRUfCacJf0nBUdAFZvCHb3ZT1PkmhyK3pcSpBQJaC_jNgHH4XhkWvIuqr3lwXXQ5Nyhz18-AS8q5wDuzlM_ycK7kuApuab6lUgWgsTBiGi1xU0kKXv9tEGjZOOBSCEBy740hKQDEqu6kYjic7NSXowTPQi3QFduhTjNMpbnh9fBcOb_qP8lqYDwNzJwy74S62dRLq73NCN4YodDCQrgsv2fnRNvl8sllxc-9-hyAolW1gRvMx_e77V0EFNU7ole8PyE1vxDSqK4n-dD7UsiKcFFJjjS-7-7JtNH9hRinJqHG2xDI9mHDNhkGOZudgX0MzhGgdmLBFMAA8PduSErhlQIiLI0W_O0eUTUlhPnqYtqYbPtgjp1vkVrXNhJdDVuFcok%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a70de4072cb64dd79e8056cd660b0341&_e=fAouqSTCjLjuPdiRMeD4-VxbuSGyQOcgmx6bXmErcRUfCacJf0nBUdAFZvCHb3ZT1PkmhyK3pcSpBQJaC_jNgHH4XhkWvIuqr3lwXXQ5Nyhz18-AS8q5wDuzlM_ycK7kuApuab6lUgWgsTBiGi1xU0kKXv9tEGjZOOBSCEBy740hKQDEqu6kYjic7NSXowTPQi3QFduhTjNMpbnh9fBcOb_qP8lqYDwNzJwy74S62dRLq73NCN4YodDCQrgsv2fnFgzomV_jzY_E771uo6ZeM7A5fr2gMbygfpMfUoLrPoUWZXz8ResEPZZpoHeYvEpiIFXl5eyQSygqhPyQewgTs0rAVlfhgfGqaVDLFP8YqRErRMeDdZpNQLKCf_NmUdbg8mwZUyiAiNAkZNdJFMDXe25nGbY53DUXiofmHeBcNqk%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. #

Folks, we know it’s a holiday weekend, so we’ll keep this short: As you read this, our team is knocking on doors to gather the final signatures needed to get Nikki on the ballot. We’re so close to reaching our goal but need a final push to help get us over the finish line. So, over the last few weeks, our campaign has been traveling through the district to do just that. As I’m sure you can imagine, this is a big undertaking that involves recruiting a team of grassroots volunteers to build out our campaign staff to ensure we can connect with voters from every corner of our district. **[If you can, we’d really appreciate if you donate to power our final signature-gathering efforts and to help us prepare for Thursday’s end-of-month fundraising deadline>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74026398/440342404/398268834?amount=3&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTlhYTIyZi04ZThjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u-jIt_QlKIq91pxNqXqjZbBUsaLYP3tSLMzGbPmMFjY=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74026399/440342405/2093963021?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTlhYTIyZi04ZThjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u-jIt_QlKIq91pxNqXqjZbBUsaLYP3tSLMzGbPmMFjY=) ** | | **[CHIP IN $3 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74026400/440342406/-407522354?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTlhYTIyZi04ZThjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=u-jIt_QlKIq91pxNqXqjZbBUsaLYP3tSLMzGbPmMFjY=)**

clean_body: | Folks, we know it’s a holiday weekend, so we’ll keep this short: As you read this, our team is knocking on doors to gather the final signatures needed to get Nikki on the ballot. We’re so close to reaching our goal but need a final push to help get us over the finish line. So, over the last few weeks, our campaign has been traveling through the district to do just that. As I’m sure you can imagine, this is a big undertaking that involves recruiting a team of grassroots volunteers to build out our campaign staff to ensure we can connect with voters from every corner of our district. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ** = | = = | = = A lot is riding on this moment to get Nikki’s name on the ballot, and a donation of any amount will go a long way in keeping her in this fight. Thanks in advance. — Team Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

name: American Update
subject: Over 2,500 Cops Have Quit The Job In Blue City Just This Year
body:
And DEMETRA DEMONTE: Republicans Ignore This Issue At Their Peril

https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c685748%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=g%2fYnCBIrQxgL4q1gOpiwoA&sysid=1 Over 2,500 Cops Have Quit The Job In Blue City Just This Year

Over 2,500 police officers have left the New York Police Department (NYPD) so far in 2023, according to data analyzed by the New York Post. At least 2,516 officers have left the department in 2023, the fourth highest number over the past ten years, the New York Post reported, citing pension data from the department.

Hamas demanded that Israel allow aid trucks to enter northern Gaza, according to Axios.

name: Jared Moskowitz
subject: an alarming statistic on anti-Semitism:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jared Moskowitz For Congress P
body:
| Hey team, I sent you an email last week about my CNN interview on the rise of anti-semitism since the October 7th Hamas attack on Israel.

**Even since I sent you that email, more and more anti-semitic attacks have occurred — on college campuses, in restaurants, and everywhere we should feel safe.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74027010/440344833/-349209756?amount=5&refcode=JMFC_20231126_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85Njc2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0MWY0NGI3MS04ZjhjLWVlMTEtODkyNC02MDQ1YmRkNDcxMTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tqKgP8Zvmt2r9WnLUEaUDQGDsTy9mvfQknsLx3w9DzM=) I’ve been extremely vocal about the rise in anti-semitism, even before the brutal attack on Israel — and voices against anti-semitism are important now more than ever.

[**I’m keeping my promise to fight antisemitism in Congress — but I need your help. Peter,

JD Vance here, reaching out because I need your help A-S-A-P.

Democrats from all across the country are funneling millions of dollars into conservative races ahead of the 2024 election. They know the key is to start early and start strong, and we desperately need your help to counter the effects their spending is having in key conservative districts and states across the nation. Joe Biden, the DNC (Democratic National Committee), the DSCC (Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee), and the DCCC (Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee) have already sent tens of millions of dollars to Radical candidates trying to overturn our freedoms, our Constitution, and our conservative values. These out of touch, progressive Leftists are threatening America as we know it, **[and if we don't fight back, our nation will be unrecognizable to our children and grandchildren in years to come. ](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d93c87086e744331bab87a0aea45639a&_e=dtPWabPF2EA63odzQg72lZh34ohGxGMn2ZGy2iWmYHez4vqgHXMHfvGHn6spNkh-iesRBbhS0Kv6IqP9IBFRWZUMlh0qkpIsj1_ahNd5awpvtw21fZoQDr8WMddIYdENN3FZ5MseJDNwTqcPYh3xN5qtVAJMw5zKp8MsB_v2RowW8byHeFIw5V73FQMoQF9TKdcBwWgUWDHqsUJc-LAd1fau-sTL5LO1u2Ka90K63VaD0iF7fLF5ZY6wO45xoVzv9xHDBcTDcSuFNSIJQyKpmuRWJ9MMuciMsgmUb69f5szy_QDiFvqtxeHZ9i2Bc6jA)**

Unfortunately, this isn't stopping here. More and more money will be sent by these radicals to upend each and every conservative running for office, and it's not just the big organizations with bottomless bank accounts seeking to hurt the America First movement. These committees are activating their on-the-ground activists and major donors to make a major "blue" impact in 2024. They hope to completely eradicate the conservative agenda we know and hold dear.

**[So please, Peter, donate anything you can A-S-A-P.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d93c87086e744331bab87a0aea45639a&_e=dtPWabPF2EA63odzQg72lZh34ohGxGMn2ZGy2iWmYHez4vqgHXMHfvGHn6spNkh-iesRBbhS0Kv6IqP9IBFRWZUMlh0qkpIsj1_ahNd5awpvtw21fZoQDr8WMddIYdENN3FZ5MseJDNwTqcPYh3xNxB5B641Jh59ujek4_lmP2hdWEgb7NjOZS_uU8Tzqs1c3xiKo6OVfW6nPuu-99tzUs3YA230xVXZnt5ApfweAVyDXb_poG77jrNHwGgtsgdjM8_V2N-W0dbs9WxBJJtrwBqWk7mHO2Rw8K-smbGAqdPIt2X83bwuPK6YkyiO-Jy6)** Even $5, $10, or $15 will help to ensure Dems aren't outspending us across the country.

**[With a committed team like ours, I KNOW we can make a difference and win in 2024. But we have to start now.](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=d93c87086e744331bab87a0aea45639a&_e=dtPWabPF2EA63odzQg72lZh34ohGxGMn2ZGy2iWmYHez4vqgHXMHfvGHn6spNkh-iesRBbhS0Kv6IqP9IBFRWZUMlh0qkpIsj1_ahNd5awpvtw21fZoQDr8WMddIYdENN3FZ5MseJDNwTqcPYh3xN5qtVAJMw5zKp8MsB_v2Rox0ETBP8lzT4aa-zqZY1KJ5TuGgeDU-HBjJF2Rziy0pl52CVjFep-9x12m0rKWhcOrm4GxWLEwmLrCsk9omLJbkafzA9uoEEBLriLkJNLvBFnfv4LpmA4NP6rgsQM2pr_7FM7BUrsTxQ6WGqenUiJjD)**

**Conservative Outsider. Marine. Businessman. Author.**
Ohio needs a true conservative in the U.S. Senate. It needs someone who understands how our
economic and government leaders conspire to make life harder for normal Americans.
Ohio needs JD Vance. Peter, it’s Roland Gutierrez.
The mass shooting in Uvalde, Texas was horrific.
We lost 19 children and two teachers when a deranged gunman entered Robb Elementary with an AR-15.
The photos I've seen and the stories I’ve heard are unimaginable.
We need an assault weapons ban in America. Now .
As Uvalde’s State Senator, as a father, as a proud Texan, and as an American fed up with the status quo: I’m asking you to stand with me in this fight. Please, Peter, will you sign your name to my petition demanding that Congress ban assault weapons once and for all? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zwghl8K7b02ddhBeoQQb8g2]
[ADD MY NAME: BAN ASSAULT WEAPONS NOW! >>] [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zwghl8K7b02ddhBeoQQb8g2]
It’s up to us to save lives and make our schools safe, Peter.
But right now, what we are doing is just not working.
And as long as pro-gun extremists like Ted Cruz hold the reins, I know nothing will change.
That’s why we need to show our grassroots strength and prove to Ted Cruz’s NRA backers that we’re not giving up this fight. I’m counting on you to join me in demanding an assault weapons ban, Peter — will you sign your name before midnight? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zwghl8K7b02ddhBeoQQb8g2]
[SIGN HERE >>] [https://secure.ngpvan.com/Zwghl8K7b02ddhBeoQQb8g2]
Thank you,
Roland Gutierrez

Children huddled under the tree waiting for Santa, Bing Crosby on the radio, tenderloin, and Christmas pudding on the table. It was a joyous celebration of family, community, and the Christian Faith.

**Things were going well._Until the Radical Left got their hands on our culture._**

name: House Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: It’s all coordinated. And it’s all preplanned.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

| |

---
| | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson.

_**[This is a longer email but I'm humbly asking you to read it start to finish.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddfbbb68b5c04575bf8d0920944e2152&_e=uA036s8kXe0CbOfN2bruFFX22nPo85PE-wApKnDYWaIKvklW4cZFbkXqgTY03iwSjsNKTEQHp6qhvfv_D-aEWWnO8b9Bbcb-tTtZ-FDcjsPXIhvWIfsmvUoZX983YTbj6mL2CCg3fb3keTwJcMjgTgE6UxYuyQSL6q3mQQHbTqgmq_ND-6kCfQFkO2UcPY4tjtFKo7qkIX5ueFoRBQ-MJTIn5Nr2cDm4ms9uSlYp4lC0jW2Ga8qU9v6tnV9atsbDDUlgbhujiSKD7wkivvXm7SOeRerOqIK06M2VG6KjC4AZXrZ2Fpr4Z05W9EmmKsb4VVgWn8_iM-z9s0XyY1bCQTaJO8UTdryXm9WSJor8JBrMlA5EjuM4dz1w5uWMg5gPRlQlA6WtaT_yLALe7WskHA%3D%3D "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish.")**_

Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me.
* The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC.
* Politico fired off this headline: _" Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson."_
* And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports.

Look:

These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. _But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not _really_ the goal..._

The _real_ goal of this political ambush is two-fold: **1)** smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and **2)** scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats.

**It 's about power and money. Nothing else.**

That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. _**[So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I'm teaming up with my fellow Louisianian - Majority Leader Steve Scalise - to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddfbbb68b5c04575bf8d0920944e2152&_e=uA036s8kXe0CbOfN2bruFFX22nPo85PE-wApKnDYWaIKvklW4cZFbkXqgTY03iwSjsNKTEQHp6qhvfv_D-aEWWnO8b9Bbcb-tTtZ-FDcjsPXIhvWIfsmvUoZX983YTbj6mL2CCg3fb3keTwJcMjgTgE6UxYuyQSL6q3mQQHbTqgmq_ND-6kCfQFkO2UcPY4tjtFKo7qkIX5ueFoRBQ-MJTIn5Nr2cDm4ms9uSlYp4lC0jW2Ga8qU9v6tnV9atsbDwX2QWLBk07iKw2h1flV9the_GloMTxpfKO5emL-fXTopQGrsgr4GW5Eh6Fw7hRk-S95mJ_I5FGqHQLNfGWODMRFV768hx8vS27_a2tyL-bIgNuVKlhiGursih0InSxPVhNJ6os5lGENG76AyQllC5w%3D%3D "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month.")**_

It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country.

**If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority.**

So here's my final pitch to you:

We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now.

The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this.

Let me make myself perfectly clear:

_I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative._

_**[The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=ddfbbb68b5c04575bf8d0920944e2152&_e=uA036s8kXe0CbOfN2bruFFX22nPo85PE-wApKnDYWaIKvklW4cZFbkXqgTY03iwSjsNKTEQHp6qhvfv_D-aEWWnO8b9Bbcb-tTtZ-FDcjsPXIhvWIfsmvUoZX983YTbj6mL2CCg3fb3keTwJcMjgTgE6UxYuyQSL6q3mQQHbTqgmq_ND-6kCfQFkO2UcPY4tjtFKo7qkIX5ueFoRBQ-MJTIn5Nr2cDm4ms9uSlYp4lC0jW2Ga8qU9v6tnV9atsbDarE2NZZCmH1lr-ajhIS4sUH75E4YxtJMBKPKi-EL0PwuMD3V7YT8taLZsauS-TumDZFAYDHiGUWgi_pRwrVfgZBeyVMYcf3TXj1_7XCFv4HSZAPE1auTLIz0Xcybb4DlHTFo3sE0vBVzHr8OzgZrzA%3D%3D "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING.")**_

That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in?
---

Thanks for all you do.

In liberty,
Speaker Mike Johnson

clean_body: My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. | | | | | My fellow Americans - this is Mike Johnson. "This is a longer email but I’m humbly asking you to read it start to finish." Why? Because the moment I was elected Speaker by my Republican colleagues, the Radical Left IMMEDIATELY unleashed a coordinated, preplanned political hit job against me. The Liberal Media spun up hit piece after hit piece to smear me in the press - Biden's former Press Secretary even attacked me for being a Christian on MSNBC. Politico fired off this headline: " Democrats rev up the opposition machine against Mike Johnson." And I can't even begin to tell you how many Democrat fundraising emails and texts I saw in the minutes following the final vote - I'm bracing myself for the next FEC reports. Look: These vicious attacks are a dime a dozen in Washington. They don't intimidate me. But I 'll let you in on a little secret: that's not really the goal... The real goal of this political ambush is two-fold: 1) smear the good names of every House Republican to hurt them electorally, and 2) scare Liberals enough to whip out their credit cards, fill in their info, and donate to Democrats. It 's about power and money. Nothing else. That's why it's mission-critical that we stand up for ourselves in critical moments like this. "So as one of my first moves as Speaker, I’m teaming up with my fellow Louisianian – Majority Leader Steve Scalise – to set a goal of raising one million dollars between now and the end of the month." It's ambitious. I get it. But that's the bare minimum we need to fully fund our campaign operations in battleground races across the country. If we fall short of that, we 'll be forced to SLASH our voter contact budgets, GUT our digital outreach efforts, and pull our ads OFF THE AIRWAVES. Nothing could be worse for our plans to defend and expand our slim House Majority. So here's my final pitch to you: We urgently need your help. Not next week, not in the new year - right here and right now. The difference between a strong Conservative Majority and one controlled by the Liberal Machine will come down to can't-miss fundraising goals just like this. Let me make myself perfectly clear: I 'm not asking you to pitch in more than you can afford. If you can spare $50 or $100, I would be tremendously grateful. But if you can only spare $5 or $10, I would be equally appreciative. "The ONLY thing I ask is for every Conservative in the country to chip in SOMETHING." That will be the difference between victory and defeat. So what do you say? Can I count you in? Thanks for all you do. In liberty, Speaker Mike Johnson | "Speaker Mike Johnson" | | | "Please take my Majority Leader Survey!" This is Steve Scalise. As your Majority Leader, I'm respectfully asking you to fill out my "MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY" at your earliest convenience. It's important. I want to have your goals, your concerns, and your priorities in mind before I do anything else. Friend, Ted Cruz is attacking Colin Allred's campaign for U.S. Senate and spreading bold-faced lies. He's terrified of our movement. Colin needs your help to fight back. Experts at FiveThirtyEight are saying Texas may be Democrats’ BEST pick-up opportunity in 2024, and Ted Cruz is going on the offensive because he’s terrified that Colin has a real chance of winning this thing.
We know Republicans are hell-bent on flipping the Senate next year – but if we win in Texas, Democrats are virtually guaranteed to defend the Senate!
Look, Colin is running a grassroots campaign. He's not taking a dime from corporations or special interests because he believes lawmakers should only be beholden to the people they serve – not wealthy donors.

clean_body: That’s a lot! | Hey team — This month, our campaign has received just about 2,000 individual contributions to emails like this one. That’s a lot! And I’m so grateful to each and every one of you who has stepped up to support our movement for change. = We have just 4 days until the end of the month, so our team is working hard to hit our November financial goals. I told them that I think we need to raise the stakes (after all, our election is less than a year away!). That’s why I set a target of doubling our number of grassroots contributions for the month. I’ll be frank: This goal might be a stretch for us. But if we’re going to defeat Marsha Blackburn, we can’t afford to be timid. Marsha’s tenure of radical, right-wing extremism HAS to come to an end — but her corporate donors and bigwig pals are set on propping her up. Grassroots people power can and will defeat them if enough of us come together. Tennessee is worth the fight. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thank you, Gloria Johnson = | Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care. For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors. Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights. | = = Follow along: | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Gloria for Tennessee Contributions or gifts to Gloria for Tennessee are not tax deductible. Gloria for Tennessee 73 White Bridge Rd #103-353 Nashville, TN 37205

Hi friend, this is Mariannette Miller-Meeks.

I wanted to fill you in on the situation with my friend and colleague Zach Nunn. He's an Air Force Reserve Lieutenant Colonel Reserve who just reported for reserve duty.

As you're reading this, Democrats are jumping on the opportunity to fundraise while Zach is serving our country. We need your help to keep this seat RED!

**Zach is fighting in one of the closest races in the country. Democrats are already calling it a Top Pickup Opportunity.**
I know Zach. He's one tough cookie. But this is a fight where he'll need reinforcements to win.

I'm asking you personally, could you contribute today to help boost his numbers while he's serving our great nation?

| [**BOOST ZACH'S NUMBERS**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=e4614609331f4b6f87965e25df7d8bd4&_e=tctZAgX0iHe3goqIOUG0rbrVsiu0bNu3wzi248X_EfDptPUXNvcbIMhdyA7oyc_IATQx7GCnq1bJ7n8sdYRxfBIRH0zY5mhwq2igXhk0yjCQriwrBa00wEtNTxnvvpnfTojrAvqLz8MNwekevRUqRczpRkWptMNCTEvCcOb83pOEthrR5f4RZR_SdW52dBetlqHDQLh5Z_G46EWz7z7Hu0G9wEGvK-VgxWslTzMDwjDNdYdkZe11j_47cxmFyl7xhbrRVF7bM3GvAd_RWAx14VQkdQUpvrM4TLwvxrhI9dZCRIXxJ-i6pKRjR9vYaSgL)

As an Army Veteran myself, I know the personal sacrifices and those of your family it takes to serve. It's no easy task to drop everything for the protection of your country.

Zach needs all the help he can get right now. Your contribution today will help him maintain his flight path through election day.

[**BOOST ZACH'S NUMBERS**](http://links.drmillermeeks.com/u/click?_t=a0459abfcdbb4d8889670e005e3f851c&_m=e4614609331f4b6f87965e25df7d8bd4&_e=tctZAgX0iHe3goqIOUG0rbrVsiu0bNu3wzi248X_EfDptPUXNvcbIMhdyA7oyc_IATQx7GCnq1bJ7n8sdYRxfBIRH0zY5mhwq2igXhk0yjCQriwrBa00wEtNTxnvvpnfTojrAvqLz8MNwekevRUqRczpRkWptMNCTEvCcOb83pMIRwDU-DsmRR8jbfVH6NFx4Zq4bX2XqbWskPbiXmy36CyYUdxm5xZEDFf-zdJSCssUtsZE97FH8jrxyziSYCWfzY-xdcU9LxGT2AUJKVmJxDe3PUQLZqnh4HPHs_ORP2GNm7Kv2Cc2oOdndpYBtIOu)

Friend,
When the sitting president (the worst in history, I might add) is attempting to JAIL you for life as an innocent man like a Third World Dictator, strip you of your First Amendment rights, remove you from the ballot, and even enact the “corporate death penalty” against you and your family, you might think there isn’t much to be thankful for this time of the year...
_...But that couldn’t be further from the truth, Friend._
**Less than a year out from Election Day 2024, I’ve never been more thankful for _YOU_!**
Because of incredible grassroots patriots like you, our movement is not only sweeping the Republican primary by a 60-point margin, but we’ve also built a **HISTORIC LEAD** over Crooked Joe!
**Which is why, as one of my most trusted supporters, YOU were among the slim percentage of _select patriots_ I chose to receive *EARLY* MEMBERSHIP RENEWAL within our campaign for the 2024 election year. **
And because you are one of my fiercest defenders against the never-ending witch hunts, YOUR MEMBERSHIP CARD will be specially marked with a **“Member Since _2023_ ”** date, solidifying that you officially renewed your membership at the earliest possible moment.
