With YOU at my side, Friend, _from this early moment all the way up through November 5, 2024_ , we will WIN the FINAL BATTLE for America...
We will cast off the political ruling class that hates our country, we will DISMANTLE the Deep State, we will rout the warmongers and globalists from our government, and above all else, we will MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN by firing the most corrupt and incompetent president to ever occupy the White House – Crooked Joe Biden!

name: United Rural Democrats
subject: Democrats embody rural values
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS
body:
| |
---
Hey Peter, What’s the fundamental difference between Democrats and Republicans? Democrats believe in a government that plays an active role in addressing social and economic issues – in rural America and every corner in between. They advocate for policies that promote social equality, affordable healthcare, and access to education. Democrats believe in the importance of collective responsibility in tackling challenges and creating a fair society. _**And Republicans just think the government shouldn’t exist.**_ That just won’t cut it in rural America, where people are used to taking care of their neighbors and building a better life for themselves and those they care about. **[By contributing to United Rural Democrats, clean_body: | | Hey Peter, What’s the fundamental difference between Democrats and Republicans? Democrats believe in a government that plays an active role in addressing social and economic issues – in rural America and every corner in between. They advocate for policies that promote social equality, affordable healthcare, and access to education. Democrats believe in the importance of collective responsibility in tackling challenges and creating a fair society. And Republicans just think the government shouldn’t exist. That just won’t cut it in rural America, where people are used to taking care of their neighbors and building a better life for themselves and those they care about. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: = = = = Together, let's build a nation that works for everyone – a nation where the promise of America extends to every corner, from bustling cities to the quiet fields of rural America. = – United Rural Democrats | United Rural Democrats (URD) is leading the effort to rebuild the Democratic Party in rural America. If we're going to take back our country, we need a 50-state strategy to organize in every community across the country. Will you support our network of activists on the ground as we work to rebuild our party's infrastructure and flip these areas blue? = = PAID FOR BY UNITED RURAL DEMOCRATS Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Bob Casey (personal)
subject: Critical
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
The only way we’ll be ready is if we come together.
Hi Peter,

I wanted to send you a short note before getting back to spending time with my family and letting you get back to yours.
We’re up against a self-funding hedge fund executive who has teamed up with Mitch McConnell and national Republican billionaires to try to buy our Commonwealth’s Senate seat.
**[The only way we’ll be ready for this race is if we come together. This is going to be the toughest re-election I’ve ever faced, Peter, so can you chip in today to help us keep PA from flipping red?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231126-2?refcode=em20231126&refcode2=1226_552475_wKk9H9&akid=1226%2E552475%2EwKk9H9)**
**[Donate Now ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231126-2?refcode=em20231126&refcode2=1226_552475_wKk9H9&akid=1226%2E552475%2EwKk9H9)**
The GOP is going to give everything they’ve got to try to win back control of the Senate, and they know that their path to a majority runs right through PA. Now, with a newly open seat in West Virginia, it’s even more critical that we hold this seat.
**[Whatever you chip in will have a real impact on our re-election fight, and I won’t be able to win without you. If you’re able, can you make a contribution to our campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20231126-2?refcode=em20231126&refcode2=1226_552475_wKk9H9&akid=1226%2E552475%2EwKk9H9)**
With Gratitude,
Bob

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1&akid=1226%2E552475%2EwKk9H9)
* [Update Your Information](https://go.bobcasey.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://go.bobcasey.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=2&akid=1226%2E552475%2EwKk9H9)

To give by check:
Bob Casey for Senate
PO Box 58746
Philadelphia, PA 19102
Email us: [info@bobcasey.com](mailto:info@bobcasey.com)
PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC.

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature is Needed: Marine animals are CHOKING on plastic
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144091?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Baby sea turtles could be CHOKING TO DEATH on plastic right now.[Take action!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144092?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Plastic waste is overtaking our oceans. Scientists estimate there will be **MORE PLASTIC THAN FISH** by 2050. That means a higher chance for turtles to mistake floating plastic bags for tasty jellyfish -- a potentially deadly error. Even if turtles manage to avoid choking, ingesting plastic can cause _**malnutrition, chemical contamination, and damaged internal organs.**_ _**PLASTIC CAN STICK AROUND FOR CENTURIES.**_ Once an animal dies and decomposes, the plastic it consumed is released back into the ocean for its next victim. Over time, it breaks down into microplastics that pollute the _**water we drink, the food we eat, and even the air we breathe.**_ But there’s good news: **immediate federal solutions could STOP the plastics crisis and YOU can help make that possible!** **[Friend, will you defend our oceans and our bodies from plastic and sign the petition by 11:59pm TONIGHT?>>](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144093?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144094?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The harm plastics cause begins before these toxic products make it to the ocean -- or even onto store shelves. Giant plastic production facilities spew pollution into nearby communities -- largely low-income communities and communities of color. The people who live near these facilities face _**increased risk of cancer, respiratory diseases, and other illnesses.**_
Meanwhile, plastic corporations increase production every year. **We need to address the plastic crisis TODAY.** **[If just 57 more people from your area take action by TONIGHT, we can push to rein in the PLASTIC CRISIS before it’s too late. Add your name!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144095?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)**
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/2144094?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for taking action,
Friends of the Earth**
|

subject: The Harsh Reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Stories from the Border | | |
---
[](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=99d89cd3d8954519a1a8726260926b0b&_e=u8LHuC5BPeji8VwUhU0DxZAsXceQ13cHQ1jc6rRJgOMv5lfDRMEByKmBEgnPJmVRhlzuVxt4BrA2tk84vXKLG4OIlgVa-4JsxHlg2RJ_EV-Yi8JuyNYOXHsLDPpvxqxnTNREpTnlGGfPfti3-K20cbDRAcnPqka11Rg8RC-6KyfmCu9jIzZnxmqghkgSKzRPJsLkDDrqXzYOwKepK7fMP1RtXD3IRqi6rTpn_OLvASoUTJpKN-CIrQAqdwf9BM63UHcK8j3FEYkAaYUzHM3ELqk3xtuO8FgdRlTn4zF2dzHMwnltV-7CV9Rd21o0YjOkPmWjQinMXdZSVLLfXlafwAHDfAL0Rhtwk1EszteXZ4cySnwP-JBs1pl6uNs31P0b-XIkqqnPvvMSBx3sOB8OydDW_SW7UvpGimM7Eq1-ZEkN_CCX8zBw_6O7EeGZQFWgCFUBPz9I7azL20KG9k9Q1H0rpLR85lXqWtcq7ElclMXAV6002aqx_7aRlgOWpj8bDdh5RKZqeg4qs3-Ly7Ep9A%3D%3D)
---
Friend, Under the Biden administration, the situation at our border has escalated into nothing short of an American nightmare. The media's complicity and Biden's dismissive lectures have only fueled the fire, neglecting the gravity of the crisis. I feel compelled to share with you some of the horror stories I've heard during my time at the border. These are not just statistics; these are the chilling, harsh realities of the crisis gripping our nation: \- A victim of human trafficking endured repeated assaults, forced to lie on a bed as men came and went. \- A border patrol agent recounted pulling lifeless bodies of children and pregnant women from the river. \- Even in Alabama, now effectively a border state, a constituent warned of drug cartels infiltrating his community to collect from illegal migrants. President Biden, the root cause of this crisis, audaciously lectures us about the "soul" of our nation while turning a blind eye to the suffering. **[Friend, I am both mad and heartbroken. ](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=99d89cd3d8954519a1a8726260926b0b&_e=u8LHuC5BPeji8VwUhU0DxZAsXceQ13cHQ1jc6rRJgOMv5lfDRMEByKmBEgnPJmVRhlzuVxt4BrA2tk84vXKLG4OIlgVa-4JsxHlg2RJ_EV-Yi8JuyNYOXHsLDPpvxqxnTNREpTnlGGfPfti3-K20cbDRAcnPqka11Rg8RC-6KyfmCu9jIzZnxmqghkgSKzRPJsLkDDrqXzYOwKepK7fMP1RtXD3IRqi6rTpn_OLvASoUTJpKN-CIrQAqdwf9BM63UHcK8j3FEYkAaYUzHM3ELqk3xtuO8FgdRlTn4zF2dzHMwnltV-7CV9Rd21o0YjOkPmWjQinMXdZSVLLfXlafwAHDfAL0Rhtwk1EszteXZ4cySnwP-JBs1pl6uNs31P0bL6nrHCM3UxG2Rrhx8GtR7iSgPhvvq_UkFA04pIroFT8OwDcC5f0tbqNTC5mpYdo-5SIA2LuWBN6VIDMo-rusCondJFoOVerwRXvfK021mPw3J6choFp0lOGYOHonZ8Hv7TAE9KDymud_4Kf--WpsLA%3D%3D)** Any objective person witnessing the assaults, murders, and drug trafficking at our southern border would immediately demand an end to this crisis. **[While Biden lacks the courage to act, I am committed to fighting for a secure border.](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=99d89cd3d8954519a1a8726260926b0b&_e=u8LHuC5BPeji8VwUhU0DxZAsXceQ13cHQ1jc6rRJgOMv5lfDRMEByKmBEgnPJmVRhlzuVxt4BrA2tk84vXKLG4OIlgVa-4JsxHlg2RJ_EV-Yi8JuyNYOXHsLDPpvxqxnTNREpTnlGGfPfti3-K20cbDRAcnPqka11Rg8RC-6KyfmCu9jIzZnxmqghkgSKzRPJsLkDDrqXzYOwKepK7fMP1RtXD3IRqi6rTpn_OLvASoUTJpKN-CIrQAqdwf9BM63UHcK8j3FEYkAaYUzHM3ELqk3xtuO8FgdRlTn4zF2dzHMwnltV-7CV9Rd21o0YjOkPmWjQinMXdZSVLLfXlafwAHDfAL0Rhtwk1EszteXZ4cySnwP-JBs1pl6uNs31P0bzXQbzCzde7agz0sAsSl7dE4MgIOGYmri_PeVPFkYPKHBmAOJSwNbHsM4JYwmpZsBIv5oi_JDdaCGWNml3Wo_rZ4BrONpdIuKxpRTqpUnluctbvH53DelgFkZBsnBFFKGDLLzPXqyTMoCg8tB8kuHRw%3D%3D)** **[Can I count on you to join me in taking a stand to end this crisis?](http://links.fighttheswamp.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=99d89cd3d8954519a1a8726260926b0b&_e=u8LHuC5BPeji8VwUhU0DxZAsXceQ13cHQ1jc6rRJgOMv5lfDRMEByKmBEgnPJmVRhlzuVxt4BrA2tk84vXKLG4OIlgVa-4JsxHlg2RJ_EV-Yi8JuyNYOXHsLDPpvxqxnTNREpTnlGGfPfti3-K20cbDRAcnPqka11Rg8RC-6KyfmCu9jIzZnxmqghkgSKzRPJsLkDDrqXzYOwKepK7fMP1RtXD3IRqi6rTpn_OLvASoUTJpKN-CIrQAqdwf9BM63UHcK8j3FEYkAaYUzHM3ELqk3xtuO8FgdRlTn4zF2dzHMwnltV-7CV9Rd21o0YjOkPmWjQinMXdZSVLLfXlafwAHDfAL0Rhtwk1EszteXZ4cySnwP-JBs1pl6uNs31P0bbBH68nia5n_c9vsFt0QNR1qtZDOtATFk2uJJoKQyr6MBvcR6rBGvGUV5fEh0azf2z8D8LzGF7LuNdLN-zx2Fb_S2GxkDfRzl0BB0nPG0bWO9cg7aRHkvApkljRqwt8RP4R5L9MI0oqy2dNz2mtbDNA%3D%3D)** Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt

clean_body: Stories from the Border | | | Friend, Under the Biden administration, the situation at our border has escalated into nothing short of an American nightmare. The media's complicity and Biden's dismissive lectures have only fueled the fire, neglecting the gravity of the crisis. I feel compelled to share with you some of the horror stories I've heard during my time at the border. These are not just statistics; these are the chilling, harsh realities of the crisis gripping our nation: \- A victim of human trafficking endured repeated assaults, forced to lie on a bed as men came and went. \- A border patrol agent recounted pulling lifeless bodies of children and pregnant women from the river. \- Even in Alabama, now effectively a border state, a constituent warned of drug cartels infiltrating his community to collect from illegal migrants. President Biden, the root cause of this crisis, audaciously lectures us about the "soul" of our nation while turning a blind eye to the suffering. Any objective person witnessing the assaults, murders, and drug trafficking at our southern border would immediately demand an end to this crisis. Sincerely, Senator Katie Britt | |

We will be traveling to Westcliffe, CO in Custer County and Durango, CO in LaPlata County talking about how we retake the RNC, fire Ronna McDaniel and her enablers, and how we win in 2024.
I hope you will join us and allow me to introduce myself to you this weekend.

clean_body: I will be visiting the southern part of our state this weekend talking about how we retake the RNC and meeting with the grassroots of our state, will you join me? | | | | == | Friend, This weekend, December 1st and 2nd, my team and I will be in the southern part of Colorado visiting with the grassroots and party leaders of Southern Colorado. We will be traveling to Westcliffe, CO in Custer County and Durango, CO in LaPlata County talking about how we retake the RNC, fire Ronna McDaniel and her enablers, and how we win in 2024. I hope you will join us and allow me to introduce myself to you this weekend. You can RSVP and find more info about these events by clicking the images or buttons below. | == | == | == | == | If for some reason you are not able to attend these events, but still want to be involved, we ask that you consider signing our caucus pledge or finding other ways to get involved in this race to Restore the RNC to Patriotism. You can learn more about how to get involved and sign up to receive info on your local caucus in 2024 by clicking the image or button below. | == | | == | If you are unable to attend, and unable to volunteer your time, and you are financially able, please consider supporting our campaign so we can ensure that our message reaches all four corners of Colorado before the Caucus in 2024. Whether it is traveling to rural Colorado like we are this weekend, sending mailers, emails like this one, text messages or even robocalls, it all takes financial support from people like you. If you feel inclined, you can donate by clicking below ⬇️ | == | | == | We look forward to hearing from you or seeing you this weekend in Westcliffe and Durango. I am looking forward to speaking with you and furthering my understanding of Rural Coloradans issues with the RNC. It is events like this that are the bed rock of Conservative Politics and I hope this whistle stop tour gives everyone an opportunity to give me their feedback so I can serve you better. To Josh, real freedom means the ability to raise and support a family on a living wage.
It means the freedom for children to feel safe and be safe — and receive a high-quality public education no matter what ZIP code they live in.
**And real freedom means the ability to make your own health care decisions, without extreme politicians standing in the way.**
Since day one as Governor, Josh has rolled up his sleeves to bring real freedom throughout our Commonwealth — but he can only keep up this critically important fight with help from voters like you.
[_**If you believe every Pennsylvanian deserves _real_ freedom, will you chip in to support Josh’s pro-choice, pro-Pennsylvania campaign? body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030341/440356740/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjE2YTdmNGQtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Hjd2M4lc87F-DR2uX5-LUwa3E0AAf4hBA9L0nFoBsxY=)
---
Peter, My end-of-month deadline is just around the corner. **With the GOP prepared to invest millions of dollars into defeating Democrats like me to flip the Senate, I’ve set an ambitious $100,000 goal.** The truth is, I rely on donations from grassroots supporters like you to hit these goals. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a donation to help me close out this month on the strongest possible footing. **(**[_**If you’re ready to give now, you can split a contribution between my campaign and HER Time here.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030342/440356741/-2030493197?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjE2YTdmNGQtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Hjd2M4lc87F-DR2uX5-LUwa3E0AAf4hBA9L0nFoBsxY=)**)** But first, I want to personally thank you for standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. Thank you for never giving up the fight to **make gun trafficking a federal crime.** After 13 years, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns across the nation. Thank you for having my back as I lead the fight to **protect Social Security and Medicare** and ensure that seniors can retire in dignity. Thank you for proudly standing with me in my fight to **certify the Equal Rights Amendment.** Today, we’re so close to finally establishing gender equality in our Constitution — giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights. **But here's the bad news: If Republicans flip even one Senate seat, they could retake the majority and _undo all of our progress._ With 23 Democratic seats on the ballot, our grassroots resources will be stretched thin. Especially after the GOP’s historic gains in New York last year, I need your help to defend my must-win seat.** [_**That's why I have to ask: Please, will you split $10 or more between my campaign and HER Time before midnight tonight to help me hit my end-of-month goal and defend our Senate majority? I’m counting on your support, Peter.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030343/440356742/-2030493197?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjE2YTdmNGQtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Hjd2M4lc87F-DR2uX5-LUwa3E0AAf4hBA9L0nFoBsxY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and HER Time will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030344/440356743/-2030493197?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjE2YTdmNGQtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Hjd2M4lc87F-DR2uX5-LUwa3E0AAf4hBA9L0nFoBsxY=)

clean_body: | = Peter, My end-of-month deadline is just around the corner. With the GOP prepared to invest millions of dollars into defeating Democrats like me to flip the Senate, I’ve set an ambitious $100,000 goal. The truth is, I rely on donations from grassroots supporters like you to hit these goals. That’s why I’m about to ask you to make a donation to help me close out this month on the strongest possible footing. (=) But first, I want to personally thank you for standing with me as we take on the toughest fights in Washington. Thank you for never giving up the fight to make gun trafficking a federal crime. After 13 years, my legislation was finally passed in last year's Bipartisan Safer Communities Act. Already, we're stopping the flow of illegal guns across the nation. Thank you for having my back as I lead the fight to protect Social Security and Medicare and ensure that seniors can retire in dignity. Thank you for proudly standing with me in my fight to certify the Equal Rights Amendment. Today, we’re so close to finally establishing gender equality in our Constitution — giving us a legal basis to restore reproductive rights. But here's the bad news: If Republicans flip even one Senate seat, they could retake the majority and undo all of our progress. With 23 Democratic seats on the ballot, our grassroots resources will be stretched thin. Especially after the GOP’s historic gains in New York last year, I need your help to defend my must-win seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Kirsten Gillibrand and HER Time will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you again for everything that you do. It’s an honor to take on these fights with you by my side. With gratitude and love, Kirsten HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

Watch our first ad of this campaign: |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030365/440357013/1354111473?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyN2RiZmYtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Sz4DpoVTC4l14TP2j_lEb-C3LS8hlfL6ivpQ5l0YjhE=)

I just announced that I’m running against Bob Menendez and launched my very first ad of this campaign for the United States Senate. Now, I’m personally asking you to watch that message about who I am and why I’m ready to lead New Jersey forward. [**Please click here to watch our launch ad and hear my story. And if you support our message, chip in so all of New Jersey has a chance to hear from us →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030366/440357014/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyN2RiZmYtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Sz4DpoVTC4l14TP2j_lEb-C3LS8hlfL6ivpQ5l0YjhE=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030367/440357015/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyN2RiZmYtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Sz4DpoVTC4l14TP2j_lEb-C3LS8hlfL6ivpQ5l0YjhE=) | [WATCH & CHIP IN →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030368/440357016/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyN2RiZmYtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Sz4DpoVTC4l14TP2j_lEb-C3LS8hlfL6ivpQ5l0YjhE=)
---
Many of you know me as Mrs. Murphy: the First Lady of New Jersey. Serving in that role has been the honor of my lifetime, but that’s only a part of my story.
**I’m a wife and a mom to four incredible kids.** Like most moms, I know the million things that parents worry about every day — from keeping the kids safe, to ensuring they have a good school, to simply keeping food on the table.
**I’m a leader in the fight to save our environment.** I fought hard to ensure NJ kids were taught about climate change and its causes, and as a result of that work, we’re the first state in the nation to have a climate change curriculum in every public school.
**I'm a leading advocate for New Jersey's moms and babies.** When I learned that more NJ women died in childbirth than in nearly every other state, I rolled up my sleeves and got to work. I’ve led the charge to reduce our state’s maternal mortality rate.
**Now, I’m running to fight for every family.** New Jerseyans deserve a United States Senator they can be proud of — a Senator who’ll fight for them every day. That’s what I intend to do.
[**If you’re with me, please donate to our 2024 Launch Fund today. Your contributions help build our team and spread our message in the fight for a better New Jersey:**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74030369/440357017/-1260851818?refcode=AU_TMNJ_FR_LAU_GEN_NO_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDk1NzMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTkyN2RiZmYtYTI4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Sz4DpoVTC4l14TP2j_lEb-C3LS8hlfL6ivpQ5l0YjhE=)

As I’ve always said, the disloyal “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) are no better than the tyrannical Democrats.

At this point, our special interest RINO opponents have even formed an **_implicit alliance_** with Crooked Joe as they parrot one another’s __attacks__ against _OUR_ movement.

Why? _Because the RINOs_** _WANT_** _Crooked Joe to_** _JAIL_** _me for life as an innocent man!_

After years of being stabbed in the back by these so-called “Republicans,” I’ve learned that above all else, you can always count on a RINO to put their own political ambitions ahead of voters like YOU.

**But right now,****with exactly 50 DAYS until the FIRST votes of 2024 are cast****, you can show these RINOs that no amount of plotting, scheming, or allying with Crooked Joe will**** _EVER_****make them** _**_YOUR_**_**nominee.**

name: Betsy (Katie Porter's daughter)
subject: my persuasive writing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Hey, it’s Betsy! I’m Katie Porter’s daughter (here we are in Kings Canyon National Park this summer).
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231126-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_BKP_20231126_V1_F&refcode2=33777_3422442_4zDevh&akid=33777%2E3422442%2E4zDevh)
My mom is a great mom, and she works really hard at all of her many jobs.
I told her that in school we learned about “persuasive writing.” My mom was saying that’s basically what these emails are. Trying to get you to sign a petition, see an argument, or donate a few bucks.
So here are a few hopefully persuasive reasons why I think you should not just vote for my mom if you’re in California, but give her a few dollars if you can:
1. My mom is the only one in this race not to EVER take corporate PAC money
2. She’s the only one in this race not taking money from federal lobbyists
3. She know how to stand up to really powerful people and get stuff done

Can you donate?!
[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231126-1](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20231126-1?refcode=EMAN23_1_BKP_20231126_V1_F&refcode2=33777_3422442_4zDevh&akid=33777%2E3422442%2E4zDevh)
— Betsy

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAN23_1_BKP_20231126_V1_F&t=1&refcode2=33777_3422442_4zDevh&akid=33777%2E3422442%2E4zDevh)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=33777%2E3422442%2E4zDevh)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

name: =?utf-8?Q?Michigan=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: ANNOUNCEMENT: LIVE Webinar Tuesday
body:
We are joined by Dr. Linda Lee Tarver | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | Friends,

We are thrilled to invite you to our inaugural Inform, Engage, Activate webinar series. Each month we will feature an educational webinar designed to tactically prepare Republican delegates for victory 2024 . For our inaugural Inform, Engage, Activate webinar, the topic will be the importance of the Republican Party Platform. Our Guest Speaker is Dr. Linda Lee Tarver. Her presentation promises to be both enlightening and engaging, and shows why we must stand by our Republican Party platform. Please mark your calendars for **Tuesday night this coming week, from 7 PM to 8 PM**.

**Event Details:**
- **Topic:** Insight into the Republican Party Platform
- **Date:** Tuesday, Nov. 28
- **Time:** 7 PM - 8 PM
- **Speakers:**
-**Dr. Linda Lee Tarver** \- Renowned Political Analyst
- **Kristina Karamo** \- MIGOP Chairwoman

**What to Expect:**
Join Dr. Linda Lee Tarver and Kristina Karamo as they delve into the intricacies of the Republican Party platform. Their presentation will cover key aspects and issues that define our party. This discussion will provide a deeper understanding of our principles, objectives and overall mission.

**How to Join:**
The webinar will be live streamed on Rumble ([www.rumble.com/user/migop](https://migop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0bcd38e28909007274d8cce33&id=5015df6649&e=a2af77507c)). There will be a live chat where you can enter in questions and comments! Dr. Tarver and Chairwoman Karamo, should they have time, will answer whatever questions they can. Questions will only be answered at the end of the presentation.

Don’t miss this foundational session that will hear us up for the 2024 election, that will remind us what we are fighting for. We look forward to seeing you there!

Best Regards,

Your MIGOP Team
---
|
---
|
---

The first $6,600/$10,000 from a person/multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Biden for President, with the first $3,300/$5,000 designated for the primary and the next $3,300/$5,000 for the general election. The next $41,300/$15,000 from a person/PAC will be allocated to the DNC. The next $510,000/$255,000 from a person/PAC will be split equally among the Democratic state parties from these states: AK, AL, AR, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, DE, FL, GA, HI, IA, ID, IL, IN, KS, KY, LA, MA, MD, ME, MI, MN, MO, MS, MT, NC, ND, NE, NH, NJ, NM, NV, NY, OH, OK, OR, PA, RI, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, WI, WV, and WY. Any additional funds will be allocated to the DNC, subject to applicable contribution limits.
A contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant by contacting contact@joebiden.com. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution. Contributions will be used in connection with federal elections, may be spent on any activity as each committee determines in its sole discretion, and will not be earmarked for any particular candidate. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of individuals whose contributions exceed $200 per election cycle. Biden Victory Fund does not accept contributions from corporations or their PACs, unions, federal contractors, national banks, those registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA, SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies, or foreign nationals.

subject: Good news! We've extended our sale to Cyber Monday!
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv. ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/-

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/NvbyBY-V9-

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10260275&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ0NjcyNAS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ0NjcyNAS2. Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=10260275&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTg2MDQ0NjcyNAS2&spReportId=MTg2MDQ0NjcyNAS2 from our supporter list. Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, 7th Floor
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 https://links.messages.lcv. ? ? ? ? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcYDqeDha/bXZJUmI3Z0JiQ1RJY1VaSkpvOHN4SjFXQWJJTG9lWkpjSVBRNVdjK29VM2wyb3d6aURJRGp5UDROVEhpSnJWNDNISUNUVGcrUncrY1BQaUhMWGhMZWhKWHNmekFUcElQaGd0NkpTZGs1SnM9S0/

Listen, Peter, I’m not being naive here: I know that, for millions of us, waking up as a Floridian means being hit with a new wave of threats to our very existence.
But I’ve met too many activists, organizers, students, and voters across Florida to _ever_ lose hope.
**WE are our last best hope, Peter. And we have everything we need to win: the energy, the vision, the momentum. The only thing we don’t have... is the funding.**
My finance team says we’re $4,500 short of our weekly fundraising goal, and I really need your help to close that gap and keep this work fully funded and pushing ahead.

Because I call it fascism, and I’ve been calling it that since Ron DeSantis started this crusade. What I refuse to call it, though, is hopeless. If everybody who believes in real progressive values comes together right now, I know – from experience – that we can win. I would literally not be in Congress right now if that weren’t true. That’s why I need your help to stay in Congress, and keep up my part of our collective fight from this platform. ~ | ~ Listen, Peter, I’m not being naive here: I know that, for millions of us, waking up as a Floridian means being hit with a new wave of threats to our very existence. But I’ve met too many activists, organizers, students, and voters across Florida to ever lose hope. WE are our last best hope, Peter. And we have everything we need to win: the energy, the vision, the momentum. The only thing we don’t have... is the funding. My finance team says we’re $4,500 short of our weekly fundraising goal, and I really need your help to close that gap and keep this work fully funded and pushing ahead. ~ | | ~ ~ | ~ | ~~ We got us, Maxwell ~~ ~ | PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS Maxwell Frost for Congress PO Box 772671 Orlando, FL 32877-2671 United States | Maxwell is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District in Congress. He isn't taking any corporate PAC, big sugar, or fossil fuel contributions. He needs your help to protect this seat for poor and working-class people. Will you become a Founding Donor of this movement today? | ~~ | Email is an important way for us to communicate with our supporters. You can .

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Advice from Ronald Reagan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA
body:
While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_t=4tECXUQuQdZueZ33ny1GBj8jDqzcd88imu5h941Tq2RWvoMLerdQwUYsjWnt3kDUFg1fHqHZL2mTTq_Ki1uZOFYSejbPmjPpps1xzGoARek%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_t=4tECXUQuQdZueZ33ny1GBj8jDqzcd88imu5h941Tq2RWvoMLerdQwUYsjWnt3kDUFg1fHqHZL2mTTq_Ki1uZOFYSejbPmjPpps1xzGoARek%3D)
[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7m5utd-PXsWx7dpgOo0i2ixH3sGCclkXJ2kXl9yzoR5RVChE2FziOLMGqi1O0yFtpqKzq9YoxAf5_4j5ylWstBMUyRVjTQ1Vs6QQqgBLPqUmCBL5zCqywd12fwrSGeKPPI8aedE6mYIN1NQk1z_LZ6w%3D%3D)
---
Peter -

While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, _the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before._

When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and [**called upon us to return to our nation’s founding principles and paint again with bold colors instead of pale pastels.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7YD2xRTZJ6ErYwfT9q7thdHBrDNeFiGqpFuoq-7kanHlxBXHEQdV-gNOfApb49mXTFkcm3CVMaxf4S_c81ANNs7R_FPoj5hO0R8Ron4L7uoJjagVrRKb8F62D-ym5jLAcCMuUAqxVkdS8vowp6yIt8Q%3D%3D)

[** RESTORE AMERICA > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7SIsLSXrP3p8gkzqIiUrHMJSU6B6rZW63C_VdZuF8HJHn4YCYkA9IIIAYNlwrH1lE_YJNdXDJsI6fXFBXO9Tqte4E_eMVWysRoDtI482OwrRfrT-2RC83L4g5XcIlSTAMuUI6pO1BwolnZIWeHrgy-Q%3D%3D)
_Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction,_ and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom.

[**The principles that made America, and brought us back during the Reagan Revolution, must guide us still today:**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7JMnondaSMIOIuwJOAt3CiFP6jNpw16x4CbRO-ylsOUgPwbez-u0uz5FvWnrL7qWLjfq20hzW_ODU3uqDL04BLCUi6k9qWF4Yzfr1EpY2ZRPeP9ellKvMmokUoYawOZvwdzDYOC51_e2xsjS88K7syg%3D%3D)

* Individual freedom
* Limited government
* The rule of law
* Peace through strength
* Fiscal responsibility
* Free markets
* Human dignity
* The sanctity of human life

**I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise.** I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. [**Are you with me?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7XofplEj4E1SBl_CBQL9P3_wHoKQOQdVlmzUcUY1KRaoeSHAAQ9qlzU3HhJzvazrXsBJVsVQcuspgyctcjY16YZG5qlZvUG_aAaLxCgIze34D2SiyIHR0PGmZHhpeGANadd6pY5AeBikgRDy50pRRdg%3D%3D)

[** STAND WITH SPEAKER JOHNSON > **](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R71Tw9fNTeQtgtg2USQYPwyfSgocitGzuUk68ks1fmwUW_WjPyK8XaoU4UXI4cHWxNLN1MN5Bgb6j1jS9D0PZ_6R36bHnCTjH1DJV0z5UwP_j2VxC-hFjITpmVszjCzmYJlUPoJK7-Hu5T7VTjCWQYIA%3D%3D)
As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, [**I need to know I can count on you.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7W60mB38B3EmuYgE_LSuqb_2NnAcX057nx7ORFgJknP7d7eLauZTsKiKccWUf59rFmzg-B-QXXiWNLlsn8eu3Q9yvwArcGpFp7pyET7V4Ptm9teCrW-OPXtXMKqCNYfNV4lJrxJgcJotCdg2sT3AZmA%3D%3D)

We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. [**We simply must act before it’s too late.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7106z0rcxUloYOKZ9xBEJMzCFAR5096VwD4AqLoXkl8uU6sMOaoRQINlMuaSDlp546zsj7EHGjuaq7fBvhQoQ6Hhv-ZbdeHqKcle_-Vc8tw1yzydmUwc4wADgRFIJEYQDYsf0IF3FcvIn6YcBcnDRZQ%3D%3D)

[**Join me.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7DTChrifTBh97NB4z4aV2_A_4cs5yf9vsvqYRAqX8kY2T9YZiPuQBt-nZenlttGL2y1_Q7ixXAsuJUwf2F-QAIf3lEHuI41xh1LBZkt4MvGr9QNdux1BwsxvC-Cbuc64guDuv17dM-nBK9QfzmjvUOA%3D%3D)

For America,

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=99a9ee3484f249c4948c4c22f1af90e2&_e=g8ZpSXwwJxc5y6UKL5d7_0_UJMYxEo_VUUyxeJWwkeiPB2aPli5IhiAzkCVx3mWQ84vB0gGiD_OLp_h2LuGuNNKjS0yuJSUxv9x56sHehy-sagM4tgtGHI1hs9N1T2Nr4rFRiqgApevwdtzPgd_hEUPkgJMTpPGItbMMAjfnankUoU4_AxXN70yUnkIzNTgxLRDQcw-yCbrBna2DqeToFxNQ8eZZQJ-iT4VeQz5hdLXj1kIwI3kFf0mD7umJc7R7U31wk4UuYSK9PyU0O--2KHgsP7NWOpqlpCnUDIzZ9AAyks_t8IFeH7O9ZXaP-Zty3Ip8Z9Fx7sxkpkcS1HKzsHa65I9gh1ECgEGomfv_fFn8rdlsN4ai4dn6PnyHw3oGAOMAuf9PSK0SeJ9I2ieWOw%3D%3D)

Mike Johnson
Speaker of the House

* * *

clean_body: While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. | | Peter - While so many of the crises we are facing today are unprecedented, the dilemma we face is similar to what our party has faced before. When America was struggling greatly in the late 1970s, Ronald Reagan stood strong before the people and Republicans desperately needed that clarity and conviction, and Reagan understood that a well-articulated vision and public policy grounded in our timeless conservative principles were the keys to restoring our country and preserving freedom. Individual freedom Limited government The rule of law Peace through strength Fiscal responsibility Free markets Human dignity The sanctity of human life I believe it is our duty as Americans to stand for conservative values without compromise. I am fighting every day for the same vision that Ronald Reagan once had. As Speaker of the House, it is my job to unite our party on what it will take to win and save America. As I lead the critical fight to restore our country and defend our values, We have a chance to save America from the radical Left that is aiming to destroy it, but we’re running out of time. I’m not sure what version of America we will leave to our kids if we continue down this path. For America, Mike Johnson Speaker of the House As Speaker, I want to hear from you on the top issues of the day. It's important for us to deliver results for the American people. Would you take a moment to complete my today? Your input is important to making sure we move America forward. I appreciate you taking the time to send me your input. | SPEAKER MIKE JOHNSON Speaker Johnson is a dedicated husband and father of four, as well as a constitutional law attorney who has devoted his life and career to fighting for the fundamental freedoms and traditional values that have always been a priority to the people of Louisiana. | PAID FOR BY MIKE JOHNSON FOR LOUISIANA Don't want to receive any more of our emails? Hey Peter, Ryan here.

Earlier this month I went to the Cat-Griz game, hanging out with my family and with the great people of Montana, but there’s one person I didn’t see... **Greg Gianforte!**

I’m told he’s not interested in fun things like drinking beer and joking around with Montanans. Weird!

Onto the not-so-fun stuff... I’m going to give it to you straight. This next month is the toughest time of the year for political campaigns. [I know it’s a lot to ask now that the holiday season has officially started, but would you consider a “holiday gift of democracy” of $10 (or any amount, really) and help me reach my $20,000 end-of-month goal before Thursday at midnight?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/74032080/440362589/1684620444?amount=10&source=SBD_RB_EM_FR_NOV2623_1_1_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDgzNDciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWE5ODI3MWMtYjE4Yy1lZTExLTg5MjQtNjA0NWJkZDQ3MTExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5NVIkxiCmBoN1eSBoj6Z12EPNh47QAxc2w5Vvl5nfiY=)

Unlike Gianforte, if there’s one thing I love to do, it’s talk to people who are ready for a new brand of leadership in Montana. Nothing inspires me more than Montanans who are just as fired up as I am gathering together in support of change.

That’s why I’ll be on the trail through December — everywhere from Pablo to Pony and Hamilton to Billings.

But being on the road isn’t cheap. **Supporters like you are what fuels this campaign** , and this month, I’ll need your help more than ever.

[So, if you can, please consider chipping in $10 to help me reach my $20,000 November goal before Thursday at midnight. clean_body: Ryan Busse puts principles over politics. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | | = Hey Peter, Ryan here. Earlier this month I went to the Cat-Griz game, hanging out with my family and with the great people of Montana, but there’s one person I didn’t see... Greg Gianforte! I’m told he’s not interested in fun things like drinking beer and joking around with Montanans. Weird! Onto the not-so-fun stuff... I’m going to give it to you straight. This next month is the toughest time of the year for political campaigns. = | = Unlike Gianforte, if there’s one thing I love to do, it’s talk to people who are ready for a new brand of leadership in Montana. Nothing inspires me more than Montanans who are just as fired up as I am gathering together in support of change. | Tammy’s seat is one of the top 10 most likely to flip.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1594%2E35263%2EcEvUS1)
**Peter:_CNN_ is calling Tammy’s Senate seat one of the top 10 most likely to flip. [Make an urgent donation toward our end-of-month goal to help defend this seat and our Democratic majority →](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1594%2E35263%2EcEvUS1)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1594%2E35263%2EcEvUS1)

Tammy was already one of the GOP’s top targets to unseat — but now that they won’t have to focus on defeating Senator Joe Manchin in West Virginia, Tammy is _even more vulnerable than before._
The Senate majority could all come down to our ability to hold the line in Wisconsin, and you can be sure that all eyes will be on this race next year.
We have to prepare for the GOP to invest heavily in Wisconsin to tip the scales in their favor, but Tammy can’t do it alone. **That’s where you come in:**
**[If you’re able, will you rush in a donation of any amount today to reelect Tammy? It will take all of us to defend this toss-up Senate seat.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-nov23.TOAtRC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_EOM_AC_20231126_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1594%2E35263%2EcEvUS1)**

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: My most important endorsement yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Vivek 2024
body:
Unfortunately, there are some establishment Republicans who would rather have a second term of Biden than have an outsider like me in the White House.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_t=PVB04jpEC3wzr47lA_CTjSwvx2jYpGsKaVUbhsHrB-gAiDnkW2EG1runNBMEkwJ5wqZfCVZpxo_nNR_jZbILCLrfK5sqdA_VZWaeQLLBbNA%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.vivek2024.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_s=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_t=PVB04jpEC3wzr47lA_CTjSwvx2jYpGsKaVUbhsHrB-gAiDnkW2EG1runNBMEkwJ5wqZfCVZpxo_nNR_jZbILCLrfK5sqdA_VZWaeQLLBbNA%3D)

| [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_e=I7Tjah3FRUozk1-ljKm2bJtP9KC-MT2OW2WXXM6Zz80BdF5tOJy6O2qVU3E4NABaJRZZoaN3u2i4v5k_AeYAbtdltz-b96WkKvk1BHinUHPbGM7HAEWVSAywZ01yEJTF2vIMjEhA_eMlxsKbSLdZfWd2Rpnk20nWGPjNjfDDaXr-2BUQUaPR61-i4x2qs5j2-68df3kg0hV8VAb1o0GDr4hsYG0Asouqvv_I4l7YE0-zBc7Z4GZml0jGfyIkZHcKy_PbiR-Fb3tLnSIMsHkaUc1oGHY8M_jWzo_s_RW7j5cQDmTFsIxN7ciKFVHRTGowOVU2b6gMj7Jrz8UYOZQ4xXNMMYJKiVCXkSsKQnGZLkNMODL0avB_rsKClqK8Co-dtFgHGRo3jka2b76xb6JgEQ%3D%3D)

Fellow American,

Unfortunately, there are some establishment Republicans who would **rather have a second term of Biden** than have an outsider like me in the White House.

Perennial loser and uncle of RNC Chair Ronna Romney McDaniel, Mitt Romney said it out loud:
> _**“I’d be happy to support virtually any one of the Republicans,[maybe not Vivek...](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_e=I7Tjah3FRUozk1-ljKm2bJtP9KC-MT2OW2WXXM6Zz80BdF5tOJy6O2qVU3E4NABaJRZZoaN3u2i4v5k_AeYAbtdltz-b96WkKvk1BHinUHPbGM7HAEWVSAywZ01yEJTF2vIMjEhA_eMlxsKbSLdZfWd2Rpnk20nWGPjNjfDDaXr-2BUQUaPR61-i4x2qs5j2-68df3kg0hV8VAb1o0GDr4hsYG0Asouqvv_I4l7YE0-zBc7Z4GZml0jGfyIkZHcKBLiKKKoAjKgUwdifotymedCxw4TFaEUwe4jqo75iNJR6wGtv-_ZMa-_KrFln4HnGiFWG0FQqq9VDJARfihySsY4-oVAk8Ani-flb4WEdd8a8Y4uXFUeoFfmDrP22vyvFm_I3NLyh7Pa8k4e5Ue9bVA%3D%3D)”**_
[**Turns out he’s opposed to the America First movement itself, not just one man.**](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_e=I7Tjah3FRUozk1-ljKm2bJtP9KC-MT2OW2WXXM6Zz80BdF5tOJy6O2qVU3E4NABaJRZZoaN3u2i4v5k_AeYAbtdltz-b96WkKvk1BHinUHPbGM7HAEWVSAywZ01yEJTF2vIMjEhA_eMlxsKbSLdZfWd2Rpnk20nWGPjNjfDDaXr-2BUQUaPR61-i4x2qs5j2-68df3kg0hV8VAb1o0GDr4hsYG0Asouqvv_I4l7YE0-zBc7Z4GZml0jGfyIkZHcK0Shypyp_DlCNceLM2pWGhbTtXZsFut3wDLlPhG5akQAw2A8as4sn7ieMlDwZVExnbr9IdrkAsieC73AEhzqoH_d0M-QkyG5A8x156eeK9bDsA6UUlY1AvtrgvhuUO2R7rdjBkfwm_QdRxn3DkSQ0Nw%3D%3D)

| [** SHUT DOWN THE ESTABLISHMENT **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_e=I7Tjah3FRUozk1-ljKm2bJtP9KC-MT2OW2WXXM6Zz80BdF5tOJy6O2qVU3E4NABaJRZZoaN3u2i4v5k_AeYAbtdltz-b96WkKvk1BHinUHPbGM7HAEWVSAywZ01yEJTF2vIMjEhA_eMlxsKbSLdZfWd2Rpnk20nWGPjNjfDDaXr-2BUQUaPR61-i4x2qs5j2-68df3kg0hV8VAb1o0GDr4hsYG0Asouqvv_I4l7YE0-zBc7Z4GZml0jGfyIkZHcKQlIH_Kj8m2kNwtN5KvgWg2-6j7uEdr_8tV2RR68c5wrYoD7AUcgtTyxok7_Q7H372E5tBisYUBYnwfZ0oX5fNhA4XmlopOFVR7lj9P1L0aQE78tH3EStMsr5OgpqePsFEeITP5PmpQg5JLIvWh0XPw%3D%3D)
---

Fellow American, I plan to show these Establishment Republicans and the American people that **their status quo isn’t working** and real leadership is needed. The days when the governing class’ hand-picked candidates and puppet string manipulation are numbered.

Republicans or Democrats – it doesn't matter. The minute we can all stop playing the game the Establishment has set for us, we can achieve great things together. I’m tired of the Republican party losing and having conservatives go against their own principles, all in the name of being a sore loser.

Enjoy retirement Mitt, thank you for the shout-out on your way out and I hope you’re ready to see real change in the American system that you couldn’t deliver.

Thank you,

[](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_e=I7Tjah3FRUozk1-ljKm2bJtP9KC-MT2OW2WXXM6Zz80BdF5tOJy6O2qVU3E4NABaJRZZoaN3u2i4v5k_AeYAbtdltz-b96WkKvk1BHinUHPbGM7HAEWVSAywZ01yEJTF2vIMjEhA_eMlxsKbSLdZfWd2Rpnk20nWGPjNjfDDaXr-2BUQUaPR61-i4x2qs5j2-68df3kg0hV8VAb1o0GDr4hsYG0Asouqvv_I4l7YE0-zBc7Z4GZml0jGfyIkZHcKOZVRH49qYHPYy-Mi63WB02p18OfjJWJMuKkUr5HE9ufPuWCghYoGkGIjslCtJxO1nouyyHxWW-yHM2j38pDlH_PDlOQnkqgnBmEiZS7lBli9LiqFElimB15SDmgMvD8Oq53OYnPxRYQFM05hNwhVRg%3D%3D)
Vivek Ramaswamy

[** VICTORY MOMENT **](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=f7ad55758b79468a8470086366c0cc5d&_e=I7Tjah3FRUozk1-ljKm2bJtP9KC-MT2OW2WXXM6Zz80BdF5tOJy6O2qVU3E4NABaJRZZoaN3u2i4v5k_AeYAbtdltz-b96WkKvk1BHinUHPbGM7HAEWVSAywZ01yEJTF2vIMjEhA_eMlxsKbSLdZfWd2Rpnk20nWGPjNjfDDaXr-2BUQUaPR61-i4x2qs5j2-68df3kg0hV8VAb1o0GDr4hsYG0Asouqvv_I4l7YE0-zBc7Z4GZml0jGfyIkZHcKD9mGoXB3ln32daQSPZEfd6-DNCIZ8Q3guqYmL1hrvywne605i4-ykWrS0yF0sCYy6jfw__H6itaF3Mz9eb0UpSYTZ1Vjp8itA1jPineZV04mmzkL9OMruRV5QOwn-nmd7akWWkZgqkDqd7hh8m-ZCg%3D%3D)
---

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

clean_body: Unfortunately, there are some establishment Republicans who would rather have a second term of Biden than have an outsider like me in the White House. | | Fellow American, Unfortunately, there are some establishment Republicans who would rather have a second term of Biden than have an outsider like me in the White House. Perennial loser and uncle of RNC Chair Ronna Romney McDaniel, Mitt Romney said it out loud: “I’d be happy to support virtually any one of the Republicans,” | Fellow American, I plan to show these Establishment Republicans and the American people that their status quo isn’t working and real leadership is needed. The days when the governing class’ hand-picked candidates and puppet string manipulation are numbered. Republicans or Democrats – it doesn't matter. The minute we can all stop playing the game the Establishment has set for us, we can achieve great things together. I’m tired of the Republican party losing and having conservatives go against their own principles, all in the name of being a sore loser. Enjoy retirement Mitt, thank you for the shout-out on your way out and I hope you’re ready to see real change in the American system that you couldn’t deliver. Thank you, Vivek Ramaswamy GET TO KNOW VIVEK: Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam , along with his second book, Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence. He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: My Anti-Corruption and Public Integrity Act, and four other plans that will root corruption out of Washington.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
The American people should have complete confidence that government officials are making decisions with only one factor in mind.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---
Here's the way I see it: The American people should have complete confidence that government officials are making decisions with only one factor in mind: the public interest. Not their own pocketbooks. Not their future job prospects in the private sector. Not the wishes of big donors and giant corporations. _The public interest._ So I’ve got a whole bunch of plans to root corruption out of Washington. Some are more specific, like my Department of Defense Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act, which would limit the influence of contractors on the military, constrain foreign influence on retired senior military officers, and require greater transparency from contractors in their interactions with the Pentagon. Or my **Judicial Ethics and Anti-Corruption Act** , which would strengthen ethical standards up and down our judiciary, impose an enforceable code of conduct on the Supreme Court, and ban federal judges from owning individual stock. Or my **Presidential Conflicts of Interest Act** , which would require the president and vice president to disclose and divest from any potential financial conflicts of interest. That’s a standard that President Joe Biden and Vice President Kamala Harris have already cleared — and that all their successors should be held to. Especially after we saw Donald Trump run the most corrupt administration in modern history. Or my **bipartisan legislation to reform the Federal Reserve** , which would bar big bank executives from serving on Reserve Bank boards of directors, subject directors to ethics and financial conflict of interest rules, and bring increased transparency and accountability to the Fed. And then I’ve got my big plan: the **Anti-Corruption and Public Integrity Act**. It’s the most sweeping set of reforms since Watergate. And it would fundamentally change the way Washington does business, including...
* Banning all individual stock ownership by members of Congress, Cabinet secretaries, senior congressional staff, federal judges, White House staff, and other senior agency officials while in office.
* Prohibiting all federal officials from holding or trading stock if its value might be influenced by their agency, department, or actions.
* Tightening conflict of interest and recusal requirements.
* Padlocking the revolving door between industry and government.
* Creating a new, independent anti-corruption agency dedicated to enforcing federal ethics laws.
* Expanding an independent and empowered Congressional ethics office.

**All of these plans have two things in common. They’re about putting our government on the side of the people — not the powerful special interests. And they’re only possible if we grow and strengthen our grassroots movement. That’s how we beat Big Money.** [**I’m running for re-election so we can root corruption out of Washington, rebuild our middle class, and strengthen our democracy. But I can’t do it alone. If it makes sense for you right now, will you pitch in $28 or any amount to help build our campaign from the ground up?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/989?amount=28&t=8&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/989?t=20&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/989?t=22&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/989?t=24&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/989?t=26&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/989?t=16&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/989?t=18&express_lane=true&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---

---
**Every donation is another signal that the American people are demanding real change and calling for a country that works for everyone, not just the rich and powerful.** I’m deeply grateful to fight by your side. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth

| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/982?t=12&akid=1835%2E4032634%2EPu3kPc)
---

Sign on now to abolish the Electoral College »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231126_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20448%2E4449941%2EJOXE_j)
---
Look, Jamie Raskin is 100% right — the Electoral College is eroding our Democracy election by election!

_**Donald Trump would NEVER have been President if it wasn’t for the Electoral College.**_

Republicans have only won the popular vote ONCE since 1988.

_But they’ve won the Presidency three times during that period thanks to the Electoral College – it’s SO UNFAIR and COMPLETELY undemocratic!!_

**[_So we’re launching a MASSIVE petition to stand with Jamie Raskin & demand Congress to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ABOLISH the Electoral College IMMEDIATELY! Add your name right away!_](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/POLL20230608_EC?source=FFR_20231126_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20448%2E4449941%2EJOXE_j)**

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Brass Tacks → Why $5 means so much to our campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=845%2E135344%2Egr_KnO)

Hey there.
We're writing today to ask if you can make a $5 contribution to Elissa Slotkin's campaign for Senate.
Why $5, specifically?
$5 because Michigan has the only competitive open seat in the country, and will therefore be one of the most expensive and competitive Senate races of the cycle.
$5 because there are now three credible Republican opponents in this race, and big-money donors are preparing to throw their full force behind the eventual nominee as they try to flip this seat red.
$5 because the DeVos family has already contributed $46,200 to one of our Republican opponents -- and we know that more money from GOP megadonors is definitely on the way.
$5 because, although we’re not facing a real FEC deadline this month, we closely track (like hawks!) our fundraising progress to ensure we have the resources to win down the line. We then use our internal benchmarks to guide key strategic investments.
$5 because political experts are pointing to Michigan as a must-win state to win the presidency and protect the Senate majority.
It may not seem like $5 can make a huge difference in one of the most competitive and expensive Senate races in the country, but by the time you get to this point in the email, a few folks have already made their donation.
Now, we're asking you to do the same to help us keep pace with our internal fundraising benchmarks. [**Please use this link to contribute $5, or whatever you can manage today, to help Elissa Slotkin keep this Senate seat in Michigan blue for Democrats.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-nov23.RK33_Y&refcode=em231126-2-tt&amount=3&t=2&akid=845%2E135344%2Egr_KnO)**

---

---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/123?c0=ebs-em-nov23.3rl2W8&refcode=em231126-2-tt&t=6&akid=845%2E135344%2Egr_KnO)**

Team Slotkin

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Things you didn’t see on Fox News over Thanksgiving
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Some of you who know me know one of my guilty pleasures is watching Fox News

Some of you who know me know one of my guilty pleasures is watching Fox News and reading some of the websites and posts in the right-wing online ecosystem.
It gives me a good sense of what they’re talking about, their perspective, and some of the attacks they are formulating against Democrats that we’ll soon see from their candidates.
But there was one thing missing over Thanksgiving — the fact that prices were down this Thanksgiving vs. last year. From turkey to travel ... all while hourly wages have gone up.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2988?t=1&akid=1682%2E4767699%2EPRHe5B)
Thanks Joe Biden.
With that said, I hope you had a safe and happy Thanksgiving holiday, and that you were able to share it with those you care about.
\- Gavin
* * *
i️ Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
This Thursday Gavin Newsom is debating Ron DeSantis at 9pm ET / 6pm PT on Fox News. We hope you’ll tune in.
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans like DeSantis with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If it sounds worth it that Democrats fight back everywhere rights are under attack – even in Red States – we are asking you to contribute $20 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy today. It all adds up when we’re all chipping in.

But there was one thing missing over Thanksgiving — the fact that prices were down this Thanksgiving vs. last year. From turkey to travel ... all while hourly wages have gone up. Thanks Joe Biden. With that said, I hope you had a safe and happy Thanksgiving holiday, and that you were able to share it with those you care about. \- Gavin i️ Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸 This Thursday Gavin Newsom is debating Ron DeSantis at 9pm ET / 6pm PT on Fox News. We hope you’ll tune in. All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans like DeSantis with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy. If it sounds worth it that Democrats fight back everywhere rights are under attack – even in Red States – we are asking you to contribute $20 to Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy today.
